FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\navigation\AuthNavigator.js
============================================================
import React         from "react";
import { createNativeStackNavigator } from "@react-navigation/native-stack";
import LoginScreen   from "../screens/LoginScreen";

/**
 * AuthNavigator.js
 *
 * Stack navigator for unauthenticated screens.
 * Currently: Login only.
 * Extend with RegisterScreen, ForgotPasswordScreen as needed.
 */

const Stack = createNativeStackNavigator()

export default function AuthNavigator() {
  return (
    <Stack.Navigator
      screenOptions={{
        headerShown:  false,
        animation:    "slide_from_right",
        contentStyle: { backgroundColor: "#f7fafc" },
      }}
    >
      <Stack.Screen
        name      = "Login"
        component = {LoginScreen}
      />
    </Stack.Navigator>
  )
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\navigation\TabNavigator.js
============================================================
import React        from "react";
import { View, Text, StyleSheet } from "react-native";
import { createBottomTabNavigator } from "@react-navigation/bottom-tabs";
import { createNativeStackNavigator } from "@react-navigation/native-stack";
import HomeScreen        from "../screens/HomeScreen";
import RiskHistoryScreen from "../screens/RiskHistoryScreen";
import PHQScreen         from "../screens/PHQScreen";
import AlertsScreen      from "../screens/AlertsScreen";
import InsightsScreen    from "../screens/InsightsScreen";
import SettingsScreen    from "../screens/SettingsScreen";
import useAlerts         from "../hooks/useAlerts";

/**
 * TabNavigator.js
 *
 * Bottom tab navigator for authenticated users.
 * Tabs: Home | History | PHQ | Alerts
 * Each tab has its own stack for deeper navigation.
 */

const Tab   = createBottomTabNavigator()
const Stack = createNativeStackNavigator()

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Home stack (Home → Settings → Insights)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function HomeStack() {
  return (
    <Stack.Navigator screenOptions={{ headerShown: false }}>
      <Stack.Screen name="HomeMain"    component={HomeScreen}     />
      <Stack.Screen name="Settings"    component={SettingsScreen} />
      <Stack.Screen name="Insights"    component={InsightsScreen} />
    </Stack.Navigator>
  )
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Tab icons (text-based, no icon library needed)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function TabIcon({ emoji, label, focused, color }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.iconWrap}>
      <Text style={[styles.iconEmoji, { opacity: focused ? 1 : 0.5 }]}>
        {emoji}
      </Text>
      <Text style={[styles.iconLabel, { color }]}>
        {label}
      </Text>
    </View>
  )
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Tab navigator
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function TabNavigator() {
  const { unreadCount } = useAlerts()

  return (
    <Tab.Navigator
      screenOptions={{
        headerShown:     false,
        tabBarStyle:     styles.tabBar,
        tabBarActiveTintColor:   "#4c51bf",
        tabBarInactiveTintColor: "#a0aec0",
        tabBarShowLabel: false,
      }}
    >
      <Tab.Screen
        name      = "Home"
        component = {HomeStack}
        options   = {{
          tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color }) => (
            <TabIcon
              emoji   = "🧠"
              label   = "Home"
              focused = {focused}
              color   = {color}
            />
          ),
        }}
      />

      <Tab.Screen
        name      = "History"
        component = {RiskHistoryScreen}
        options   = {{
          tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color }) => (
            <TabIcon
              emoji   = "📈"
              label   = "History"
              focused = {focused}
              color   = {color}
            />
          ),
        }}
      />

      <Tab.Screen
        name      = "PHQ"
        component = {PHQScreen}
        options   = {{
          tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color }) => (
            <TabIcon
              emoji   = "📋"
              label   = "PHQ-9"
              focused = {focused}
              color   = {color}
            />
          ),
        }}
      />

      <Tab.Screen
        name      = "Alerts"
        component = {AlertsScreen}
        options   = {{
          tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color }) => (
            <TabIcon
              emoji   = "🔔"
              label   = "Alerts"
              focused = {focused}
              color   = {color}
            />
          ),
          tabBarBadge: unreadCount > 0 ? unreadCount : undefined,
          tabBarBadgeStyle: styles.badge,
        }}
      />
    </Tab.Navigator>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  tabBar: {
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderTopWidth:  1,
    borderTopColor:  "#e2e8f0",
    height:          64,
    paddingBottom:   8,
    paddingTop:      6,
    shadowColor:     "#000",
    shadowOpacity:   0.06,
    shadowRadius:    8,
    elevation:       8,
  },
  iconWrap: {
    alignItems: "center",
    gap:        2,
  },
  iconEmoji: {
    fontSize: 22,
  },
  iconLabel: {
    fontSize:   10,
    fontWeight: "500",
  },
  badge: {
    backgroundColor: "#e53e3e",
    color:           "#fff",
    fontSize:        10,
    fontWeight:      "700",
    minWidth:        16,
    height:          16,
    borderRadius:    8,
  },
})

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\AlertsScreen.js
============================================================
import React, { useState } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, FlatList,
  TouchableOpacity, RefreshControl, ActivityIndicator,
} from "react-native";
import useAlerts         from "../hooks/useAlerts";
import { formatRelative } from "../utils/dateUtils";

export default function AlertsScreen() {
  const {
    alerts, unreadCount,
    loading, error,
    markRead, markAllRead,
    getSeverityStyle,
    refetch,
  } = useAlerts()

  const [refreshing, setRefreshing] = useState(false)
  const [filter,     setFilter]     = useState("all")   // all | unread | high

  const _onRefresh = async () => {
    setRefreshing(true)
    await refetch()
    setRefreshing(false)
  }

  const filteredAlerts = alerts.filter((a) => {
    if (filter === "unread") return !a.is_read
    if (filter === "high")   return a.severity === "high"
    return true
  })

  const renderAlert = ({ item }) => {
    const style = getSeverityStyle(item.severity)

    return (
      <TouchableOpacity
        style       = {[
          styles.alertCard,
          {
            backgroundColor: item.is_read ? "#f7fafc" : style.bg,
            borderLeftWidth: 4,
            borderLeftColor: item.is_read ? "#e2e8f0" : style.border,
            opacity:         item.is_read ? 0.7 : 1,
          }
        ]}
        onPress     = {() => !item.is_read && markRead(item.id)}
        activeOpacity = {0.8}
      >
        {/* Header */}
        <View style={styles.alertHeader}>
          <View style={styles.alertHeaderLeft}>
            {/* Unread dot */}
            {!item.is_read && (
              <View style={[styles.unreadDot, { backgroundColor: style.dot }]} />
            )}
            <View style={[styles.severityBadge, {
              backgroundColor: style.bg,
              borderColor:     style.border,
              borderWidth:     1,
            }]}>
              <Text style={[styles.severityText, { color: style.text }]}>
                {item.severity.toUpperCase()}
              </Text>
            </View>
          </View>
          <Text style={styles.alertTime}>
            {formatRelative(item.created_at)}
          </Text>
        </View>

        {/* Message */}
        <Text style={[
          styles.alertMessage,
          { color: item.is_read ? "#718096" : "#2d3748" }
        ]}>
          {item.message}
        </Text>

        {/* Mark read action */}
        {!item.is_read && (
          <TouchableOpacity
            onPress = {() => markRead(item.id)}
            style   = {styles.markReadBtn}
          >
            <Text style={styles.markReadText}>✓ Mark as read</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        )}
      </TouchableOpacity>
    )
  }

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.center}>
        <ActivityIndicator color="#4c51bf" size="large" />
      </View>
    )
  }

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      {/* Header */}
      <View style={styles.header}>
        <View>
          <Text style={styles.headerTitle}>🔔 Alerts</Text>
          <Text style={styles.headerSub}>
            {unreadCount > 0
              ? `${unreadCount} unread notification${unreadCount > 1 ? "s" : ""}`
              : "All caught up"}
          </Text>
        </View>
        {unreadCount > 0 && (
          <TouchableOpacity
            onPress = {markAllRead}
            style   = {styles.markAllBtn}
          >
            <Text style={styles.markAllText}>Mark all read</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        )}
      </View>

      {/* Filter tabs */}
      <View style={styles.filterRow}>
        {["all", "unread", "high"].map((f) => (
          <TouchableOpacity
            key     = {f}
            style   = {[styles.filterBtn, filter === f && styles.filterBtnActive]}
            onPress = {() => setFilter(f)}
          >
            <Text style={[
              styles.filterText,
              filter === f && styles.filterTextActive,
            ]}>
              {f === "all"    ? `All (${alerts.length})`          :
               f === "unread" ? `Unread (${unreadCount})`         :
               `High (${alerts.filter((a) => a.severity === "high").length})`}
            </Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        ))}
      </View>

      {/* Error */}
      {error && (
        <View style={styles.errorBanner}>
          <Text style={styles.errorText}>⚠️ {error}</Text>
          <TouchableOpacity onPress={refetch}>
            <Text style={styles.retryText}>Retry</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </View>
      )}

      {/* Alert list */}
      <FlatList
        data             = {filteredAlerts}
        keyExtractor     = {(item) => item.id}
        renderItem       = {renderAlert}
        contentContainerStyle = {styles.listContent}
        refreshControl   = {
          <RefreshControl refreshing={refreshing} onRefresh={_onRefresh} />
        }
        ListEmptyComponent = {
          <View style={styles.emptyState}>
            <Text style={styles.emptyEmoji}>🎉</Text>
            <Text style={styles.emptyTitle}>
              {filter === "unread" ? "No unread alerts" :
               filter === "high"   ? "No high risk alerts" :
               "No alerts yet"}
            </Text>
            <Text style={styles.emptyText}>
              {filter === "all"
                ? "Alerts will appear here when your risk score is elevated."
                : "Try switching to 'All' to see past alerts."}
            </Text>
          </View>
        }
      />
    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:       { flex: 1, backgroundColor: "#f7fafc" },
  center: {
    flex:           1,
    alignItems:     "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
  },
  header: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    justifyContent:  "space-between",
    alignItems:      "center",
    padding:         16,
    paddingTop:      52,
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "#e2e8f0",
  },
  headerTitle:     { fontSize: 20, fontWeight: "700", color: "#1a202c" },
  headerSub:       { fontSize: 13, color: "#718096", marginTop: 2 },
  markAllBtn: {
    backgroundColor: "#f0fff4",
    borderRadius:    8,
    paddingHorizontal: 12,
    paddingVertical:  7,
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     "#9ae6b4",
  },
  markAllText:     { fontSize: 12, color: "#276749", fontWeight: "600" },
  filterRow: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    padding:         12,
    gap:             8,
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "#f0f0f0",
  },
  filterBtn: {
    paddingHorizontal: 12,
    paddingVertical:   6,
    borderRadius:     20,
    backgroundColor:  "#f7fafc",
    borderWidth:      1,
    borderColor:      "#e2e8f0",
  },
  filterBtnActive: { backgroundColor: "#4c51bf", borderColor: "#4c51bf" },
  filterText:      { fontSize: 12, color: "#718096", fontWeight: "500" },
  filterTextActive:{ color: "#ffffff", fontWeight: "600" },
  errorBanner: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    justifyContent:  "space-between",
    alignItems:      "center",
    margin:          12,
    padding:         12,
    backgroundColor: "#fff5f5",
    borderRadius:    8,
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     "#fc8181",
  },
  errorText:       { fontSize: 13, color: "#c53030" },
  retryText:       { fontSize: 13, color: "#4c51bf", fontWeight: "600" },
  listContent:     { padding: 12, gap: 8 },
  alertCard: {
    borderRadius:    12,
    padding:         14,
    marginBottom:    2,
    gap:             8,
  },
  alertHeader: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    justifyContent:  "space-between",
    alignItems:      "center",
  },
  alertHeaderLeft: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    alignItems:      "center",
    gap:             8,
  },
  unreadDot:       { width: 8, height: 8, borderRadius: 4 },
  severityBadge:   { paddingHorizontal: 8, paddingVertical: 3, borderRadius: 8 },
  severityText:    { fontSize: 10, fontWeight: "700", letterSpacing: 0.4 },
  alertTime:       { fontSize: 11, color: "#a0aec0" },
  alertMessage:    { fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 20 },
  markReadBtn:     { alignSelf: "flex-start" },
  markReadText:    { fontSize: 11, color: "#718096", textDecorationLine: "underline" },
  emptyState: {
    alignItems:     "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
    paddingVertical: 60,
    paddingHorizontal: 32,
    gap:            12,
  },
  emptyEmoji:      { fontSize: 48 },
  emptyTitle:      { fontSize: 16, fontWeight: "600", color: "#2d3748" },
  emptyText:       { fontSize: 13, color: "#a0aec0", textAlign: "center", lineHeight: 20 },
})

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\HomeScreen.js
============================================================
import React, { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity, RefreshControl,
  Animated, Alert,
} from "react-native";
import { useNavigation }  from "@react-navigation/native";
import { useAuth }        from "../context/AuthContext";
import useMonitoring      from "../hooks/useMonitoring";
import useRiskScores      from "../hooks/useRiskScores";
import useAlerts          from "../hooks/useAlerts";
import { REMEDIES }       from "../constants/remedies";
import { RISK_COLORS, RISK_BG_COLORS, RISK_BORDER_COLORS, RISK_LABELS, RISK_EMOJIS }
  from "../constants/thresholds";
import { METER_ZONES }    from "../constants/thresholds";

export default function HomeScreen() {
  const navigation   = useNavigation()
  const { user, logout } = useAuth()

  const {
    isMonitoring, start, stop,
    runInference, settings,
  } = useMonitoring()

  const {
    latestScore, riskLevel, scorePct,
    riskColor, trend, loading: scoresLoading,
    refetch: refetchScores,
  } = useRiskScores()

  const { unreadCount } = useAlerts()

  const [expandedSection, setExpandedSection] = useState(null)
  const [refreshing,      setRefreshing]       = useState(false)

  const fadeAnim  = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current
  const slideAnim = useRef(new Animated.Value(30)).current

  useEffect(() => {
    Animated.parallel([
      Animated.timing(fadeAnim,  { toValue: 1, duration: 600, useNativeDriver: true }),
      Animated.timing(slideAnim, { toValue: 0, duration: 500, useNativeDriver: true }),
    ]).start()
  }, [])

  useEffect(() => {
    if (latestScore) {
      setExpandedSection(null)
      fadeAnim.setValue(0)
      Animated.timing(fadeAnim, {
        toValue:         1,
        duration:        500,
        useNativeDriver: true,
      }).start()
    }
  }, [latestScore?.score])

  const _onRefresh = async () => {
    setRefreshing(true)
    await refetchScores()
    setRefreshing(false)
  }

  const _handleToggleMonitoring = async () => {
    if (isMonitoring) {
      Alert.alert(
        "Stop Monitoring",
        "Stopping will pause sensor collection. Your risk score won't update until monitoring resumes.",
        [
          { text: "Cancel", style: "cancel" },
          { text: "Stop",   style: "destructive", onPress: stop },
        ]
      )
    } else {
      await start()
    }
  }

  const remedyData = riskLevel && riskLevel !== "unknown"
    ? REMEDIES[riskLevel]
    : null

  return (
    <ScrollView
      style          = {styles.container}
      refreshControl = {
        <RefreshControl refreshing={refreshing} onRefresh={_onRefresh} />
      }
      showsVerticalScrollIndicator = {false}
    >
      {/* ── Navbar ── */}
      <View style={styles.navbar}>
        <View>
          <Text style={styles.navTitle}>CareMind 🧠</Text>
          <Text style={styles.navSub}>
            {user?.role === "clinician" ? "Clinician View" : "Patient Dashboard"}
          </Text>
        </View>
        <View style={styles.navRight}>
          {unreadCount > 0 && (
            <TouchableOpacity
              style   = {styles.alertBadge}
              onPress = {() => navigation.navigate("Alerts")}
            >
              <Text style={styles.alertBadgeText}>🔔 {unreadCount}</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          )}
          <TouchableOpacity
            onPress = {() => navigation.navigate("Settings")}
            style   = {styles.settingsBtn}
          >
            <Text style={styles.settingsIcon}>⚙️</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </View>
      </View>

      <Animated.View style={{
        opacity:   fadeAnim,
        transform: [{ translateY: slideAnim }],
      }}>

        {/* ── Risk Score Card ── */}
        <View style={[
          styles.scoreCard,
          remedyData && {
            borderTopWidth: 4,
            borderTopColor: RISK_COLORS[riskLevel],
          }
        ]}>
          <Text style={styles.scoreLabel}>Current Risk Score</Text>

          <Text style={[styles.scoreValue, { color: riskColor }]}>
            {scorePct}
          </Text>

          <View style={styles.severityRow}>
            <Text style={styles.severityEmoji}>
              {RISK_EMOJIS[riskLevel]}
            </Text>
            <Text style={[styles.severityText, { color: riskColor }]}>
              {RISK_LABELS[riskLevel]}
            </Text>
          </View>

          {latestScore?.timestamp && (
            <Text style={styles.scoreTime}>
              Updated {new Date(latestScore.timestamp).toLocaleString("en-IN", {
                day: "numeric", month: "short",
                hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit"
              })}
            </Text>
          )}

          {/* Risk meter */}
          {latestScore && (
            <View style={styles.meterWrap}>
              <View style={styles.meterTrack}>
                {METER_ZONES.map((zone) => (
                  <View
                    key   = {zone.label}
                    style = {[styles.meterZone, {
                      flex:            zone.flex,
                      backgroundColor: zone.color,
                    }]}
                  />
                ))}
              </View>
              <View style={[
                styles.meterThumb,
                { left: `${Math.min(latestScore.score * 100, 96)}%` }
              ]} />
              <View style={styles.meterLabels}>
                {METER_ZONES.map((zone) => (
                  <Text key={zone.label} style={styles.meterLabel}>
                    {zone.label}
                  </Text>
                ))}
              </View>
            </View>
          )}

          {/* Trend pill */}
          {trend && trend !== "insufficient_data" && (
            <View style={[styles.trendPill, {
              backgroundColor:
                trend === "worsening" ? "#fff5f5" :
                trend === "improving" ? "#f0fff4" : "#f7fafc"
            }]}>
              <Text style={[styles.trendText, {
                color:
                  trend === "worsening" ? "#c53030" :
                  trend === "improving" ? "#276749" : "#4a5568"
              }]}>
                {trend === "worsening" ? "📈 Trending up"  :
                 trend === "improving" ? "📉 Improving"    :
                 "➡️ Stable"}
              </Text>
            </View>
          )}
        </View>

        {/* ── Monitor Controls ── */}
        <View style={styles.controlsCard}>
          {/* Status indicator */}
          <View style={styles.statusRow}>
            <View style={[
              styles.statusDot,
              { backgroundColor: isMonitoring ? "#38a169" : "#a0aec0" }
            ]} />
            <Text style={styles.statusText}>
              {isMonitoring ? "Monitoring active" : "Monitoring stopped"}
            </Text>
          </View>

          {/* Buttons */}
          <View style={styles.btnRow}>
            <TouchableOpacity
              style   = {[styles.primaryBtn, {
                backgroundColor: isMonitoring ? "#e53e3e" : "#38a169"
              }]}
              onPress = {_handleToggleMonitoring}
              activeOpacity = {0.8}
            >
              <Text style={styles.primaryBtnText}>
                {isMonitoring ? "⏹ Stop" : "▶ Start"} Monitoring
              </Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>

            <TouchableOpacity
              style   = {[
                styles.secondaryBtn,
                !isMonitoring && styles.disabledBtn,
              ]}
              onPress  = {runInference}
              disabled = {!isMonitoring}
              activeOpacity = {0.8}
            >
              <Text style={styles.secondaryBtnText}>
                🔍 Run Inference
              </Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          </View>

          {/* Quick stats */}
          {latestScore && (
            <View style={styles.quickStats}>
              <StatChip
                label = "Quality"
                value = {`${latestScore.feature_quality || 0}%`}
                color = "#4c51bf"
              />
              <StatChip
                label = "Severity"
                value = {riskLevel}
                color = {riskColor}
              />
              <StatChip
                label = "Trend"
                value = {trend || "—"}
                color = "#718096"
              />
            </View>
          )}
        </View>

        {/* ── Remedies & Preventive Measures ── */}
        {remedyData && (
          <View style={styles.remedyContainer}>

            {/* Remedy header */}
            <View style={[styles.remedyHeader, {
              backgroundColor: RISK_BG_COLORS[riskLevel],
              borderColor:     RISK_BORDER_COLORS[riskLevel],
            }]}>
              <Text style={[styles.remedyTitle, { color: riskColor }]}>
                {remedyData.title}
              </Text>
              <Text style={[styles.remedySubtitle, { color: riskColor }]}>
                {remedyData.subtitle}
              </Text>
            </View>

            {/* Collapsible sections */}
            {remedyData.sections.map((section, idx) => (
              <View key={idx} style={styles.remedySection}>
                <TouchableOpacity
                  style       = {[styles.sectionHeader, {
                    borderLeftColor: riskColor,
                  }]}
                  onPress     = {() => setExpandedSection(
                    expandedSection === idx ? null : idx
                  )}
                  activeOpacity = {0.7}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.sectionHeading}>
                    {section.heading}
                  </Text>
                  <Text style={[styles.chevron, { color: riskColor }]}>
                    {expandedSection === idx ? "▲" : "▼"}
                  </Text>
                </TouchableOpacity>

                {expandedSection === idx && (
                  <View style={styles.itemsWrap}>
                    {section.items.map((item, i) => (
                      <View key={i} style={styles.remedyItem}>
                        <View style={[
                          styles.itemDot,
                          { backgroundColor: riskColor }
                        ]} />
                        <Text style={styles.itemText}>{item}</Text>
                      </View>
                    ))}
                  </View>
                )}
              </View>
            ))}

            {/* Crisis banner */}
            {remedyData.crisisVisible && (
              <View style={styles.crisisBanner}>
                <Text style={styles.crisisTitle}>🆘 Need immediate help?</Text>
                {remedyData.crisisNumbers.map((c) => (
                  <View key={c.number} style={styles.crisisRow}>
                    <Text style={styles.crisisName}>{c.name}</Text>
                    <Text style={styles.crisisNumber}>{c.number}</Text>
                    <Text style={styles.crisisHours}>{c.hours}</Text>
                  </View>
                ))}
              </View>
            )}

            {/* Footer */}
            <Text style={[styles.remedyFooter, { color: riskColor }]}>
              {remedyData.footer}
            </Text>
          </View>
        )}

        {/* ── Quick actions ── */}
        <View style={styles.quickActions}>
          <QuickActionBtn
            emoji = "📈"
            label = "Risk History"
            onPress = {() => navigation.navigate("History")}
          />
          <QuickActionBtn
            emoji = "📋"
            label = "PHQ-9"
            onPress = {() => navigation.navigate("PHQ")}
            badge  = {true}
          />
          <QuickActionBtn
            emoji = "🔬"
            label = "Insights"
            onPress = {() => navigation.navigate("Insights")}
          />
        </View>

      </Animated.View>

      {/* Bottom padding */}
      <View style={{ height: 32 }} />
    </ScrollView>
  )
}

function StatChip({ label, value, color }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.statChip}>
      <Text style={styles.statLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <Text style={[styles.statValue, { color }]}>{value}</Text>
    </View>
  )
}

function QuickActionBtn({ emoji, label, onPress, badge }) {
  return (
    <TouchableOpacity
      style     = {styles.quickActionBtn}
      onPress   = {onPress}
      activeOpacity = {0.7}
    >
      <Text style={styles.quickActionEmoji}>{emoji}</Text>
      <Text style={styles.quickActionLabel}>{label}</Text>
    </TouchableOpacity>
  )
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\InsightsScreen.js
============================================================
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity, RefreshControl, ActivityIndicator,
} from "react-native";
import { useNavigation }   from "@react-navigation/native";
import useRiskScores       from "../hooks/useRiskScores";
import useMonitoring       from "../hooks/useMonitoring";
import {
  FEATURE_LABELS,
  FEATURE_IMPORTANCE,
  HEALTHY_RANGES,
  getFeatureStatus,
  STATUS_COLORS,
  getTopContributors,
  normalizeForDisplay,
  scoreToPercent,
} from "../ml/modelUtils";
import { FEATURE_UNITS }   from "../features/FeatureAggregator";
import { formatDate }      from "../utils/dateUtils";

export default function InsightsScreen() {
  const navigation          = useNavigation()
  const { latestScore, loading, refetch } = useRiskScores()
  const { getDailySummaries }             = useMonitoring()

  const [summaries,   setSummaries]   = useState(null)
  const [refreshing,  setRefreshing]  = useState(false)
  const [activeTab,   setActiveTab]   = useState("features")

  useEffect(() => {
    _loadSummaries()
  }, [])

  const _loadSummaries = async () => {
    const data = await getDailySummaries(new Date())
    setSummaries(data)
  }

  const _onRefresh = async () => {
    setRefreshing(true)
    await Promise.all([refetch(), _loadSummaries()])
    setRefreshing(false)
  }

  const namedFeatures = latestScore?.named_features || null
  const topContributors = namedFeatures
    ? getTopContributors(namedFeatures, 5)
    : []

  if (loading && !latestScore) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.center}>
        <ActivityIndicator color="#4c51bf" size="large" />
        <Text style={styles.loadingText}>Loading insights...</Text>
      </View>
    )
  }

  return (
    <ScrollView
      style          = {styles.container}
      refreshControl = {
        <RefreshControl refreshing={refreshing} onRefresh={_onRefresh} />
      }
      showsVerticalScrollIndicator = {false}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <View style={styles.header}>
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={() => navigation.goBack()} style={styles.backBtn}>
          <Text style={styles.backText}>← Back</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
        <View>
          <Text style={styles.headerTitle}>🔬 Behavioral Insights</Text>
          <Text style={styles.headerSub}>
            {latestScore
              ? `Data from ${formatDate(latestScore.timestamp)}`
              : "Run inference to see insights"}
          </Text>
        </View>
      </View>

      {!namedFeatures ? (
        <View style={styles.noDataCard}>
          <Text style={styles.noDataEmoji}>📊</Text>
          <Text style={styles.noDataTitle}>No feature data yet</Text>
          <Text style={styles.noDataText}>
            Start monitoring and run inference to see your behavioral feature breakdown.
          </Text>
        </View>
      ) : (
        <>
          {/* Feature quality indicator */}
          <View style={styles.qualityCard}>
            <Text style={styles.qualityLabel}>Data Quality</Text>
            <View style={styles.qualityBarWrap}>
              <View style={[
                styles.qualityBar,
                { width: `${latestScore?.feature_quality || 0}%` }
              ]} />
            </View>
            <Text style={styles.qualityPct}>
              {latestScore?.feature_quality || 0}%
            </Text>
            <Text style={styles.qualityHint}>
              {(latestScore?.feature_quality || 0) < 60
                ? "⚠️ Low quality — monitor longer for better accuracy"
                : "✅ Good quality — sufficient data for reliable inference"}
            </Text>
          </View>

          {/* Tab selector */}
          <View style={styles.tabRow}>
            {["features", "contributors", "sensors"].map((tab) => (
              <TouchableOpacity
                key     = {tab}
                style   = {[styles.tab, activeTab === tab && styles.tabActive]}
                onPress = {() => setActiveTab(tab)}
              >
                <Text style={[
                  styles.tabText,
                  activeTab === tab && styles.tabTextActive,
                ]}>
                  {tab === "features"     ? "All Features"   :
                   tab === "contributors" ? "Top Factors"    : "Sensor Data"}
                </Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            ))}
          </View>

          {/* All features tab */}
          {activeTab === "features" && (
            <View style={styles.section}>
              <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>
                All 15 Behavioral Features
              </Text>
              {Object.entries(namedFeatures).map(([name, value]) => {
                const status   = getFeatureStatus(name, value)
                const color    = STATUS_COLORS[status]
                const range    = HEALTHY_RANGES[name]
                const unit     = FEATURE_UNITS[name] || ""
                const label    = FEATURE_LABELS[name] || name
                const barWidth = normalizeForDisplay(name, value)

                return (
                  <View key={name} style={styles.featureRow}>
                    <View style={styles.featureHeader}>
                      <Text style={styles.featureName}>{label}</Text>
                      <View style={[styles.statusBadge, { backgroundColor: color + "20" }]}>
                        <Text style={[styles.statusText, { color }]}>
                          {status}
                        </Text>
                      </View>
                    </View>

                    <View style={styles.featureBarRow}>
                      <View style={styles.featureBarWrap}>
                        {/* Healthy range indicator */}
                        {range && (
                          <View style={[
                            styles.healthyZone,
                            {
                              left:  `${normalizeForDisplay(name, range.min) * 100}%`,
                              right: `${(1 - normalizeForDisplay(name, range.max)) * 100}%`,
                            }
                          ]} />
                        )}
                        <View style={[
                          styles.featureBar,
                          { width: `${barWidth * 100}%`, backgroundColor: color }
                        ]} />
                      </View>
                      <Text style={[styles.featureValue, { color }]}>
                        {typeof value === "number"
                          ? value % 1 === 0 ? value : value.toFixed(2)
                          : "—"}{" "}
                        <Text style={styles.featureUnit}>{unit}</Text>
                      </Text>
                    </View>

                    {range && (
                      <Text style={styles.featureRange}>
                        Healthy: {range.min}–{range.max} {unit}
                      </Text>
                    )}
                  </View>
                )
              })}
            </View>
          )}

          {/* Top contributors tab */}
          {activeTab === "contributors" && (
            <View style={styles.section}>
              <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>
                Top 5 Factors Influencing Your Score
              </Text>
              <Text style={styles.sectionSub}>
                Based on Random Forest feature importances from training data
              </Text>
              {topContributors.map((feat, idx) => {
                const color = STATUS_COLORS[feat.status]
                return (
                  <View key={feat.name} style={styles.contributorRow}>
                    <View style={styles.contributorRank}>
                      <Text style={styles.rankText}>#{idx + 1}</Text>
                    </View>
                    <View style={styles.contributorInfo}>
                      <View style={styles.contributorHeader}>
                        <Text style={styles.contributorName}>{feat.label}</Text>
                        <View style={[
                          styles.statusBadge,
                          { backgroundColor: color + "20" }
                        ]}>
                          <Text style={[styles.statusText, { color }]}>
                            {feat.status}
                          </Text>
                        </View>
                      </View>
                      <View style={styles.importanceBarWrap}>
                        <View style={[
                          styles.importanceBar,
                          { width: `${feat.importance * 100 * 7}%` }
                        ]} />
                      </View>
                      <View style={styles.contributorFooter}>
                        <Text style={styles.importancePct}>
                          Importance: {(feat.importance * 100).toFixed(1)}%
                        </Text>
                        <Text style={[styles.contributorValue, { color }]}>
                          {typeof feat.value === "number"
                            ? feat.value % 1 === 0
                              ? feat.value
                              : feat.value.toFixed(2)
                            : "—"} {feat.unit}
                        </Text>
                      </View>
                    </View>
                  </View>
                )
              })}

              <View style={styles.infoBox}>
                <Text style={styles.infoText}>
                  ℹ️ Feature importance indicates how much each behavioral signal
                  influences the depression risk prediction model. Higher importance
                  features have more impact on your final score.
                </Text>
              </View>
            </View>
          )}

          {/* Sensor data tab */}
          {activeTab === "sensors" && summaries && (
            <View style={styles.section}>
              <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>Today's Sensor Summary</Text>

              {/* Location */}
              {summaries.location && (
                <SensorSummaryCard
                  title = "📍 Location"
                  items = {[
                    { label: "Movement Range",    value: `${summaries.location.radius_of_gyration}m` },
                    { label: "Home Stay",         value: `${summaries.location.home_stay_pct?.toFixed(1)}%` },
                    { label: "Places Visited",    value: summaries.location.num_places_visited },
                    { label: "Location Entropy",  value: summaries.location.location_entropy?.toFixed(2) },
                    { label: "GPS Readings",      value: summaries.location.sample_count },
                  ]}
                />
              )}

              {/* Movement */}
              {summaries.movement && (
                <SensorSummaryCard
                  title = "🏃 Movement"
                  items = {[
                    { label: "Steps Today",       value: summaries.movement.daily_step_count },
                    { label: "Sedentary Bouts",   value: summaries.movement.sedentary_bouts },
                    { label: "Sedentary Time",    value: `${summaries.movement.sedentary_total_mins}min` },
                    { label: "Mean Activity",     value: summaries.movement.mean_activity_level?.toFixed(4) },
                    { label: "Source",            value: summaries.movement.using_pedometer ? "Pedometer" : "Accel proxy" },
                  ]}
                />
              )}

              {/* Screen */}
              {summaries.screen && (
                <SensorSummaryCard
                  title = "📱 Screen Activity"
                  items = {[
                    { label: "Unlocks",           value: summaries.screen.screen_unlock_count },
                    { label: "Screen Time",       value: `${summaries.screen.screen_on_duration_mins}min` },
                    { label: "Avg Session",       value: `${summaries.screen.avg_session_mins}min` },
                    { label: "Evening Usage",     value: `${summaries.screen.evening_usage_mins?.toFixed(0)}min` },
                    { label: "Night Events",      value: summaries.screen.night_usage_events },
                  ]}
                />
              )}

              {/* Battery */}
              {summaries.battery && (
                <SensorSummaryCard
                  title = "🔋 Battery (Sleep Proxy)"
                  items = {[
                    { label: "Min Level",         value: `${summaries.battery.min_battery_level}%` },
                    { label: "Night Charging",    value: `${summaries.battery.night_charging_pct}%` },
                    { label: "Night Usage Events",value: summaries.battery.night_usage_events },
                  ]}
                />
              )}
            </View>
          )}
        </>
      )}

      <View style={{ height: 32 }} />
    </ScrollView>
  )
}

function SensorSummaryCard({ title, items }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.sensorCard}>
      <Text style={styles.sensorTitle}>{title}</Text>
      {items.map((item, idx) => (
        <View key={idx} style={styles.sensorRow}>
          <Text style={styles.sensorLabel}>{item.label}</Text>
          <Text style={styles.sensorValue}>{item.value ?? "—"}</Text>
        </View>
      ))}
    </View>
  )
}

  infoBox: {
    backgroundColor:  "#f7fafc",
    borderRadius:     8,
    padding:          12,
    borderWidth:      1,
    borderColor:      "#e2e8f0",
  },
  infoText:         { fontSize: 12, color: "#718096", lineHeight: 18 },
  sensorCard: {
    backgroundColor:  "#f7fafc",
    borderRadius:     10,
    padding:          14,
    gap:              8,
    borderWidth:      1,
    borderColor:      "#e2e8f0",
  },
  sensorTitle:      { fontSize: 13, fontWeight: "600", color: "#2d3748", marginBottom: 4 },
  sensorRow: {
    flexDirection:    "row",
    justifyContent:   "space-between",
    alignItems:       "center",
  },
  sensorLabel:      { fontSize: 12, color: "#718096" },
  sensorValue:      { fontSize: 13, fontWeight: "500", color: "#2d3748" },
})

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\LoginScreen.js
============================================================
import React, { useState, useRef } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, TextInput, TouchableOpacity,
  StyleSheet, ScrollView, Animated,
  KeyboardAvoidingView, Platform, ActivityIndicator,
} from "react-native";
import { useAuth } from "../context/AuthContext";

export default function LoginScreen() {
  const { login }               = useAuth()
  const [email,     setEmail]   = useState("")
  const [password,  setPassword]= useState("")
  const [showPass,  setShowPass]= useState(false)
  const [loading,   setLoading] = useState(false)
  const [error,     setError]   = useState(null)

  const shakeAnim   = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current
  const fadeAnim    = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current
  const passwordRef = useRef(null)

  React.useEffect(() => {
    Animated.timing(fadeAnim, {
      toValue:         1,
      duration:        700,
      useNativeDriver: true,
    }).start()
  }, [])

  const _shake = () => {
    Animated.sequence([
      Animated.timing(shakeAnim, { toValue:  10, duration: 60, useNativeDriver: true }),
      Animated.timing(shakeAnim, { toValue: -10, duration: 60, useNativeDriver: true }),
      Animated.timing(shakeAnim, { toValue:  8,  duration: 60, useNativeDriver: true }),
      Animated.timing(shakeAnim, { toValue: -8,  duration: 60, useNativeDriver: true }),
      Animated.timing(shakeAnim, { toValue:  0,  duration: 60, useNativeDriver: true }),
    ]).start()
  }

  const _handleLogin = async () => {
    if (!email.trim() || !password) {
      setError("Please enter your email and password")
      _shake()
      return
    }

    const emailRegex = /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/
    if (!emailRegex.test(email.trim())) {
      setError("Please enter a valid email address")
      _shake()
      return
    }

    setLoading(true)
    setError(null)

    try {
      await login(email.trim(), password)
      // AuthContext updates isAuthenticated → AppNavigator switches to TabNavigator
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message || "Invalid email or password")
      _shake()
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }

  return (
    <KeyboardAvoidingView
      style     = {styles.flex}
      behavior  = {Platform.OS === "ios" ? "padding" : "height"}
    >
      <ScrollView
        contentContainerStyle = {styles.container}
        keyboardShouldPersistTaps = "handled"
      >
        <Animated.View style={[styles.content, { opacity: fadeAnim }]}>

          {/* Header */}
          <View style={styles.header}>
            <View style={styles.iconWrap}>
              <Text style={styles.icon}>🧠</Text>
            </View>
            <Text style={styles.title}>CareMind</Text>
            <Text style={styles.subtitle}>
              IoT Mental Health Monitoring
            </Text>
          </View>

          {/* Form */}
          <Animated.View
            style={[
              styles.form,
              { transform: [{ translateX: shakeAnim }] }
            ]}
          >
            {/* Error banner */}
            {error && (
              <View style={styles.errorBanner}>
                <Text style={styles.errorText}>⚠️ {error}</Text>
              </View>
            )}

            {/* Email */}
            <View style={styles.fieldGroup}>
              <Text style={styles.label}>Email</Text>
              <TextInput
                style              = {styles.input}
                value              = {email}
                onChangeText       = {(t) => { setEmail(t); setError(null) }}
                placeholder        = "you@example.com"
                placeholderTextColor = "#a0aec0"
                keyboardType       = "email-address"
                autoCapitalize     = "none"
                autoCorrect        = {false}
                returnKeyType      = "next"
                onSubmitEditing    = {() => passwordRef.current?.focus()}
              />
            </View>

            {/* Password */}
            <View style={styles.fieldGroup}>
              <Text style={styles.label}>Password</Text>
              <View style={styles.passwordWrap}>
                <TextInput
                  ref                = {passwordRef}
                  style              = {styles.passwordInput}
                  value              = {password}
                  onChangeText       = {(t) => { setPassword(t); setError(null) }}
                  placeholder        = "••••••••"
                  placeholderTextColor = "#a0aec0"
                  secureTextEntry    = {!showPass}
                  returnKeyType      = "done"
                  onSubmitEditing    = {_handleLogin}
                />
                <TouchableOpacity
                  onPress = {() => setShowPass((p) => !p)}
                  style   = {styles.eyeBtn}
                >
                  <Text style={styles.eyeText}>
                    {showPass ? "🙈" : "👁️"}
                  </Text>
                </TouchableOpacity>
              </View>
            </View>

            {/* Submit */}
            <TouchableOpacity
              style     = {[styles.loginBtn, loading && styles.loginBtnDisabled]}
              onPress   = {_handleLogin}
              disabled  = {loading}
              activeOpacity = {0.8}
            >
              {loading ? (
                <ActivityIndicator color="#ffffff" size="small" />
              ) : (
                <Text style={styles.loginBtnText}>Sign In</Text>
              )}
            </TouchableOpacity>

          </Animated.View>

          {/* Privacy note */}
          <View style={styles.privacyBox}>
            <Text style={styles.privacyTitle}>🔒 Privacy First</Text>
            <Text style={styles.privacyText}>
              All sensor data is processed on your device.
              Only risk scores are synced to the server — never raw data.
            </Text>
          </View>

        </Animated.View>

        {/* Footer */}
        <Text style={styles.footer}>
          CareMind v1.0.0 · Research Prototype · Not a clinical tool
        </Text>
      </ScrollView>
    </KeyboardAvoidingView>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  flex:         { flex: 1, backgroundColor: "#f7fafc" },
  container:    { flexGrow: 1, justifyContent: "center", padding: 24 },
  content:      { gap: 24 },
  header:       { alignItems: "center", gap: 8 },
  iconWrap: {
    width:           80,
    height:          80,
    borderRadius:    40,
    backgroundColor: "#ebf4ff",
    alignItems:      "center",
    justifyContent:  "center",
    marginBottom:    4,
    shadowColor:     "#4c51bf",
    shadowOpacity:   0.12,
    shadowRadius:    16,
    elevation:       4,
  },
  icon:         { fontSize: 40 },
  title: {
    fontSize:     28,
    fontWeight:   "800",
    color:        "#1a202c",
    letterSpacing: -0.5,
  },
  subtitle:     { fontSize: 14, color: "#718096" },
  form: {
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderRadius:    16,
    padding:         24,
    gap:             18,
    shadowColor:     "#000",
    shadowOpacity:   0.06,
    shadowRadius:    12,
    elevation:       3,
  },
  errorBanner: {
    backgroundColor: "#fff5f5",
    borderRadius:    8,
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     "#fc8181",
    padding:         12,
  },
  errorText:    { fontSize: 13, color: "#c53030", fontWeight: "500" },
  fieldGroup:   { gap: 6 },
  label:        { fontSize: 13, fontWeight: "600", color: "#4a5568" },
  input: {
    borderWidth:   1,
    borderColor:   "#e2e8f0",
    borderRadius:  10,
    padding:       12,
    fontSize:      15,
    color:         "#2d3748",
    backgroundColor: "#f7fafc",
  },
  passwordWrap: {

    borderWidth:    1,
    borderColor:    "#e2e8f0",
    borderRadius:   10,
    backgroundColor: "#f7fafc",
  },
  passwordInput: {
    flex:      1,
    padding:   12,
    fontSize:  15,
    color:     "#2d3748",
  },

  eyeText:      { fontSize: 16 },

    backgroundColor: "#4c51bf",
    borderRadius:    10,

    marginTop:       4,
  },

  privacyBox: {
    backgroundColor: "#f0fff4",
    borderRadius:    12,
    padding:         14,
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     "#9ae6b4",
    gap:             4,
  },
  privacyTitle: { fontSize: 13, fontWeight: "600", color: "#276749" },

    textAlign:   "center",

    color:       "#a0aec0",

  },

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\PHQScreen.js
============================================================
import React, { useState, useRef } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity, Animated, ActivityIndicator,
} from "react-native";
import usePhqHistory from "../hooks/usePhqHistory";
import {
  PHQ_QUESTIONS,
  PHQ_OPTIONS,
  PHQ_FOOTER_NOTE,
  PHQ_SEVERITY_RANGES,
} from "../constants/phqQuestions";
import { PHQ_COLORS } from "../constants/thresholds";

export default function PHQScreen() {
  const {
    history, latestPhq, isDue,
    submitting, loading,
    submitMsg, chartData,
    averageScore, latestSeverityColor,
    submitPhq, refetch,
  } = usePhqHistory()

  const [answers,     setAnswers]     = useState({})
  const [showForm,    setShowForm]    = useState(false)
  const [currentQ,    setCurrentQ]    = useState(0)
  const slideAnim     = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current

  const _setAnswer = (questionId, value) => {
    setAnswers((prev) => ({ ...prev, [questionId]: value }))
  }

  const _nextQuestion = () => {
    if (currentQ < PHQ_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      Animated.sequence([
        Animated.timing(slideAnim, {
          toValue: -30, duration: 150, useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
        Animated.timing(slideAnim, {
          toValue: 0, duration: 150, useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
      ]).start()
      setCurrentQ((q) => q + 1)
    }
  }

  const _prevQuestion = () => {
    if (currentQ > 0) {
      setCurrentQ((q) => q - 1)
    }
  }

  const _handleSubmit = async () => {
    const totalScore = PHQ_QUESTIONS.reduce(
      (sum, q) => sum + (answers[q.id] || 0), 0
    )
    const result = await submitPhq(totalScore)
    if (result) {
      setShowForm(false)
      setAnswers({})
      setCurrentQ(0)
      refetch()
    }
  }

  const allAnswered = PHQ_QUESTIONS.every((q) => answers[q.id] !== undefined)
  const currentScore = PHQ_QUESTIONS.reduce(
    (sum, q) => sum + (answers[q.id] || 0), 0
  )

  const question = PHQ_QUESTIONS[currentQ]

  return (
    <ScrollView
      style = {styles.container}
      showsVerticalScrollIndicator = {false}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <View style={styles.header}>
        <Text style={styles.headerTitle}>📋 PHQ-9 Questionnaire</Text>
        <Text style={styles.headerSub}>
          Weekly mental health self-assessment
        </Text>
      </View>

      {/* Latest result */}
      {latestPhq && (
        <View style={[styles.latestCard, {
          borderLeftColor: latestSeverityColor,
        }]}>
          <View style={styles.latestLeft}>
            <Text style={styles.latestLabel}>Last Score</Text>
            <Text style={[styles.latestScore, { color: latestSeverityColor }]}>
              {latestPhq.score} / 27
            </Text>
            <Text style={[styles.latestSeverity, { color: latestSeverityColor }]}>
              {latestPhq.severity}
            </Text>
          </View>
          <View style={styles.latestRight}>
            <Text style={styles.latestDate}>
              {new Date(latestPhq.submitted_at).toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
                day: "numeric", month: "short", year: "numeric"
              })}
            </Text>
            {isDue ? (
              <View style={styles.dueBadge}>
                <Text style={styles.dueText}>Due Now</Text>
              </View>
            ) : (
              <Text style={styles.nextDue}>Next due in 7 days</Text>
            )}
          </View>
        </View>
      )}

      {/* Take PHQ-9 button */}
      {!showForm ? (
        <TouchableOpacity
          style       = {[styles.startBtn, isDue && styles.startBtnUrgent]}
          onPress     = {() => setShowForm(true)}
          activeOpacity = {0.8}
        >
          <Text style={styles.startBtnText}>
            {isDue ? "📋 Take PHQ-9 Now (Due)" : "📋 Take PHQ-9"}
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      ) : (
        /* ── PHQ-9 Form ── */
        <View style={styles.formCard}>

          {/* Progress */}
          <View style={styles.progressRow}>
            <Text style={styles.progressText}>
              Question {currentQ + 1} of {PHQ_QUESTIONS.length}
            </Text>
            <Text style={styles.progressScore}>
              Score so far: {currentScore}
            </Text>
          </View>
          <View style={styles.progressBar}>
            <View style={[styles.progressFill, {
              width: `${((currentQ + 1) / PHQ_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%`
            }]} />
          </View>

          {/* Instruction */}
          {currentQ === 0 && (
            <Text style={styles.instruction}>{PHQ_FOOTER_NOTE}</Text>
          )}

          {/* Question */}
          <Animated.View style={[
            styles.questionWrap,
            { transform: [{ translateX: slideAnim }] },
          ]}>
            <Text style={styles.questionNumber}>Q{question.id}</Text>
            <Text style={styles.questionText}>{question.text}</Text>
            {question.hint && (
              <Text style={styles.questionHint}>{question.hint}</Text>
            )}

            {/* Sensitive question warning */}
            {question.isSensitive && (
              <View style={styles.sensitiveWarn}>
                <Text style={styles.sensitiveText}>
                  🔒 Your response is private and confidential
                </Text>
              </View>
            )}

            {/* Options */}
            <View style={styles.optionsWrap}>
              {PHQ_OPTIONS.map((opt) => (
                <TouchableOpacity
                  key       = {opt.value}
                  style     = {[
                    styles.option,
                    answers[question.id] === opt.value && styles.optionSelected,
                  ]}
                  onPress   = {() => _setAnswer(question.id, opt.value)}
                  activeOpacity = {0.7}
                >
                  <View style={[
                    styles.optionRadio,
                    answers[question.id] === opt.value && styles.optionRadioSelected,
                  ]}>
                    {answers[question.id] === opt.value && (
                      <View style={styles.optionRadioDot} />
                    )}
                  </View>
                  <View style={styles.optionLabelWrap}>
                    <Text style={[
                      styles.optionLabel,
                      answers[question.id] === opt.value && styles.optionLabelSelected,
                    ]}>
                      {opt.label}
                    </Text>
                    <Text style={styles.optionValue}>({opt.value} pts)</Text>
                  </View>
                </TouchableOpacity>
              ))}
            </View>
          </Animated.View>

          {/* Navigation */}
          <View style={styles.navBtnRow}>
            <TouchableOpacity
              style     = {[styles.navBtn, currentQ === 0 && styles.navBtnDisabled]}
              onPress   = {_prevQuestion}
              disabled  = {currentQ === 0}
              activeOpacity = {0.7}
            >
              <Text style={styles.navBtnText}>← Back</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>

            {currentQ < PHQ_QUESTIONS.length - 1 ? (
              <TouchableOpacity
                style     = {[
                  styles.navBtnPrimary,
                  answers[question.id] === undefined && styles.navBtnDisabled,
                ]}
                onPress   = {_nextQuestion}
                disabled  = {answers[question.id] === undefined}
                activeOpacity = {0.8}
              >
                <Text style={styles.navBtnPrimaryText}>Next →</Text>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            ) : (
              <TouchableOpacity
                style     = {[
                  styles.submitBtn,
                  (!allAnswered || submitting) && styles.navBtnDisabled,
                ]}
                onPress   = {_handleSubmit}
                disabled  = {!allAnswered || submitting}
                activeOpacity = {0.8}
              >
                {submitting ? (
                  <ActivityIndicator color="#fff" size="small" />
                ) : (
                  <Text style={styles.submitBtnText}>Submit PHQ-9 ✓</Text>
                )}
              </TouchableOpacity>
            )}
          </View>

          {/* Cancel */}
          <TouchableOpacity
            onPress = {() => { setShowForm(false); setAnswers({}); setCurrentQ(0) }}
            style   = {styles.cancelBtn}
          >
            <Text style={styles.cancelText}>Cancel</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        </View>
      )}

      {/* Submit message */}
      {submitMsg && (
        <View style={[styles.submitMsg, {
          backgroundColor: submitMsg.type === "success" ? "#f0fff4" : "#fff5f5",
          borderColor:     submitMsg.type === "success" ? "#9ae6b4" : "#fc8181",
        }]}>
          <Text style={{
            color:    submitMsg.type === "success" ? "#276749" : "#c53030",
            fontSize: 13,
            fontWeight: "500",
          }}>
            {submitMsg.text}
          </Text>
        </View>
      )}

      {/* Severity scale reference */}
      <View style={styles.scaleCard}>
        <Text style={styles.scaleTitle}>PHQ-9 Severity Scale</Text>
        {PHQ_SEVERITY_RANGES.map((range) => (
          <View key={range.label} style={styles.scaleRow}>
            <View style={[styles.scaleDot, { backgroundColor: range.color }]} />
            <Text style={styles.scaleRange}>{range.min}–{range.max}</Text>
            <Text style={styles.scaleLabel}>{range.label}</Text>
            <Text style={styles.scaleAction} numberOfLines={1}>
              {range.action}
            </Text>
          </View>
        ))}
      </View>

      {/* History */}
      {history.length > 0 && (
        <View style={styles.historyCard}>
          <Text style={styles.historyTitle}>
            Submission History ({history.length})
          </Text>
          {history.slice(0, 6).map((entry, idx) => (
            <View key={idx} style={styles.historyRow}>
              <Text style={styles.historyDate}>
                {new Date(entry.submitted_at).toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
                  day: "numeric", month: "short"
                })}
              </Text>
              <View style={styles.historyBarWrap}>
                <View style={[styles.historyBar, {
                  width:           `${(entry.score / 27) * 100}%`,
                  backgroundColor: PHQ_COLORS[entry.severity] || "#718096",
                }]} />
              </View>
              <Text style={[styles.historyScore, {
                color: PHQ_COLORS[entry.severity] || "#718096"
              }]}>
                {entry.score}
              </Text>
            </View>
          ))}
        </View>
      )}

      <View style={{ height: 32 }} />
    </ScrollView>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:       { flex: 1, backgroundColor: "#f7fafc" },
  header: {
    padding:         16,
    paddingTop:      52,
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "#e2e8f0",
    marginBottom:    8,
  },
  headerTitle:     { fontSize: 20, fontWeight: "700", color: "#1a202c" },
  headerSub:       { fontSize: 13, color: "#718096", marginTop: 2 },
  latestCard: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    justifyContent:  "space-between",
    marginHorizontal: 16,
    marginBottom:    8,

  formCard: {

  },

  questionWrap:    { gap: 12 },
  questionNumber:  { fontSize: 11, color: "#a0aec0", fontWeight: "600" },
  questionText:    { fontSize: 16, color: "#1a202c", fontWeight: "600", lineHeight: 24 },
  questionHint:    { fontSize: 12, color: "#a0aec0", lineHeight: 16 },
  sensitiveWarn: {
    backgroundColor: "#fffaf0",
    borderRadius:    8,
    padding:         10,

  },

    borderColor:     "#e2e8f0",
    alignItems:      "center",
    justifyContent:  "center",
  },
  optionRadioSelected: { borderColor: "#4c51bf" },
  optionRadioDot: {
    width:           10,
    height:          10,
    borderRadius:    5,
    backgroundColor: "#4c51bf",
  },
  optionLabelWrap: { flex: 1, flexDirection: "row", justifyContent: "space-between" },

  optionValue:     { fontSize: 12, color: "#a0aec0" },
  navBtnRow: {

    alignItems:      "center",
    backgroundColor: "#f7fafc",

})

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\RiskHistoryScreen.js
============================================================
import React, { useState } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity, RefreshControl,
} from "react-native";
import useRiskScores   from "../hooks/useRiskScores";
import {
  RISK_COLORS,
  RISK_BG_COLORS,
  getRiskLevel,
} from "../constants/thresholds";
import { formatDateTime, formatShortDate } from "../utils/dateUtils";

export default function RiskHistoryScreen() {
  const {
    latestScore, scoreHistory,
    weeklyTrend, weeklyChartData,
    phqCorrelation, trend,
    riskLevel, riskColor, scorePct,
    highRiskDays, loading,
    refetch,
  } = useRiskScores()

  const [refreshing, setRefreshing] = useState(false)
  const [activeTab,  setActiveTab]  = useState("daily")

  const _onRefresh = async () => {
    setRefreshing(true)
    await refetch()
    setRefreshing(false)
  }

  return (
    <ScrollView
      style          = {styles.container}
      refreshControl = {<RefreshControl refreshing={refreshing} onRefresh={_onRefresh} />}
      showsVerticalScrollIndicator = {false}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <View style={styles.header}>
        <Text style={styles.headerTitle}>📈 Risk History</Text>
        <Text style={styles.headerSub}>Last 30 days of behavioral monitoring</Text>
      </View>

      {/* Summary cards */}
      <View style={styles.summaryRow}>
        <SummaryCard
          label = "Latest"
          value = {scorePct}
          color = {riskColor}
        />
        <SummaryCard
          label = "7-Day Trend"
          value = {trend || "—"}
          color = {
            trend === "worsening" ? "#c53030" :
            trend === "improving" ? "#38a169" : "#718096"
          }
        />
        <SummaryCard
          label = "High Risk Days"
          value = {String(highRiskDays)}
          color = {highRiskDays > 0 ? "#c53030" : "#38a169"}
        />
        <SummaryCard
          label = "Readings"
          value = {String(scoreHistory.length)}
          color = "#4c51bf"
        />
      </View>

      {/* Tab selector */}
      <View style={styles.tabRow}>
        {["daily", "weekly", "phq"].map((tab) => (
          <TouchableOpacity
            key     = {tab}
            style   = {[styles.tab, activeTab === tab && styles.tabActive]}
            onPress = {() => setActiveTab(tab)}
          >
            <Text style={[
              styles.tabText,
              activeTab === tab && styles.tabTextActive,
            ]}>
              {tab === "daily"  ? "Daily"   :
               tab === "weekly" ? "Weekly"  : "PHQ-9"}
            </Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        ))}
      </View>

      {/* Daily scores */}
      {activeTab === "daily" && (
        <View style={styles.section}>
          {loading ? (
            <Text style={styles.muted}>Loading...</Text>
          ) : scoreHistory.length === 0 ? (
            <Text style={styles.muted}>No risk scores recorded yet</Text>
          ) : (
            scoreHistory.map((item, idx) => (
              <ScoreRow key={idx} item={item} />
            ))
          )}
        </View>
      )}

      {/* Weekly averages */}
      {activeTab === "weekly" && (
        <View style={styles.section}>
          {weeklyTrend.length === 0 ? (
            <Text style={styles.muted}>Not enough data for weekly trends</Text>
          ) : (
            weeklyTrend.map((w, idx) => (
              <WeekRow key={idx} week={w} />
            ))
          )}
        </View>
      )}

      {/* PHQ correlation */}
      {activeTab === "phq" && (
        <View style={styles.section}>
          {phqCorrelation.length === 0 ? (
            <Text style={styles.muted}>
              No PHQ-9 data yet. Complete your weekly questionnaire to see correlation.
            </Text>
          ) : (
            phqCorrelation.map((entry, idx) => (
              <PHQCorrelationRow key={idx} entry={entry} />
            ))
          )}
        </View>
      )}

      <View style={{ height: 32 }} />
    </ScrollView>
  )
}

function SummaryCard({ label, value, color }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.summaryCard}>
      <Text style={styles.summaryLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <Text style={[styles.summaryValue, { color }]}>{value}</Text>
    </View>
  )
}

function ScoreRow({ item }) {
  const level = getRiskLevel(item.score)
  const color = RISK_COLORS[level]
  const bg    = RISK_BG_COLORS[level]

  return (
    <View style={styles.scoreRow}>
      <View style={[styles.severityBadge, { backgroundColor: bg }]}>
        <Text style={[styles.severityBadgeText, { color }]}>
          {level.toUpperCase()}
        </Text>
      </View>
      <View style={styles.scoreRowCenter}>
        <Text style={styles.scoreRowDate}>
          {formatDateTime(item.timestamp)}
        </Text>
        {item.feature_quality != null && (
          <Text style={styles.scoreRowQuality}>
            Quality: {item.feature_quality}%
          </Text>
        )}
      </View>
      <Text style={[styles.scoreRowPct, { color }]}>
        {(item.score * 100).toFixed(0)}%
      </Text>
    </View>
  )
}

function WeekRow({ week }) {
  const level = getRiskLevel(week.avg_score)
  const color = RISK_COLORS[level]

  return (
    <View style={styles.weekRow}>
      <Text style={styles.weekDate}>
        {formatShortDate(week.week_start)} – {formatShortDate(week.week_end)}
      </Text>
      <View style={styles.weekBarWrap}>
        <View style={[
          styles.weekBar,
          {
            width:           `${(week.avg_score || 0) * 100}%`,
            backgroundColor: color,
          }
        ]} />
      </View>
      <Text style={[styles.weekPct, { color }]}>
        {week.avg_score != null
          ? `${(week.avg_score * 100).toFixed(0)}%`
          : "—"}
      </Text>
    </View>
  )
}

function PHQCorrelationRow({ entry }) {
  const riskColor = RISK_COLORS[getRiskLevel(entry.avg_risk_score)]

  return (
    <View style={styles.phqRow}>
      <Text style={styles.phqDate}>{entry.date}</Text>
      <View style={styles.phqScores}>
        <View style={styles.phqScoreItem}>
          <Text style={styles.phqScoreLabel}>PHQ-9</Text>
          <Text style={[styles.phqScoreValue, { color: "#4c51bf" }]}>
            {entry.phq_score}
          </Text>
        </View>
        <Text style={styles.phqDivider}>|</Text>
        <View style={styles.phqScoreItem}>
          <Text style={styles.phqScoreLabel}>Risk</Text>
          <Text style={[styles.phqScoreValue, { color: riskColor }]}>
            {entry.avg_risk_score != null
              ? `${(entry.avg_risk_score * 100).toFixed(0)}%`
              : "—"}
          </Text>
        </View>
        <View style={[styles.severityBadge, {
          backgroundColor: RISK_BG_COLORS[getRiskLevel(entry.avg_risk_score)],
          marginLeft: 8,
        }]}>
          <Text style={styles.phqSeverity}>{entry.phq_severity}</Text>
        </View>
      </View>
    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:       { flex: 1, backgroundColor: "#f7fafc" },
  header: {
    padding:         16,
    paddingTop:      52,
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "#e2e8f0",
  },
  headerTitle:     { fontSize: 20, fontWeight: "700", color: "#1a202c" },
  headerSub:       { fontSize: 13, color: "#718096", marginTop: 2 },
  summaryRow: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    padding:         12,
    gap:             8,
  },
  summaryCard: {
    flex:            1,
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderRadius:    10,
    padding:         12,
    alignItems:      "center",
    shadowColor:     "#000",
    shadowOpacity:   0.04,
    elevation:       1,
    gap:             4,
  },
  summaryLabel:    { fontSize: 10, color: "#a0aec0", textTransform: "uppercase" },
  summaryValue:    { fontSize: 18, fontWeight: "700" },
  tabRow: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    marginHorizontal: 16,
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderRadius:    10,
    padding:         4,
    marginBottom:    8,
    shadowColor:     "#000",

    elevation:       1,
  },
  tab: {
    flex:            1,

  },
  tabActive:       { backgroundColor: "#4c51bf" },
  tabText:         { fontSize: 13, color: "#718096", fontWeight: "500" },
  tabTextActive:   { color: "#ffffff", fontWeight: "600" },
  section: {
    marginHorizontal: 16,
