FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\SettingsScreen.js
============================================================
import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, ScrollView,
  TouchableOpacity, Switch, Alert, TextInput,
  ActivityIndicator,
} from "react-native";
import { useNavigation }  from "@react-navigation/native";
import { useAuth }        from "../context/AuthContext";
import { useMonitoring as useMonitoringCtx }
  from "../context/MonitoringContext";
import UserStore          from "../storage/UserStore";
import SensorStore        from "../storage/SensorStore";
import RiskScoreStore     from "../storage/RiskScoreStore";
import { checkAllPermissions, requestAllPermissions }
  from "../utils/permissions";
import {
  cancelAllNotifications,
  scheduleDailyCheckIn,
} from "../background/NotificationHandler";
import { APP_NAME, APP_VERSION } from "../constants/config";

export default function SettingsScreen() {
  const navigation = useNavigation()
  const { user, logout }              = useAuth()
  const { settings, saveSettings }    = useMonitoringCtx()

  const [permissions,   setPermissions]   = useState({})
  const [sensorCount,   setSensorCount]   = useState(0)
  const [saving,        setSaving]        = useState(false)
  const [saved,         setSaved]         = useState(false)
  const [checkInHour,   setCheckInHour]   = useState("9")
  const [localSettings, setLocalSettings] = useState({ ...settings })

  useEffect(() => {
    _loadData()
  }, [])

  const _loadData = async () => {
    const [perms, count, userSettings] = await Promise.all([
      checkAllPermissions(),
      SensorStore.countToday("accelerometer"),
      UserStore.getSettings(),
    ])
    setPermissions(perms)
    setSensorCount(count)
    if (userSettings?.checkInHour) {
      setCheckInHour(String(userSettings.checkInHour))
    }
  }

  const _toggleSetting = (key, value) => {
    setLocalSettings((prev) => ({ ...prev, [key]: value }))
  }

  const _saveSettings = async () => {
    setSaving(true)
    try {
      await saveSettings(localSettings)
      await UserStore.saveSettings({
        ...localSettings,
        checkInHour: parseInt(checkInHour) || 9,
      })
      await scheduleDailyCheckIn(parseInt(checkInHour) || 9, 0)
      setSaved(true)
      setTimeout(() => setSaved(false), 2500)
    } catch (err) {
      Alert.alert("Error", "Failed to save settings")
    } finally {
      setSaving(false)
    }
  }

  const _requestPermissions = async () => {
    const results = await requestAllPermissions()
    setPermissions({
      location:      results.location.foreground,
      notifications: results.notifications,
    })
    Alert.alert("Permissions", "Permission request completed. Check results above.")
  }

  const _clearLocalData = () => {
    Alert.alert(
      "Clear Local Data",
      "This will permanently delete all locally stored sensor readings, risk scores, and PHQ-9 history from this device. Backend data will not be affected.",
      [
        { text: "Cancel", style: "cancel" },
        {
          text:    "Clear All",
          style:   "destructive",
          onPress: async () => {
            await Promise.all([
              SensorStore.clearAll(),
              RiskScoreStore.clearAll(),
              UserStore.clearAll(),
              cancelAllNotifications(),
            ])
            setSensorCount(0)
            Alert.alert("Done", "All local data cleared.")
          },
        },
      ]
    )
  }

  const _handleLogout = () => {
    Alert.alert(
      "Sign Out",
      "Are you sure you want to sign out?",
      [
        { text: "Cancel", style: "cancel" },
        { text: "Sign Out", style: "destructive", onPress: logout },
      ]
    )
  }

  return (
    <ScrollView
      style = {styles.container}
      showsVerticalScrollIndicator = {false}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <View style={styles.header}>
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={() => navigation.goBack()}>
          <Text style={styles.backText}>← Back</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
        <Text style={styles.headerTitle}>⚙️ Settings</Text>
      </View>

      {/* Account */}
      <Section title="Account">
        <InfoRow label="User ID"  value={user?.id?.slice(0, 16) + "..." || "—"} />
        <InfoRow label="Role"     value={user?.role || "patient"} />
        <InfoRow label="App"      value={`${APP_NAME} v${APP_VERSION}`} />
        <TouchableOpacity onPress={_handleLogout} style={styles.dangerBtn}>
          <Text style={styles.dangerBtnText}>Sign Out</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      </Section>

      {/* Sensors */}
      <Section title="Active Sensors">
        <ToggleRow
          label    = "GPS Location"
          sub      = "Radius of gyration, home stay, entropy"
          value    = {localSettings.gpsEnabled ?? true}
          onToggle = {(v) => _toggleSetting("gpsEnabled", v)}
        />
        <ToggleRow
          label    = "Accelerometer"
          sub      = "Step count, sedentary bouts, activity"
          value    = {localSettings.accelEnabled ?? true}
          onToggle = {(v) => _toggleSetting("accelEnabled", v)}
        />
        <ToggleRow
          label    = "Step Counter"
          sub      = "Accurate step count via hardware pedometer"
          value    = {localSettings.stepEnabled ?? true}
          onToggle = {(v) => _toggleSetting("stepEnabled", v)}
        />
        <ToggleRow
          label    = "Screen Events"
          sub      = "Unlock count, session duration, sleep proxy"
          value    = {localSettings.screenEnabled ?? true}
          onToggle = {(v) => _toggleSetting("screenEnabled", v)}
        />
        <ToggleRow
          label    = "Battery Monitor"
          sub      = "Night charging pattern, sleep routine proxy"
          value    = {localSettings.batteryEnabled ?? true}
          onToggle = {(v) => _toggleSetting("batteryEnabled", v)}
        />
      </Section>

      {/* Notifications */}
      <Section title="Notifications">
        <View style={styles.inputRow}>
          <View style={styles.inputLeft}>
            <Text style={styles.inputLabel}>Daily check-in time</Text>
            <Text style={styles.inputSub}>Hour of day (0–23)</Text>
          </View>
          <TextInput
            style        = {styles.textInput}
            value        = {checkInHour}
            onChangeText = {setCheckInHour}
            keyboardType = "numeric"
            maxLength    = {2}
            placeholder  = "9"
          />
        </View>
      </Section>

      {/* Permissions */}
      <Section title="Permissions">
        <PermissionRow
          label   = "Location"
          granted = {permissions.location}
        />
        <PermissionRow
          label   = "Notifications"
          granted = {permissions.notifications}
        />
        <TouchableOpacity
          onPress = {_requestPermissions}
          style   = {styles.secondaryBtn}
        >
          <Text style={styles.secondaryBtnText}>
            Request Missing Permissions
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      </Section>

      {/* Privacy */}
      <Section title="Privacy & Data">
        <InfoRow
          label = "Sensor readings today"
          value = {`${sensorCount} readings`}
        />
        <InfoRow
          label = "Raw data sent to server"
          value = "Never"
          valueColor = "#38a169"
        />
        <InfoRow
          label = "On-device ML inference"
          value = "Always enabled"
          valueColor = "#38a169"
        />
        <InfoRow
          label = "Data retained for"
          value = "14 days locally"
        />
        <TouchableOpacity
          onPress = {_clearLocalData}
          style   = {styles.dangerBtn}
        >
          <Text style={styles.dangerBtnText}>
            Clear All Local Data
          </Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      </Section>

      {/* Save button */}
      <TouchableOpacity
        style     = {[styles.saveBtn, saved && styles.saveBtnSuccess]}
        onPress   = {_saveSettings}
        disabled  = {saving}
        activeOpacity = {0.8}
      >
        {saving ? (
          <ActivityIndicator color="#fff" size="small" />
        ) : (
          <Text style={styles.saveBtnText}>
            {saved ? "✓ Saved!" : "Save Settings"}
          </Text>
        )}
      </TouchableOpacity>

      {/* Disclaimer */}
      <Text style={styles.disclaimer}>
        CareMind is a research prototype and not a clinical diagnostic tool.
        Always consult a qualified mental health professional for medical advice.
      </Text>

      <View style={{ height: 32 }} />
    </ScrollView>
  )
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Sub-components
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function Section({ title, children }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.section}>
      <Text style={styles.sectionTitle}>{title}</Text>
      <View style={styles.sectionBody}>{children}</View>
    </View>
  )
}

function InfoRow({ label, value, valueColor = "#718096" }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.infoRow}>
      <Text style={styles.infoLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <Text style={[styles.infoValue, { color: valueColor }]}>{value}</Text>
    </View>
  )
}

function ToggleRow({ label, sub, value, onToggle }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.toggleRow}>
      <View style={styles.toggleLeft}>
        <Text style={styles.toggleLabel}>{label}</Text>
        <Text style={styles.toggleSub}>{sub}</Text>
      </View>
      <Switch
        value           = {value}
        onValueChange   = {onToggle}
        trackColor      = {{ false: "#e2e8f0", true: "#c3dafe" }}
        thumbColor      = {value ? "#4c51bf" : "#a0aec0"}
      />
    </View>
  )
}

function PermissionRow({ label, granted }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.permRow}>
      <Text style={styles.permLabel}>{label}</Text>
      <View style={[
        styles.permBadge,
        { backgroundColor: granted ? "#f0fff4" : "#fff5f5" }
      ]}>
        <Text style={[
          styles.permStatus,
          { color: granted ? "#38a169" : "#e53e3e" }
        ]}>
          {granted ? "✓ Granted" : "✗ Denied"}
        </Text>
      </View>
    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:       { flex: 1, backgroundColor: "#f7fafc" },
  header: {
    padding:         16,
    paddingTop:      52,
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "#e2e8f0",
    gap:             4,
    marginBottom:    8,
  },
  backText:        { fontSize: 14, color: "#4c51bf", fontWeight: "500", marginBottom: 4 },
  headerTitle:     { fontSize: 20, fontWeight: "700", color: "#1a202c" },
  section:         { marginHorizontal: 16, marginBottom: 8 },
  sectionTitle: {
    fontSize:        11,
    fontWeight:      "600",
    color:           "#a0aec0",
    textTransform:   "uppercase",
    letterSpacing:   0.8,
    marginBottom:    6,
    marginLeft:      4,
  },
  sectionBody: {
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderRadius:    12,
    overflow:        "hidden",
    shadowColor:     "#000",
    shadowOpacity:   0.04,
    elevation:       1,
  },
  infoRow: {

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\SplashScreen.js
============================================================
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet,
  Animated, Easing, StatusBar,
} from "react-native";

/**
 * SplashScreen.js
 *
 * Shown while AuthContext is rehydrating stored token.
 * Typically visible for < 500ms on cold start.
 *
 * Features:
 *   - Animated brain pulse
 *   - Fade-in app name
 *   - Progress dots
 */

export default function SplashScreen() {
  const pulseAnim  = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current
  const fadeAnim   = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current
  const dotAnim1   = useRef(new Animated.Value(0.3)).current
  const dotAnim2   = useRef(new Animated.Value(0.3)).current
  const dotAnim3   = useRef(new Animated.Value(0.3)).current

  useEffect(() => {
    // Fade in
    Animated.timing(fadeAnim, {
      toValue:         1,
      duration:        600,
      useNativeDriver: true,
    }).start()

    // Brain pulse loop
    Animated.loop(
      Animated.sequence([
        Animated.timing(pulseAnim, {
          toValue:         1.15,
          duration:        800,
          easing:          Easing.inOut(Easing.ease),
          useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
        Animated.timing(pulseAnim, {
          toValue:         1.0,
          duration:        800,
          easing:          Easing.inOut(Easing.ease),
          useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
      ])
    ).start()

    // Loading dots animation
    const animateDots = () => {
      Animated.sequence([
        Animated.timing(dotAnim1, {
          toValue:         1,
          duration:        300,
          useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
        Animated.timing(dotAnim2, {
          toValue:         1,
          duration:        300,
          useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
        Animated.timing(dotAnim3, {
          toValue:         1,
          duration:        300,
          useNativeDriver: true,
        }),
        Animated.delay(400),
        Animated.parallel([
          Animated.timing(dotAnim1, {
            toValue:         0.3,
            duration:        200,
            useNativeDriver: true,
          }),
          Animated.timing(dotAnim2, {
            toValue:         0.3,
            duration:        200,
            useNativeDriver: true,
          }),
          Animated.timing(dotAnim3, {
            toValue:         0.3,
            duration:        200,
            useNativeDriver: true,
          }),
        ]),
      ]).start(() => animateDots())
    }

    animateDots()
  }, [])

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <StatusBar barStyle="dark-content" backgroundColor="#f7fafc" />

      <Animated.View style={[styles.content, { opacity: fadeAnim }]}>

        {/* Animated brain icon */}
        <Animated.View
          style={[
            styles.iconWrap,
            { transform: [{ scale: pulseAnim }] },
          ]}
        >
          <Text style={styles.icon}>🧠</Text>
        </Animated.View>

        {/* App name */}
        <Text style={styles.appName}>CareMind</Text>
        <Text style={styles.tagline}>
          IoT Mental Health Monitoring
        </Text>

        {/* Loading dots */}
        <View style={styles.dotsRow}>
          {[dotAnim1, dotAnim2, dotAnim3].map((anim, i) => (
            <Animated.View
              key   = {i}
              style = {[styles.dot, { opacity: anim }]}
            />
          ))}
        </View>

        {/* Loading text */}
        <Text style={styles.loadingText}>
          Initializing...
        </Text>

      </Animated.View>

      {/* Version */}
      <Text style={styles.version}>v1.0.0</Text>
    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    flex:            1,
    backgroundColor: "#f7fafc",
    alignItems:      "center",
    justifyContent:  "center",
  },
  content: {
    alignItems: "center",
    gap:        12,
  },
  iconWrap: {
    width:           96,
    height:          96,
    borderRadius:    48,
    backgroundColor: "#ebf4ff",
    alignItems:      "center",
    justifyContent:  "center",
    marginBottom:    8,
    shadowColor:     "#4c51bf",
    shadowOpacity:   0.15,
    shadowRadius:    20,
    elevation:       6,
  },
  icon: {
    fontSize: 48,
  },
  appName: {
    fontSize:    32,
    fontWeight:  "800",
    color:       "#1a202c",
    letterSpacing: -0.5,
  },
  tagline: {
    fontSize:   14,
    color:      "#718096",
    fontWeight: "400",
  },
  dotsRow: {
    flexDirection: "row",
    gap:           8,
    marginTop:     24,
  },
  dot: {
    width:           8,
    height:          8,
    borderRadius:    4,
    backgroundColor: "#4c51bf",
  },
  loadingText: {
    fontSize:   12,
    color:      "#a0aec0",
    marginTop:  4,
  },
  version: {
    position: "absolute",
    bottom:   32,
    fontSize: 11,
    color:    "#cbd5e0",
  },
})

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\sensors\useAccelerometer.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
import { Accelerometer } from "expo-sensors";
import SensorStore       from "../storage/SensorStore";
import {
  ACCEL_SAMPLE_RATE_MS,
  ACCEL_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS,
} from "../constants/config";
import {
  mean, std, max, min
} from "../utils/mathUtils";
import { cleanAccelMagnitudes } from "../utils/noiseFilter";

/**
 * useAccelerometer.js
 *
 * Expo-sensors accelerometer hook.
 * Collects raw X/Y/Z samples at 10Hz,
 * batches them every 30 seconds,
 * computes summary statistics and stores to SensorStore.
 *
 * Features derived:
 *   - mean_magnitude   (average movement intensity)
 *   - std_magnitude    (movement variability)
 *   - is_sedentary     (mean_mag < threshold)
 *   - step_proxy       (peak count as step approximation)
 */

const SEDENTARY_THRESHOLD = 0.08;   // g-force delta from 1.0 gravity
const STEP_THRESHOLD      = 0.15;   // magnitude delta for step detection

export default function useAccelerometer(enabled = true) {
  const [isActive,      setIsActive]      = useState(false);
  const [lastReading,   setLastReading]   = useState(null);
  const [todaySummary,  setTodaySummary]  = useState(null);
  const [error,         setError]         = useState(null);

  const subscriptionRef  = useRef(null);
  const bufferRef        = useRef([]);
  const flushTimerRef    = useRef(null);
  const stepCountRef     = useRef(0);
  const lastMagnitudeRef = useRef(1.0);

  const _onSample = useCallback(({ x, y, z }) => {
    const magnitude = Math.sqrt(x * x + y * y + z * z);

    // Step detection via magnitude delta
    const delta = Math.abs(magnitude - lastMagnitudeRef.current);
    if (delta > STEP_THRESHOLD) stepCountRef.current += 1;
    lastMagnitudeRef.current = magnitude;

    bufferRef.current.push({ x, y, z, magnitude });
    setLastReading({ x, y, z, magnitude });
  }, []);

  const _flush = useCallback(async () => {
    const batch = [...bufferRef.current];
    bufferRef.current = [];

    if (!batch.length) return;

    const magnitudes = batch.map((s) => s.magnitude);
    const cleaned    = cleanAccelMagnitudes(magnitudes);

    // Remove gravity (≈1.0g) to get movement component
    const movement   = cleaned.map((m) => Math.abs(m - 1.0));
    const meanMag    = mean(movement);
    const isSedentary = meanMag < SEDENTARY_THRESHOLD;

    const summary = {
      mean_magnitude:  parseFloat(meanMag.toFixed(4)),
      std_magnitude:   parseFloat(std(movement).toFixed(4)),
      max_magnitude:   parseFloat(max(movement).toFixed(4)),
      min_magnitude:   parseFloat(min(movement).toFixed(4)),
      is_sedentary:    isSedentary,
      step_proxy:      stepCountRef.current,
      sample_count:    batch.length,
    };

    stepCountRef.current = 0;
    setTodaySummary(summary);

    await SensorStore.append("accelerometer", summary);
  }, []);

  const start = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!enabled || subscriptionRef.current) return;

    try {
      const isAvailable = await Accelerometer.isAvailableAsync();
      if (!isAvailable) {
        setError("Accelerometer not available on this device");
        return;
      }

      Accelerometer.setUpdateInterval(ACCEL_SAMPLE_RATE_MS);
      subscriptionRef.current = Accelerometer.addListener(_onSample);

      // Flush buffer periodically
      flushTimerRef.current = setInterval(_flush, ACCEL_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS);

      setIsActive(true);
      setError(null);
      console.log("[useAccelerometer] Started at 10Hz");
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
      console.error("[useAccelerometer] Start error:", err);
    }
  }, [enabled, _onSample, _flush]);

  const stop = useCallback(async () => {
    if (subscriptionRef.current) {
      subscriptionRef.current.remove();
      subscriptionRef.current = null;
    }
    if (flushTimerRef.current) {
      clearInterval(flushTimerRef.current);
      flushTimerRef.current = null;
    }

    // Final flush
    await _flush();
    setIsActive(false);
    console.log("[useAccelerometer] Stopped");
  }, [_flush]);

  // Auto-start/stop based on enabled flag
  useEffect(() => {
    if (enabled) start();
    else         stop();
    return () => { stop(); };
  }, [enabled]);

  const getDailySummary = useCallback(async (date = new Date()) => {
    const readings = await SensorStore.getByType("accelerometer", date);
    if (!readings.length) return null;

    const allMagnitudes = readings.map((r) => r.mean_magnitude || 0);
    const totalSteps    = readings.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.step_proxy || 0), 0);
    const sedentaryCount = readings.filter((r) => r.is_sedentary).length;

    // Each flush covers ACCEL_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS milliseconds
    const sedentaryMins = (sedentaryCount * ACCEL_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS) / 60000;

    return {
      date:              date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      daily_step_count:  totalSteps,
      sedentary_bouts:   Math.floor(sedentaryMins / 30),
      sedentary_mins:    Math.round(sedentaryMins),
      mean_activity:     parseFloat(mean(allMagnitudes).toFixed(4)),
      reading_count:     readings.length,
    };
  }, []);

  return {
    isActive,
    lastReading,
    todaySummary,
    error,
    start,
    stop,
    getDailySummary,
  };
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\sensors\useAppState.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
import { AppState }  from "react-native";
import SensorStore   from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { isSleepWindow, isNightHour } from "../utils/dateUtils";

/**
 * useAppState.js
 *
 * Tracks app foreground/background transitions via React Native AppState.
 * Used as a proxy for:
 *   - Screen unlock count  (background → active transitions)
 *   - Screen-on duration   (total time in active state)
 *   - Sleep inference      (long background periods at night)
 *   - Social proxy         (frequent short sessions = social engagement)
 *
 * This is the primary screen activity sensor in Expo managed workflow
 * since native screen lock/unlock events require ejecting.
 */

export default function useAppState(enabled = true) {
  const [currentState,   setCurrentState]   = useState(AppState.currentState);
  const [unlockCount,    setUnlockCount]     = useState(0);
  const [totalActiveMs,  setTotalActiveMs]   = useState(0);
  const [sessionCount,   setSessionCount]    = useState(0);
  const [isActive,       setIsActive]        = useState(false);

  const subscriptionRef  = useRef(null);
  const sessionStartRef  = useRef(null);
  const dailyUnlockRef   = useRef(0);
  const dailyActiveMsRef = useRef(0);

  const _onAppStateChange = useCallback(async (nextState) => {
    const prev = currentState;
    setCurrentState(nextState);

    // Background/inactive → active = screen unlock
    if (
      (prev === "background" || prev === "inactive") &&
      nextState === "active"
    ) {
      sessionStartRef.current = Date.now();
      dailyUnlockRef.current += 1;
      setUnlockCount((c) => c + 1);
      setSessionCount((c) => c + 1);

      await SensorStore.append("screen_event", {
        event:       "screen_on",
        hour_of_day: new Date().getHours(),
      });
    }

    // Active → background/inactive = screen off
    if (
      prev === "active" &&
      (nextState === "background" || nextState === "inactive")
    ) {
      if (sessionStartRef.current) {
        const durationMs       = Date.now() - sessionStartRef.current;
        dailyActiveMsRef.current += durationMs;
        sessionStartRef.current  = null;

        setTotalActiveMs((t) => t + durationMs);

        await SensorStore.append("screen_event", {
          event:       "screen_off",
          duration_ms: durationMs,
          hour_of_day: new Date().getHours(),
          is_night:    isNightHour(new Date()),
        });
      }
    }
  }, [currentState]);

  const start = useCallback(() => {
    if (!enabled || subscriptionRef.current) return;

    // Record initial state
    if (AppState.currentState === "active") {
      sessionStartRef.current = Date.now();
    }

    subscriptionRef.current = AppState.addEventListener(
      "change",
      _onAppStateChange
    );

    setIsActive(true);
    console.log("[useAppState] Started tracking screen events");
  }, [enabled, _onAppStateChange]);

  const stop = useCallback(async () => {
    if (subscriptionRef.current) {
      subscriptionRef.current.remove();
      subscriptionRef.current = null;
    }

    // Close open session
    if (sessionStartRef.current) {
      const durationMs = Date.now() - sessionStartRef.current;
      dailyActiveMsRef.current += durationMs;
      sessionStartRef.current   = null;

      await SensorStore.append("screen_event", {
        event:       "screen_off",
        duration_ms: durationMs,
        hour_of_day: new Date().getHours(),
      });
    }

    setIsActive(false);
    console.log("[useAppState] Stopped");
  }, []);

  // Reset daily counters at midnight
  useEffect(() => {
    const now       = new Date();
    const midnight  = new Date();
    midnight.setHours(24, 0, 0, 0);
    const msToMidnight = midnight - now;

    const resetTimer = setTimeout(() => {
      dailyUnlockRef.current   = 0;
      dailyActiveMsRef.current = 0;
      setUnlockCount(0);
      setTotalActiveMs(0);
    }, msToMidnight);

    return () => clearTimeout(resetTimer);
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (enabled) start();
    else         stop();
    return () => { stop(); };
  }, [enabled]);

  const getDailySummary = useCallback(async (date = new Date()) => {
    const events = await SensorStore.getByType("screen_event", date);

    const onEvents  = events.filter((e) => e.event === "screen_on");
    const offEvents = events.filter((e) => e.event === "screen_off");

    const totalOnMs = offEvents.reduce(
      (s, e) => s + (e.duration_ms || 0), 0
    );
    const totalOnMin = totalOnMs / 60000;
    const unlocks    = onEvents.length;

    // Infer sleep: longest consecutive background period during night window
    const nightOffDurations = offEvents
      .filter((e) => e.is_night)
      .map((e) => e.duration_ms || 0);

    const longestNightOffMs = nightOffDurations.length
      ? Math.max(...nightOffDurations)
      : 0;

    const inferredSleepHrs = Math.min(
      longestNightOffMs / 3600000,
      12
    );

    return {
      date:                    date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      screen_unlock_count:     unlocks,
      screen_on_duration_mins: Math.round(totalOnMin),
      avg_session_mins:        unlocks > 0
        ? Math.round(totalOnMin / unlocks)
        : 0,
      inferred_sleep_hrs:      parseFloat(inferredSleepHrs.toFixed(2)),
      night_screen_events:     nightOffDurations.length,
    };
  }, []);

  return {
    isActive,
    currentState,
    unlockCount,
    totalActiveMs,
    sessionCount,
    start,
    stop,
    getDailySummary,
  };
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\sensors\useBattery.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
import * as Battery  from "expo-battery";
import SensorStore   from "../storage/SensorStore";

/**
 * useBattery.js
 *
 * Expo Battery hook.
 * Tracks battery level and charging state over time.
 *
 * Used as a proxy behavioral signal:
 *   - Low battery + not charging at night = phone not plugged in = sleep disruption
 *   - Charging pattern correlates with daily routine consistency
 *   - Sudden battery drops during night = phone usage at odd hours
 *
 * No special permission required — expo-battery works out of the box.
 */

const BATTERY_SYNC_INTERVAL_MS = 15 * 60 * 1000;   // every 15 minutes

export default function useBattery(enabled = true) {
  const [isActive,        setIsActive]        = useState(false);
  const [batteryLevel,    setBatteryLevel]     = useState(null);
  const [batteryState,    setBatteryState]     = useState(null);
  const [isCharging,      setIsCharging]       = useState(false);
  const [error,           setError]            = useState(null);

  const syncTimerRef       = useRef(null);
  const levelSubscription  = useRef(null);
  const stateSubscription  = useRef(null);

  const _readBattery = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const [level, state] = await Promise.all([
        Battery.getBatteryLevelAsync(),
        Battery.getBatteryStateAsync(),
      ]);

      const charging =
        state === Battery.BatteryState.CHARGING ||
        state === Battery.BatteryState.FULL;

      const now = new Date();

      setBatteryLevel(level);
      setBatteryState(state);
      setIsCharging(charging);

      await SensorStore.append("battery", {
        level:       parseFloat((level * 100).toFixed(1)),
        state:       _stateLabel(state),
        is_charging: charging,
        hour_of_day: now.getHours(),
        is_night:    now.getHours() >= 22 || now.getHours() < 6,
      });
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn("[useBattery] Read error:", err.message);
    }
  }, []);

  const _stateLabel = (state) => {
    switch (state) {
      case Battery.BatteryState.CHARGING:    return "charging";
      case Battery.BatteryState.FULL:        return "full";
      case Battery.BatteryState.UNPLUGGED:   return "unplugged";
      default:                               return "unknown";
    }
  };

  const start = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!enabled || syncTimerRef.current) return;

    try {
      // Initial read
      await _readBattery();

      // Subscribe to live level changes
      levelSubscription.current = Battery.addBatteryLevelListener(
        ({ batteryLevel: lvl }) => {
          setBatteryLevel(lvl);
        }
      );

      // Subscribe to state changes (plug/unplug)
      stateSubscription.current = Battery.addBatteryStateListener(
        ({ batteryState: state }) => {
          const charging =
            state === Battery.BatteryState.CHARGING ||
            state === Battery.BatteryState.FULL;
          setBatteryState(state);
          setIsCharging(charging);
        }
      );

      // Periodic sync for consistent logging
      syncTimerRef.current = setInterval(_readBattery, BATTERY_SYNC_INTERVAL_MS);

      setIsActive(true);
      setError(null);
      console.log("[useBattery] Started");
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
      console.error("[useBattery] Start error:", err);
    }
  }, [enabled, _readBattery]);

  const stop = useCallback(() => {
    if (levelSubscription.current) {
      levelSubscription.current.remove();
      levelSubscription.current = null;
    }
    if (stateSubscription.current) {
      stateSubscription.current.remove();
      stateSubscription.current = null;
    }
    if (syncTimerRef.current) {
      clearInterval(syncTimerRef.current);
      syncTimerRef.current = null;
    }

    setIsActive(false);
    console.log("[useBattery] Stopped");
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (enabled) start();
    else         stop();
    return () => { stop(); };
  }, [enabled]);

  const getDailySummary = useCallback(async (date = new Date()) => {
    const readings = await SensorStore.getByType("battery", date);
    if (!readings.length) return null;

    const levels = readings.map((r) => r.level || 0);

    // Night charging = phone plugged in during sleep hours
    const nightReadings    = readings.filter((r) => r.is_night);
    const nightChargingPct = nightReadings.length
      ? (nightReadings.filter((r) => r.is_charging).length / nightReadings.length) * 100
      : 0;

    // Night phone usage proxy = not charging + night reading
    const nightUsageEvents = nightReadings.filter(
      (r) => !r.is_charging && r.level < 80
    ).length;

    return {
      date:               date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      min_battery_level:  Math.min(...levels),
      max_battery_level:  Math.max(...levels),
      night_charging_pct: parseFloat(nightChargingPct.toFixed(1)),
      night_usage_events: nightUsageEvents,
      reading_count:      readings.length,
    };
  }, []);

  return {
    isActive,
    batteryLevel,
    batteryState,
    isCharging,
    error,
    start,
    stop,
    getDailySummary,
  };
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\sensors\useGyroscope.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
import { Gyroscope }   from "expo-sensors";
import SensorStore     from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { mean, std }   from "../utils/mathUtils";

/**
 * useGyroscope.js
 *
 * Expo-sensors gyroscope hook.
 * Measures rotational velocity (rad/s) on X/Y/Z axes.
 *
 * Used as a supplementary movement quality signal:
 *   - High gyroscope variance = restless, agitated movement
 *   - Low gyroscope variance  = sedentary or calm
 *
 * Gyroscope data alone is not a primary depression feature,
 * but combined with accelerometer it improves sedentary
 * bout detection accuracy.
 */

const GYRO_SAMPLE_RATE_MS   = 200;    // 5 Hz — lower rate saves battery
const GYRO_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS = 60000; // flush every 60 seconds
const AGITATION_THRESHOLD    = 0.5;   // rad/s — above this = notable movement

export default function useGyroscope(enabled = true) {
  const [isActive,    setIsActive]    = useState(false);
  const [lastReading, setLastReading] = useState(null);
  const [error,       setError]       = useState(null);

  const subscriptionRef = useRef(null);
  const bufferRef       = useRef([]);
  const flushTimerRef   = useRef(null);

  const _onSample = useCallback(({ x, y, z }) => {
    const rotationalSpeed = Math.sqrt(x * x + y * y + z * z);
    bufferRef.current.push({ x, y, z, rotationalSpeed });
    setLastReading({ x, y, z, rotationalSpeed });
  }, []);

  const _flush = useCallback(async () => {
    const batch = [...bufferRef.current];
    bufferRef.current = [];
    if (!batch.length) return;

    const speeds = batch.map((s) => s.rotationalSpeed);

    const summary = {
      mean_rotation:       parseFloat(mean(speeds).toFixed(4)),
      std_rotation:        parseFloat(std(speeds).toFixed(4)),
      is_agitated:         mean(speeds) > AGITATION_THRESHOLD,
      sample_count:        batch.length,
    };

    await SensorStore.append("gyroscope", summary);
  }, []);

  const start = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!enabled || subscriptionRef.current) return;

    try {
      const isAvailable = await Gyroscope.isAvailableAsync();
      if (!isAvailable) {
        setError("Gyroscope not available on this device");
        return;
      }

      Gyroscope.setUpdateInterval(GYRO_SAMPLE_RATE_MS);
      subscriptionRef.current = Gyroscope.addListener(_onSample);
      flushTimerRef.current   = setInterval(_flush, GYRO_FLUSH_INTERVAL_MS);

      setIsActive(true);
      setError(null);
      console.log("[useGyroscope] Started at 5Hz");
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
      console.error("[useGyroscope] Start error:", err);
    }
  }, [enabled, _onSample, _flush]);

  const stop = useCallback(async () => {
    if (subscriptionRef.current) {
      subscriptionRef.current.remove();
      subscriptionRef.current = null;
    }
    if (flushTimerRef.current) {
      clearInterval(flushTimerRef.current);
      flushTimerRef.current = null;
    }

    await _flush();
    setIsActive(false);
    console.log("[useGyroscope] Stopped");
  }, [_flush]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (enabled) start();
    else         stop();
    return () => { stop(); };
  }, [enabled]);

  const getDailySummary = useCallback(async (date = new Date()) => {
    const readings = await SensorStore.getByType("gyroscope", date);
    if (!readings.length) return null;

    const agitatedCount = readings.filter((r) => r.is_agitated).length;
    const allMeans      = readings.map((r) => r.mean_rotation || 0);

    return {
      date:              date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      mean_rotation:     parseFloat(mean(allMeans).toFixed(4)),
      agitated_periods:  agitatedCount,
      reading_count:     readings.length,
    };
  }, []);

  return {
    isActive,
    lastReading,
    error,
    start,
    stop,
    getDailySummary,
  };
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\sensors\useLocation.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
import * as Location   from "expo-location";
import SensorStore     from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { smoothGpsPoints } from "../utils/noiseFilter";
import {
  GPS_INTERVAL_MS,
  GPS_DISTANCE_M,
} from "../constants/config";
import {
  haversineM, centroid,
  radiusOfGyration, shannonEntropy,
} from "../utils/mathUtils";

/**
 * useLocation.js
 *
 * Expo Location hook for GPS-based behavioral feature extraction.
 * Uses foreground + background location permissions.
 *
 * Features derived:
 *   - radius_of_gyration    (spatial range of movement)
 *   - home_stay_pct         (% time near inferred home location)
 *   - location_entropy      (diversity of visited places)
 *   - num_places_visited    (distinct cluster count)
 *
 * Raw GPS coordinates are NEVER sent to the backend.
 * Only derived scalar features leave the device.
 */

const HOME_RADIUS_M    = 100;
const CLUSTER_RADIUS_M = 50;
const MIN_CLUSTER_PTS  = 3;

export default function useLocation(enabled = true) {
  const [isActive,     setIsActive]     = useState(false);
  const [lastLocation, setLastLocation] = useState(null);
  const [error,        setError]        = useState(null);

  const watcherRef = useRef(null);

  const start = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!enabled || watcherRef.current) return;

    try {
      const { status } = await Location.getForegroundPermissionsAsync();
      if (status !== "granted") {
        setError("Location permission not granted");
        return;
      }

      watcherRef.current = await Location.watchPositionAsync(
        {
          accuracy:           Location.Accuracy.Balanced,
          timeInterval:       GPS_INTERVAL_MS,
          distanceInterval:   GPS_DISTANCE_M,
        },
        async (location) => {
          const { latitude, longitude, accuracy, altitude } = location.coords;

          // Skip low-accuracy readings
          if (accuracy > 150) return;

          const entry = {
            latitude,
            longitude,
            accuracy,
            altitude: altitude || 0,
          };

          setLastLocation(entry);
          await SensorStore.append("gps", entry);
        }
      );

      setIsActive(true);
      setError(null);
      console.log("[useLocation] Started watching position");
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
      console.error("[useLocation] Start error:", err);
    }
  }, [enabled]);

  const stop = useCallback(() => {
    if (watcherRef.current) {
      watcherRef.current.remove();
      watcherRef.current = null;
    }
    setIsActive(false);
    console.log("[useLocation] Stopped");
  }, []);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (enabled) start();
    else         stop();
    return () => { stop(); };
  }, [enabled]);

  // Simple DBSCAN-lite clustering
  const _clusterPlaces = useCallback((points) => {
    const visited  = new Set();
    const clusters = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < points.length; i++) {
      if (visited.has(i)) continue;
      visited.add(i);

      const neighbors = points
        .map((p, j) => ({
          j,
          dist: haversineM(
            points[i].latitude, points[i].longitude,
            p.latitude,         p.longitude
          ),
        }))
        .filter(({ j, dist }) => j !== i && dist <= CLUSTER_RADIUS_M)
        .map(({ j }) => j);

      if (neighbors.length < MIN_CLUSTER_PTS - 1) continue;

      const cluster = [i, ...neighbors];
      neighbors.forEach((j) => visited.add(j));
      clusters.push(cluster.map((idx) => points[idx]));
    }

    return clusters;
  }, []);

  const getDailySummary = useCallback(async (date = new Date()) => {
    const raw = await SensorStore.getByType("gps", date);

    if (raw.length < 5) {
      return {
        date:               date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
        radius_of_gyration: 0,
        home_stay_pct:      100,
        location_entropy:   0,
        num_places_visited: 0,
        sample_count:       raw.length,
      };
    }

    // Clean GPS points
    const cleaned = smoothGpsPoints(raw);

    // Infer home from early morning points (midnight–6AM)
    const nightPts = cleaned.filter((p) => {
      const h = new Date(p.timestamp).getHours();
      return h >= 0 && h <= 6;
    });
    const homeCenter = centroid(nightPts.length >= 3 ? nightPts : cleaned.slice(0, 5));

    // Home stay %
    const homePts     = cleaned.filter(
      (p) => haversineM(p.latitude, p.longitude, homeCenter.latitude, homeCenter.longitude) <= HOME_RADIUS_M
    );
    const homeStayPct = (homePts.length / cleaned.length) * 100;

    // Radius of gyration
    const rog = radiusOfGyration(cleaned);

    // Place clusters
    const clusters  = _clusterPlaces(cleaned);
    const numPlaces = clusters.length;

    // Location entropy
    const clusterSizes = clusters.map((c) => c.length);
    const entropy      = shannonEntropy(clusterSizes);

    return {
      date:               date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      radius_of_gyration: Math.round(rog),
      home_stay_pct:      parseFloat(homeStayPct.toFixed(2)),
      location_entropy:   parseFloat(entropy.toFixed(4)),
      num_places_visited: numPlaces,
      sample_count:       cleaned.length,
    };
  }, [_clusterPlaces]);

  return {
    isActive,
    lastLocation,
    error,
    start,
    stop,
    getDailySummary,
  };
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\sensors\usePedometer.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from "react";
import { Pedometer }   from "expo-sensors";
import SensorStore     from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { getDayStart } from "../utils/dateUtils";

/**
 * usePedometer.js
 *
 * Expo Pedometer hook using Android ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION permission.
 * Provides accurate step counts from the hardware step counter,
 * which is more accurate than the accelerometer-based step proxy.
 *
 * Features derived:
 *   - daily_step_count   (total steps since midnight)
 *   - hourly_steps       (steps per hour for circadian rhythm)
 *   - step_rate_per_min  (cadence during active periods)
 *
 * Requires: ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION in app.json
 */

const STEP_SYNC_INTERVAL_MS = 5 * 60 * 1000;   // sync every 5 minutes

export default function usePedometer(enabled = true) {
  const [isActive,     setIsActive]     = useState(false);
  const [isAvailable,  setIsAvailable]  = useState(false);
  const [currentSteps, setCurrentSteps] = useState(0);
  const [error,        setError]        = useState(null);

  const subscriptionRef = useRef(null);
  const syncTimerRef    = useRef(null);
  const lastSyncSteps   = useRef(0);

  const _syncSteps = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      // Get steps from midnight to now
      const dayStart = getDayStart();
      const now      = new Date();

      const result = await Pedometer.getStepCountAsync(dayStart, now);
      const steps  = result?.steps || 0;

      setCurrentSteps(steps);

      // Store hourly snapshot
      await SensorStore.append("pedometer", {
        steps_today:      steps,
        steps_this_hour:  steps - lastSyncSteps.current,
        hour_of_day:      now.getHours(),
      });

      lastSyncSteps.current = steps;
    } catch (err) {
      console.warn("[usePedometer] Sync error:", err.message);
    }
  }, []);

  const start = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!enabled || subscriptionRef.current) return;

    try {
      const available = await Pedometer.isAvailableAsync();
      setIsAvailable(available);

      if (!available) {
        setError("Pedometer not available — using accelerometer step proxy");
        return;
      }

      // Live step count subscription
      subscriptionRef.current = Pedometer.watchStepCount((result) => {
        setCurrentSteps((prev) => prev + result.steps);
      });

      // Periodic accurate sync from day start
      await _syncSteps();
      syncTimerRef.current = setInterval(_syncSteps, STEP_SYNC_INTERVAL_MS);

      setIsActive(true);
      setError(null);
      console.log("[usePedometer] Started");
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message);
      console.error("[usePedometer] Start error:", err);
    }
  }, [enabled, _syncSteps]);

  const stop = useCallback(async () => {
    if (subscriptionRef.current) {
      subscriptionRef.current.remove();
      subscriptionRef.current = null;
    }
    if (syncTimerRef.current) {
      clearInterval(syncTimerRef.current);
      syncTimerRef.current = null;
    }

    // Final sync
    await _syncSteps();
    setIsActive(false);
    console.log("[usePedometer] Stopped");
  }, [_syncSteps]);

  useEffect(() => {
    if (enabled) start();
    else         stop();
    return () => { stop(); };
  }, [enabled]);

  const getDailySummary = useCallback(async (date = new Date()) => {
    const readings = await SensorStore.getByType("pedometer", date);

    if (!readings.length) {
      return {
        date:             date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
        daily_step_count: currentSteps,
        peak_hour:        null,
        reading_count:    0,
      };
    }

    // Get latest reading for total
    const latest     = readings[readings.length - 1];
    const totalSteps = latest?.steps_today || currentSteps;

    // Find most active hour
    const byHour  = {};
    readings.forEach((r) => {
      if (r.hour_of_day != null) {
        byHour[r.hour_of_day] = (byHour[r.hour_of_day] || 0) + (r.steps_this_hour || 0);
      }
    });

    const peakHour = Object.entries(byHour).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0];

    return {
      date:             date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      daily_step_count: totalSteps,
      peak_hour:        peakHour ? parseInt(peakHour) : null,
      hourly_steps:     byHour,
      reading_count:    readings.length,
    };
  }, [currentSteps]);

  return {
    isActive,
    isAvailable,
    currentSteps,
    error,
    start,
    stop,
    getDailySummary,
  };
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\storage\RiskScoreStore.js
============================================================
import AsyncStorage from "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage";
import { STORAGE_KEYS } from "../constants/config";
import { formatISODate, getNDaysAgo } from "../utils/dateUtils";
import { getRiskLevel }               from "../constants/thresholds";

/**
 * RiskScoreStore.js
 *
 * Stores daily risk scores locally using AsyncStorage.
 * Each score entry includes the raw score, severity,
 * feature snapshot, and window timestamps.
 *
 * Data is retained for 30 days locally.
 * Scores are also synced to the backend via scoresApi.
 */

const MAX_SCORES = 60;

class RiskScoreStore {

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Write
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async save(scoreData) {
    try {
      const scores = await this.getAll();

      const entry = {
        id:           `score_${Date.now()}`,
        score:        parseFloat(scoreData.score.toFixed(4)),
        severity:     getRiskLevel(scoreData.score),
        window_start: scoreData.window_start,
        window_end:   scoreData.window_end,
        features:     scoreData.features || [],
        synced:       false,
        timestamp:    new Date().toISOString(),
      };

      scores.unshift(entry);

      // Keep only last MAX_SCORES entries
      const trimmed = scores.slice(0, MAX_SCORES);
      await AsyncStorage.setItem(
        STORAGE_KEYS.RISK_SCORES,
        JSON.stringify(trimmed)
      );

      return entry;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[RiskScoreStore] Save error:", err);
      return null;
    }
  }

  async markSynced(id) {
    try {
      const scores  = await this.getAll();
      const updated = scores.map((s) =>
        s.id === id ? { ...s, synced: true } : s
      );
      await AsyncStorage.setItem(
        STORAGE_KEYS.RISK_SCORES,
        JSON.stringify(updated)
      );
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[RiskScoreStore] MarkSynced error:", err);
    }
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Read
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getAll() {
    try {
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.RISK_SCORES);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  }

  async getLatest() {
    const scores = await this.getAll();
    return scores.length ? scores[0] : null;
  }

  async getLastN(n = 7) {
    const scores = await this.getAll();
    return scores.slice(0, n);
  }

  async getLastNDays(days = 7) {
    const scores  = await this.getAll();
    const cutoff  = getNDaysAgo(days);
    return scores.filter(
      (s) => new Date(s.timestamp) >= cutoff
    );
  }

  async getUnsynced() {
    const scores = await this.getAll();
    return scores.filter((s) => !s.synced);
  }

  async getByDate(date = new Date()) {
    const scores  = await this.getAll();
    const dateStr = formatISODate(date);
    return scores.filter(
      (s) => s.timestamp.startsWith(dateStr)
    );
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Derived
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getWeeklyAverages(weeks = 8) {
    const scores  = await this.getAll();
    const results = [];

    for (let i = weeks - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      const weekEnd   = getNDaysAgo(i * 7);
      const weekStart = getNDaysAgo((i + 1) * 7);

      const weekScores = scores.filter((s) => {
        const t = new Date(s.timestamp);
        return t >= weekStart && t <= weekEnd;
      });

      results.push({
        week_start:   formatISODate(weekStart),
        week_end:     formatISODate(weekEnd),
        avg_score:    weekScores.length
          ? weekScores.reduce((s, r) => s + r.score, 0) / weekScores.length
          : null,
        sample_count: weekScores.length,
      });
    }

    return results;
  }

  async getTrend(lastN = 7) {
    const scores = await this.getLastN(lastN);
    if (scores.length < 2) return "insufficient_data";

    const values = scores.map((s) => s.score).reverse();
    const slope  = (values[values.length - 1] - values[0]) / values.length;

    if (slope >  0.03) return "worsening";
    if (slope < -0.03) return "improving";
    return "stable";
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Clear
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async clearAll() {
    await AsyncStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEYS.RISK_SCORES);
    console.log("[RiskScoreStore] Cleared");
  }
}

export default new RiskScoreStore();

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\storage\SensorStore.js
============================================================
import AsyncStorage from "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage";
import { STORAGE_KEYS } from "../constants/config";
import { getDayStart, getDayEnd, formatISODate } from "../utils/dateUtils";

/**
 * SensorStore.js
 *
 * AsyncStorage-based local storage for all raw sensor readings.
 * Organized by date key: "sensor_YYYY-MM-DD"
 * Each date key stores an array of sensor reading objects.
 *
 * Privacy: All data stays on device.
 * Only derived features are ever sent to the backend.
 */

const MAX_DAYS_STORED = 14;
const DATE_INDEX_KEY  = `${STORAGE_KEYS.SENSOR_READINGS}_index`;

class SensorStore {

  async init() {
    // Prune old data on startup
    await this._pruneOldDays();
    console.log("[SensorStore] Initialized");
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Write
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async append(type, data, timestamp = new Date()) {
    const dateKey = this._dateKey(timestamp);
    const entry   = {
      type,
      timestamp: timestamp instanceof Date
        ? timestamp.toISOString()
        : timestamp,
      ...data,
    };

    try {
      const existing = await this._getDay(dateKey);
      existing.push(entry);
      await AsyncStorage.setItem(dateKey, JSON.stringify(existing));
      await this._addToIndex(dateKey);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[SensorStore] Append error:", err);
    }
  }

  async appendBatch(type, dataArray) {
    if (!dataArray || !dataArray.length) return;
    const now     = new Date();
    const dateKey = this._dateKey(now);

    try {
      const existing = await this._getDay(dateKey);
      const entries  = dataArray.map((d) => ({
        type,
        timestamp: now.toISOString(),
        ...d,
      }));
      const merged = [...existing, ...entries];
      await AsyncStorage.setItem(dateKey, JSON.stringify(merged));
      await this._addToIndex(dateKey);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[SensorStore] Batch append error:", err);
    }
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Read
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getByType(type, date = new Date()) {
    const dateKey = this._dateKey(date);
    const all     = await this._getDay(dateKey);
    return all.filter((r) => r.type === type);
  }

  async getByTypeAndRange(type, startDate, endDate) {
    const index = await this._getIndex();
    const results = [];

    for (const key of index) {
      const keyDate = new Date(key.replace("sensor_", ""));
      if (keyDate >= getDayStart(startDate) && keyDate <= getDayEnd(endDate)) {
        const readings = await this._getDay(key);
        results.push(...readings.filter((r) => r.type === type));
      }
    }

    return results.sort(
      (a, b) => new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp)
    );
  }

  async getToday(type) {
    return this.getByType(type, new Date());
  }

  async getLast7Days(type) {
    const end   = new Date();
    const start = new Date();
    start.setDate(start.getDate() - 7);
    return this.getByTypeAndRange(type, start, end);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Count
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async countToday(type) {
    const readings = await this.getToday(type);
    return readings.length;
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Clear
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async clearAll() {
    const index = await this._getIndex();
    await AsyncStorage.multiRemove([...index, DATE_INDEX_KEY]);
    console.log("[SensorStore] All data cleared");
  }

  async clearDay(date = new Date()) {
    const dateKey = this._dateKey(date);
    await AsyncStorage.removeItem(dateKey);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Private helpers
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  _dateKey(date) {
    return `sensor_${formatISODate(date)}`;
  }

  async _getDay(dateKey) {
    try {
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem(dateKey);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  }

  async _getIndex() {
    try {
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem(DATE_INDEX_KEY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  }

  async _addToIndex(dateKey) {
    const index = await this._getIndex();
    if (!index.includes(dateKey)) {
      index.push(dateKey);
      await AsyncStorage.setItem(DATE_INDEX_KEY, JSON.stringify(index));
    }
  }

  async _pruneOldDays() {
    const index  = await this._getIndex();
    const cutoff = new Date();
    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - MAX_DAYS_STORED);

    const toDelete = index.filter((key) => {
      const keyDate = new Date(key.replace("sensor_", ""));
      return keyDate < cutoff;
    });

    if (toDelete.length) {
      await AsyncStorage.multiRemove(toDelete);
      const newIndex = index.filter((k) => !toDelete.includes(k));
      await AsyncStorage.setItem(DATE_INDEX_KEY, JSON.stringify(newIndex));
      console.log(`[SensorStore] Pruned ${toDelete.length} old days`);
    }
  }
}

export default new SensorStore();

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\storage\UserStore.js
============================================================
import AsyncStorage from "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage";
import { STORAGE_KEYS } from "../constants/config";
import { getPHQSeverity } from "../constants/thresholds";
import { formatISODate }  from "../utils/dateUtils";

/**
 * UserStore.js
 *
 * Stores user profile and PHQ-9 history locally.
 * PHQ-9 entries are also synced to the backend via phqApi.
 */

const MAX_PHQ_ENTRIES = 52;   // 1 year of weekly entries

class UserStore {

  async init() {
    console.log("[UserStore] Initialized");
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Profile
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getProfile() {
    try {
      const [userId, role] = await Promise.all([
        AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ID),
        AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ROLE),
      ]);
      return { id: userId, role: role || "patient" };
    } catch {
      return { id: null, role: "patient" };
    }
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // PHQ-9 history
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async savePhqEntry(score) {
    try {
      const entries = await this.getPhqHistory();
      const entry   = {
        id:           `phq_${Date.now()}`,
        score:        parseInt(score),
        severity:     getPHQSeverity(score),
        submitted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
        synced:       false,
      };

      entries.unshift(entry);
      const trimmed = entries.slice(0, MAX_PHQ_ENTRIES);

      await AsyncStorage.setItem(
        STORAGE_KEYS.PHQ_HISTORY,
        JSON.stringify(trimmed)
      );

      return entry;
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[UserStore] SavePhq error:", err);
      return null;
    }
  }

  async markPhqSynced(id) {
    try {
      const entries = await this.getPhqHistory();
      const updated = entries.map((e) =>
        e.id === id ? { ...e, synced: true } : e
      );
      await AsyncStorage.setItem(
        STORAGE_KEYS.PHQ_HISTORY,
        JSON.stringify(updated)
      );
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[UserStore] MarkPhqSynced error:", err);
    }
  }

  async getPhqHistory() {
    try {
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.PHQ_HISTORY);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  }

  async getLatestPhq() {
    const entries = await this.getPhqHistory();
    return entries.length ? entries[0] : null;
  }

  async getUnsyncedPhq() {
    const entries = await this.getPhqHistory();
    return entries.filter((e) => !e.synced);
  }

  async isDueForPhq() {
    const latest = await this.getLatestPhq();
    if (!latest) return true;

    const lastDate = new Date(latest.submitted_at);
    const now      = new Date();
    const diffDays = (now - lastDate) / 86400000;

    return diffDays >= 7;
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Settings
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getSettings() {
    try {
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.SETTINGS);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : {};
    } catch {
      return {};
    }
  }

  async saveSettings(settings) {
    await AsyncStorage.setItem(
      STORAGE_KEYS.SETTINGS,
      JSON.stringify(settings)
    );
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Pending sync queue (scores + PHQ)
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getPendingSync() {
    try {
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.PENDING_SYNC);
      return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : [];
    } catch {
      return [];
    }
  }

  async addToPendingSync(type, payload) {
    const queue = await this.getPendingSync();
    queue.push({ type, payload, queued_at: new Date().toISOString() });
    await AsyncStorage.setItem(
      STORAGE_KEYS.PENDING_SYNC,
      JSON.stringify(queue)
    );
  }

  async clearPendingSync() {
    await AsyncStorage.removeItem(STORAGE_KEYS.PENDING_SYNC);
  }

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Clear all
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async clearAll() {
    await AsyncStorage.multiRemove([
      STORAGE_KEYS.PHQ_HISTORY,
      STORAGE_KEYS.SETTINGS,
      STORAGE_KEYS.PENDING_SYNC,
    ]);
    console.log("[UserStore] All user data cleared");
  }
}

export default new UserStore();

/**
 * dateUtils.js
 *
 * Date and time formatting helpers used across
 * screens, charts, and feature extraction windows.
 */

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Formatters
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function formatDate(date) {
  const d = date instanceof Date ? date : new Date(date);
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
    day:   "numeric",
    month: "short",
    year:  "numeric",
  });
}

export function formatTime(date) {
  const d = date instanceof Date ? date : new Date(date);
  return d.toLocaleTimeString("en-IN", {
    hour:   "2-digit",
    minute: "2-digit",
  });
}

export function formatDateTime(date) {
  const d = date instanceof Date ? date : new Date(date);
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
    day:    "numeric",
    month:  "short",
    hour:   "2-digit",
    minute: "2-digit",
  });
}

export function formatShortDate(date) {
  const d = date instanceof Date ? date : new Date(date);
  return d.toLocaleDateString("en-IN", {
    day:   "numeric",
    month: "short",
  });
}

export function formatISODate(date) {
  const d = date instanceof Date ? date : new Date(date);
  return d.toISOString().slice(0, 10);
}

export function formatRelative(date) {
  const d      = date instanceof Date ? date : new Date(date);
  const now    = new Date();
  const diffMs = now - d;
  const diffM  = Math.floor(diffMs / 60000);
  const diffH  = Math.floor(diffMs / 3600000);
  const diffD  = Math.floor(diffMs / 86400000);

  if (diffM < 1)  return "just now";
  if (diffM < 60) return `${diffM}m ago`;
  if (diffH < 24) return `${diffH}h ago`;
  if (diffD < 7)  return `${diffD}d ago`;
  return formatShortDate(d);
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Window helpers
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function getDayStart(date = new Date()) {
  const d = new Date(date);
  d.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  return d;
}

export function getDayEnd(date = new Date()) {
  const d = new Date(date);
  d.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
  return d;
}

export function getWeekStart(date = new Date()) {
  const d    = new Date(date);
  const day  = d.getDay();
  const diff = (day + 6) % 7;   // Mon = 0
  d.setDate(d.getDate() - diff);
  d.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  return d;
}

export function getNDaysAgo(n, date = new Date()) {
  const d = new Date(date);
  d.setDate(d.getDate() - n);
  return d;
}

export function getHoursAgo(h, date = new Date()) {
  return new Date(date.getTime() - h * 3600000);
}

export function isSameDay(a, b) {
  const da = new Date(a);
  const db = new Date(b);
  return (
    da.getFullYear() === db.getFullYear() &&
    da.getMonth()    === db.getMonth()    &&
    da.getDate()     === db.getDate()
  );
}

export function daysBetween(a, b) {
  const msPerDay = 86400000;
  return Math.round(Math.abs(new Date(b) - new Date(a)) / msPerDay);
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Week label generator for charts
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function getLastNWeekLabels(n = 8) {
  const labels = [];
  const now    = new Date();
  for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const d = getNDaysAgo(i * 7, now);
    labels.push(formatShortDate(d));
  }
  return labels;
}

export function getLastNDayLabels(n = 7) {
  const labels = [];
  const now    = new Date();
  for (let i = n - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const d = getNDaysAgo(i, now);
    labels.push(formatShortDate(d));
  }
  return labels;
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Hour helpers for circadian analysis
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function getHourOfDay(date) {
  const d = date instanceof Date ? date : new Date(date);
  return d.getHours() + d.getMinutes() / 60;
}

export function isNightHour(date) {
  const h = new Date(date).getHours();
  return h >= 22 || h < 6;
}

export function isSleepWindow(date) {
  const h = new Date(date).getHours();
  return h >= 21 || h < 11;
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\utils\mathUtils.js
============================================================
/**
 * mathUtils.js
 *
 * Core mathematical utilities used across feature extraction.
 * Pure functions — no side effects, fully testable.
 */

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Basic statistics
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function mean(arr) {
  if (!arr || !arr.length) return 0;
  return arr.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / arr.length;
}

export function sum(arr) {
  if (!arr || !arr.length) return 0;
  return arr.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
}

export function max(arr) {
  if (!arr || !arr.length) return 0;
  return Math.max(...arr);
}

export function min(arr) {
  if (!arr || !arr.length) return 0;
  return Math.min(...arr);
}

export function variance(arr) {
  if (!arr || arr.length < 2) return 0;
  const m = mean(arr);
  return arr.reduce((s, v) => s + (v - m) ** 2, 0) / arr.length;
}

export function std(arr) {
  return Math.sqrt(variance(arr));
}

export function median(arr) {
  if (!arr || !arr.length) return 0;
  const sorted = [...arr].sort((a, b) => a - b);
  const mid    = Math.floor(sorted.length / 2);
  return sorted.length % 2 !== 0
    ? sorted[mid]
    : (sorted[mid - 1] + sorted[mid]) / 2;
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Entropy
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function shannonEntropy(counts) {
  const total = sum(counts);
  if (total === 0) return 0;
  return -counts
    .map((c) => c / total)
    .filter((p) => p > 0)
    .reduce((s, p) => s + p * Math.log2(p), 0);
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Geospatial
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

const EARTH_RADIUS_M = 6_371_000;

export function haversineM(lat1, lon1, lat2, lon2) {
  const toRad = (d) => (d * Math.PI) / 180;
  const dLat  = toRad(lat2 - lat1);
  const dLon  = toRad(lon2 - lon1);
  const a =
    Math.sin(dLat / 2) ** 2 +
    Math.cos(toRad(lat1)) *
    Math.cos(toRad(lat2)) *
    Math.sin(dLon / 2) ** 2;
  return EARTH_RADIUS_M * 2 * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
}

export function centroid(points) {
  if (!points || !points.length) return { latitude: 0, longitude: 0 };
  return {
    latitude:  mean(points.map((p) => p.latitude)),
    longitude: mean(points.map((p) => p.longitude)),
  };
}

export function radiusOfGyration(points) {
  if (!points || points.length < 2) return 0;
  const c   = centroid(points);
  const msd = mean(
    points.map(
      (p) => haversineM(p.latitude, p.longitude, c.latitude, c.longitude) ** 2
    )
  );
  return Math.sqrt(msd);
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Signal processing
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function medianFilter(values, windowSize = 5) {
  if (!values || !values.length) return [];
  const half   = Math.floor(windowSize / 2);
  return values.map((_, i) => {
    const start = Math.max(0, i - half);
    const end   = Math.min(values.length, i + half + 1);
    return median(values.slice(start, end));
  });
}

export function movingAverage(values, windowSize = 7) {
  if (!values || !values.length) return [];
  return values.map((_, i) => {
    const start = Math.max(0, i - windowSize + 1);
    return mean(values.slice(start, i + 1));
  });
}

export function removeOutliers(values, zThreshold = 3.0) {
  if (!values || values.length < 3) return values || [];
  const m  = mean(values);
  const s  = std(values);
  if (s === 0) return [...values];
  return values.map((v) =>
    Math.abs((v - m) / s) > zThreshold ? m : v
  );
}

export function fillLocf(values) {
  let last = null;
  return (values || []).map((v) => {
    if (v !== null && v !== undefined) { last = v; return v; }
    return last ?? 0;
  });
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Normalization
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function minMaxNormalize(values, fixedMin = null, fixedMax = null) {
  if (!values || !values.length) return [];
  const lo = fixedMin ?? min(values);
  const hi = fixedMax ?? max(values);
  if (hi === lo) return values.map(() => 0);
  return values.map((v) => (v - lo) / (hi - lo));
}

export function applyStandardScaler(values, means, scales) {
  return values.map((v, i) => (v - (means[i] || 0)) / (scales[i] || 1));
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Trend detection
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function linearSlope(values) {
  if (!values || values.length < 2) return 0;
  return (values[values.length - 1] - values[0]) / values.length;
}

export function getTrendLabel(values) {
  const slope = linearSlope(values);
  if (slope >  0.03) return "worsening";
  if (slope < -0.03) return "improving";
  return "stable";
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Rounding
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function round2(n) { return Math.round(n * 100)   / 100; }
export function round4(n) { return Math.round(n * 10000) / 10000; }

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\utils\noiseFilter.js
============================================================
/**
 * noiseFilter.js
 *
 * Signal preprocessing pipeline for raw Expo sensor data.
 * Applied before feature extraction to clean noise,
 * fill gaps, and normalize values for TFLite inference.
 */

import {
  mean, std, median,
  medianFilter, removeOutliers,
  fillLocf, applyStandardScaler,
} from "./mathUtils";

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// GPS coordinate smoothing
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Smooths a sequence of GPS coordinate pairs.
 * Applies median filter to lat and lon separately,
 * then removes statistical outliers.
 *
 * @param {{ latitude: number, longitude: number, timestamp: string }[]} points
 * @returns cleaned points array
 */
export function smoothGpsPoints(points) {
  if (!points || points.length < 3) return points || [];

  const lats = medianFilter(points.map((p) => p.latitude),  5);
  const lons = medianFilter(points.map((p) => p.longitude), 5);

  const cleanLats = removeOutliers(lats, 3.0);
  const cleanLons = removeOutliers(lons, 3.0);

  return points.map((p, i) => ({
    ...p,
    latitude:  cleanLats[i],
    longitude: cleanLons[i],
  }));
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Accelerometer magnitude cleaning
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Removes accelerometer spikes and applies median filter.
 * Typical resting magnitude ≈ 1.0g (gravity).
 * Values > 4.0g are likely sensor spikes.
 *
 * @param {number[]} magnitudes
 * @returns cleaned magnitudes
 */
export function cleanAccelMagnitudes(magnitudes) {
  if (!magnitudes || !magnitudes.length) return [];

  // Hard clamp extreme values
  const clamped = magnitudes.map((v) => Math.min(v, 4.0));

  // Median filter for spike removal
  const filtered = medianFilter(clamped, 5);

  // Z-score outlier replacement
  return removeOutliers(filtered, 3.0);
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Time series gap filling
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Fills missing hourly bins in a time series using LOCF.
 * Used when sensor readings are sparse across a 24h window.
 *
 * @param {(number | null)[]} hourlyValues  24-element array
 * @returns {number[]} filled array
 */
export function fillHourlyGaps(hourlyValues) {
  return fillLocf(hourlyValues);
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Full feature vector preprocessing pipeline
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Applies the complete preprocessing pipeline to a raw
 * feature vector before passing it to TFLite inference.
 *
 * Steps:
 *   1. Replace nulls/NaNs with 0
 *   2. Clamp extreme values
 *   3. Apply StandardScaler from training metadata
 *
 * @param {number[]}  rawFeatures   Raw feature vector
 * @param {object}    scalerParams  { mean: number[], scale: number[] }
 * @returns {number[]} Preprocessed feature vector ready for model
 */
export function preprocessForInference(rawFeatures, scalerParams) {
  if (!rawFeatures || !rawFeatures.length) return [];

  // Step 1 — replace null / NaN / Infinity
  const clean = rawFeatures.map((v) => {
    if (v === null || v === undefined || isNaN(v) || !isFinite(v)) return 0;
    return v;
  });

  // Step 2 — clamp per-feature reasonable bounds
  const clamped = clampFeatureVector(clean);

  // Step 3 — StandardScaler (z-score normalization)
  if (scalerParams?.mean && scalerParams?.scale) {
    return applyStandardScaler(clamped, scalerParams.mean, scalerParams.scale);
  }

  return clamped;
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Per-feature clamps (from domain knowledge)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

const FEATURE_CLAMPS = [
  [0,       20000],   // radius_of_gyration (meters)
  [0,       100],     // home_stay_pct (%)
  [0,       5],       // location_entropy (bits)
  [0,       20],      // num_places_visited
  [0,       30000],   // daily_step_count
  [0,       48],      // sedentary_bouts
  [0,       1440],    // sedentary_mins
  [0,       1],       // circadian_index
  [0,       1],       // interdaily_stability
  [0,       2],       // intradaily_variability
  [0,       16],      // sleep_duration_hrs
  [-6,      6],       // sleep_midpoint_hr
  [0,       20],      // sleep_disruption_count
  [0,       200],     // screen_unlock_count
  [0,       1440],    // screen_on_duration_mins
];

function clampFeatureVector(features) {
  return features.map((v, i) => {
    const clamp = FEATURE_CLAMPS[i];
    if (!clamp) return v;
    return Math.max(clamp[0], Math.min(clamp[1], v));
  });
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Validate feature vector before inference
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function validateFeatureVector(features, expectedLength = 15) {
  if (!features || features.length !== expectedLength) {
    return { valid: false, reason: `Expected ${expectedLength} features, got ${features?.length}` };
  }
  const hasInvalid = features.some(
    (v) => v === null || v === undefined || isNaN(v) || !isFinite(v)
  );
  if (hasInvalid) {
    return { valid: false, reason: "Feature vector contains invalid values" };
  }
  return { valid: true };
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\utils\permissions.js

import * as Location     from "expo-location";
import * as Notifications from "expo-notifications";
import { Platform }      from "react-native";

/**
 * permissions.js
 *
 * Centralized permission request handler for CareMind.
 * All permissions are requested upfront on first launch
 * with clear explanations shown to the user.
 *
 * Expo managed workflow permissions:
 *   - Location (foreground + background)
 *   - Notifications
 *   - Activity Recognition (step counter) — declared in app.json
 *
 * Note: Call logs, SMS, microphone are NOT requested
 * as they are unavailable in Expo managed workflow.
 */

export const PERMISSION_STATUS = {
  GRANTED:       "granted",
  DENIED:        "denied",
  UNDETERMINED:  "undetermined",
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Location
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function requestLocationPermission() {
  const { status: fgStatus } =
    await Location.requestForegroundPermissionsAsync();

  if (fgStatus !== "granted") {
    console.warn("[Permissions] Foreground location denied");
    return { foreground: false, background: false };
  }

  // Background location for continuous tracking
  const { status: bgStatus } =
    await Location.requestBackgroundPermissionsAsync();

  return {
    foreground: fgStatus  === "granted",
    background: bgStatus  === "granted",
  };
}

export async function checkLocationPermission() {
  const { status } = await Location.getForegroundPermissionsAsync();
  return status === "granted";
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Notifications
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function requestNotificationPermission() {
  try {
    const { status: existing } = await Notifications.getPermissionsAsync();

    if (existing === "granted") return true;

    const { status } = await Notifications.requestPermissionsAsync({
      ios: {
        allowAlert:  true,
        allowBadge:  true,
        allowSound:  true,
      },
    });

    return status === "granted";
  } catch (error) {
    // Expo Go with SDK 53+ doesn't support remote notifications
    // Local notifications still work fine
    console.warn("[Permissions] Notification permission request failed (expected in Expo Go):", error.message);
    return false;
  }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Request all at once (called on first launch)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function requestAllPermissions() {
  const results = {
    location:      { foreground: false, background: false },
    notifications: false,
  };

  try {
    results.location      = await requestLocationPermission();
    results.notifications = await requestNotificationPermission();
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("[Permissions] Error requesting permissions:", err);
  }

  console.log("[Permissions] Results:", results);
  return results;
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Check all statuses (for settings screen)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function checkAllPermissions() {
  const locationStatus      = await Location.getForegroundPermissionsAsync();
  const notificationStatus  = await Notifications.getPermissionsAsync();

  return {
    location:      locationStatus.status      === "granted",
    notifications: notificationStatus.status  === "granted",
  };
}
