============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\start-with-logs.ps1
============================================================
# Run Expo + Logging together
# Usage: .\start-with-logs.ps1

Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "Starting CareMind with Error Logging" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "========================================" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host ""

# Clear old log file
if (Test-Path "emulator-errors.log") {
    Remove-Item "emulator-errors.log"
    Write-Host "Old log cleared" -ForegroundColor Yellow
}

Write-Host "Opening 2 terminals..." -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  Terminal 1: Expo app server" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host "  Terminal 2: Error logger" -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host ""

# Start Expo in background
Write-Host "Starting Expo..." -ForegroundColor Green
Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd '$PWD'; npm run android"

# Wait a bit for Expo to start
Start-Sleep -Seconds 3

# Start logging in a new terminal
Write-Host "Starting error capture..." -ForegroundColor Green
Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd '$PWD'; npm run logs"

Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Both processes started!" -ForegroundColor Green
Write-Host "Logs will be saved to: emulator-errors.log" -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host ""
Write-Host "Press Ctrl+C in the logging terminal when done" -ForegroundColor Cyan


============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\t.py
============================================================
import os

IGNORE_DIRS = {
    "node_modules", ".git", "__pycache__", "dist", "build", ".next", ".vscode"
}

IGNORE_EXT = {
    ".png", ".jpg", ".jpeg", ".gif", ".exe", ".dll", ".log", ".lock"
}

def combine_files(root_folder, output_file):
    with open(output_file, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as out:
        for foldername, subfolders, filenames in os.walk(root_folder):

            # skip unwanted folders
            subfolders[:] = [d for d in subfolders if d not in IGNORE_DIRS]

            for filename in filenames:
                if any(filename.endswith(ext) for ext in IGNORE_EXT):
                    continue

                file_path = os.path.join(foldername, filename)

                out.write("\n" + "="*60 + "\n")
                out.write(f"FILE: {file_path}\n")
                out.write("="*60 + "\n")

                try:
                    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                        out.write(f.read() + "\n")
                except Exception as e:
                    out.write(f"[Could not read file: {e}]\n")


# usage
combine_files(r"D:\app\CareMind", "output.txt")

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\.expo\README.md
============================================================
> Why do I have a folder named ".expo" in my project?

The ".expo" folder is created when an Expo project is started using "expo start" command.

> What do the files contain?

- "devices.json": contains information about devices that have recently opened this project. This is used to populate the "Development sessions" list in your development builds.
- "settings.json": contains the server configuration that is used to serve the application manifest.

> Should I commit the ".expo" folder?

No, you should not share the ".expo" folder. It does not contain any information that is relevant for other developers working on the project, it is specific to your machine.
Upon project creation, the ".expo" folder is already added to your ".gitignore" file.

import apiClient from "./apiClient";

/**
 * alertsApi.js
 *
 * Alert endpoints.
 * Fetches, marks read, and counts unread alerts
 * for the authenticated user.
 */

export const alertsApi = {

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get all alerts
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getAll(userId, unreadOnly = false) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(
      `/alerts/${userId}?unread_only=${unreadOnly}`
    )
    return res.data
    // Returns: Alert[]
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get unread count
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getUnreadCount(userId) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(`/alerts/${userId}/count`)
    return res.data.unread_count
    // Returns: number
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Mark single alert as read
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async markRead(alertId) {
    const res = await apiClient.patch(`/alerts/${alertId}/read`)
    return res.data
    // Returns: Alert
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Mark all alerts as read
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async markAllRead(userId) {
    const res = await apiClient.patch(`/alerts/${userId}/read-all`)
    return res.data
    // Returns: { message: "All alerts marked as read" }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Poll for new alerts (returns only new ones
  // since a given timestamp)
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async pollNew(userId, since) {
    try {
      const all  = await this.getAll(userId, true)
      const sinceDate = new Date(since)
      return all.filter(
        (a) => new Date(a.created_at) > sinceDate
      )
    } catch {
      return []
    }
  },
}

export default alertsApi

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\api\apiClient.js
============================================================
import axios        from "axios";
import AsyncStorage from "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage";
import {
  API_BASE_URL,
  API_TIMEOUT_MS,
  STORAGE_KEYS,
} from "../constants/config";

/**
 * apiClient.js
 *
 * Axios instance with:
 *   - JWT token injection on every request
 *   - 401 → auto-logout handler
 *   - Request/response logging in dev
 *   - Retry on network timeout (up to 3 attempts)
 *   - Offline queue integration
 */

const MAX_RETRIES  = 3
const RETRY_DELAY  = 1500   // ms, doubles per attempt

const apiClient = axios.create({
  baseURL: API_BASE_URL,
  timeout: API_TIMEOUT_MS,
  headers: {
    "Content-Type": "application/json",
    "Accept":       "application/json",
  },
})

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Request interceptor — attach JWT
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

apiClient.interceptors.request.use(
  async (config) => {
    const token = await AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.ACCESS_TOKEN)
    if (token) {
      config.headers.Authorization = `Bearer ${token}`
    }

    if (__DEV__) {
      console.log(
        `[API] ${config.method?.toUpperCase()} ${config.url}`,
        config.data ? JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(config.data)) : ""
      )
    }

    return config
  },
  (error) => Promise.reject(error)
)

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Response interceptor — handle errors globally
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

apiClient.interceptors.response.use(
  (response) => {
    if (__DEV__) {
      console.log(
        `[API] Response ${response.status}`,
        response.config.url
      )
    }
    return response
  },
  async (error) => {
    const config = error.config

    // 401 — token expired or invalid
    if (error.response?.status === 401) {
      await AsyncStorage.multiRemove([
        STORAGE_KEYS.ACCESS_TOKEN,
        STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ID,
        STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ROLE,
      ])
      // AuthContext will detect missing token and redirect to login
      return Promise.reject(new Error("Session expired. Please log in again."))
    }

    // Retry on network errors or 5xx
    const shouldRetry =
      !error.response ||
      error.response.status >= 500

    if (shouldRetry && (!config._retryCount || config._retryCount < MAX_RETRIES)) {
      config._retryCount = (config._retryCount || 0) + 1
      const delay = RETRY_DELAY * config._retryCount
      console.warn(
        `[API] Retrying (${config._retryCount}/${MAX_RETRIES}) after ${delay}ms:`,
        config.url
      )
      await _sleep(delay)
      return apiClient(config)
    }

    // Extract error message
    const message =
      error.response?.data?.error ||
      error.response?.data?.message ||
      error.message ||
      "Network error"

    if (__DEV__) {
      console.error("[API] Error:", message, error.response?.status)
    }

    return Promise.reject(new Error(message))
  }
)

function _sleep(ms) {
  return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms))
}

export default apiClient

    email:    email.trim().toLowerCase(),
    password,
  })
  return res.data
  // Returns: { access_token, user_id, role, name }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function registerApi(name, email, password, role = "patient") {
  const res = await apiClient.post("/auth/register", {
    name:     name.trim(),
    email:    email.trim().toLowerCase(),
    password,
    role,
  })
  return res.data
  // Returns: { access_token, user_id, role, name }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Token refresh
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function refreshTokenApi() {
  const res = await apiClient.post("/auth/refresh")
  return res.data
  // Returns: { access_token }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

  const res = await apiClient.get("/auth/me")
  return res.data
  // Returns: { id, name, email, role, created_at }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

  const res = await apiClient.patch("/auth/me", updates)
  return res.data
}

// Change password
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function changePasswordApi(currentPassword, newPassword) {
  const res = await apiClient.post("/auth/change-password", {
    current_password: currentPassword,
    new_password:     newPassword,
  })
  return res.data
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\api\phqApi.js
============================================================
import apiClient from "./apiClient";

/**
 * phqApi.js
 *
 * PHQ-9 questionnaire endpoints.
 * Handles submitting weekly PHQ-9 scores
 * and fetching history for correlation analysis.
 */

export const phqApi = {

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Submit PHQ-9 score
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async submit(payload) {
    const res = await apiClient.post("/phq/", {
      user_id: payload.user_id,
      score:   parseInt(payload.score),
    })
    return res.data
    // Returns: { id, score, severity, submitted_at }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get PHQ-9 history
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getHistory(userId, limit = 10) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(`/phq/${userId}?limit=${limit}`)
    return res.data
    // Returns: PhqEntry[]
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get latest PHQ-9 entry
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getLatest(userId) {
    try {
      const res = await apiClient.get(`/phq/latest/${userId}`)
      return res.data
    } catch (err) {
      if (err.message?.includes("404") || err.response?.status === 404) {
        return null   // No entries yet — not an error
      }
      throw err
    }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Check if PHQ-9 is due
  // (7 days since last submission)
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async isDue(userId) {
    try {
      const latest = await this.getLatest(userId)
      if (!latest) return true

      const lastDate = new Date(latest.submitted_at)
      const now      = new Date()
      const diffDays = (now - lastDate) / 86400000

      return diffDays >= 7
    } catch {
      return true   // Default to due if error
    }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get PHQ score trend (for chart)
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getTrend(userId, limit = 8) {
    const history = await this.getHistory(userId, limit)

    return history
      .slice()
      .reverse()
      .map((entry) => ({
        date:     entry.submitted_at.slice(0, 10),
        score:    entry.score,
        severity: entry.severity,
      }))
  },
}

export default phqApi

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\api\scoresApi.js
============================================================
import apiClient from "./apiClient";

/**
 * scoresApi.js
 *
 * Risk score endpoints.
 * Handles submitting on-device scores to the backend
 * and fetching score history for trend analysis.
 */

export const scoresApi = {

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Submit a risk score
  // Called after every on-device inference
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async submit(payload) {
    const res = await apiClient.post("/scores/", {
      user_id:      payload.user_id,
      score:        payload.score,
      window_start: payload.window_start,
      window_end:   payload.window_end,
    })
    return res.data
    // Returns: { id, score, severity, window_start, window_end, synced_at }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get score history for a user
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getHistory(userId, limit = 30) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(`/scores/${userId}?limit=${limit}`)
    return res.data
    // Returns: RiskScore[]
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get latest score
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getLatest(userId) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(`/scores/latest/${userId}`)
    return res.data
    // Returns: RiskScore
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get weekly trend
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getWeeklyTrend(userId, weeks = 8) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(
      `/trends/${userId}/weekly?weeks=${weeks}`
    )
    return res.data
    // Returns: { week_start, week_end, avg_score, sample_count }[]
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get PHQ-9 vs risk correlation
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getPhqCorrelation(userId) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(`/trends/${userId}/phq-correlation`)
    return res.data
    // Returns: { date, phq_score, phq_severity, avg_risk_score }[]
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get feature summary
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getFeatureSummary(userId) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(`/trends/${userId}/feature-summary`)
    return res.data
    // Returns: { user_id, period, num_windows, avg_risk_score, trend }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Bulk submit unsynced scores
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async bulkSubmit(userId, scores) {
    const results = { success: 0, failed: 0 }

    for (const score of scores) {
      try {
        await this.submit({ user_id: userId, ...score })
        results.success++
      } catch {
        results.failed++
      }
    }

    return results
  },
}

export default scoresApi

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\api\trendsApi.js
============================================================
import apiClient from "./apiClient";

/**
 * trendsApi.js
 *
 * Trend analysis endpoints.
 * Fetches weekly averages, PHQ correlations,
 * and feature summaries from the backend.
 */

export const trendsApi = {

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Weekly average risk scores
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getWeeklyTrend(userId, weeks = 8) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(
      `/trends/${userId}/weekly?weeks=${weeks}`
    )
    return res.data
    // Returns: { week_start, week_end, avg_score, sample_count }[]
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // PHQ-9 vs risk score correlation
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getPhqCorrelation(userId) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(
      `/trends/${userId}/phq-correlation`
    )
    return res.data
    // Returns: { date, phq_score, phq_severity, avg_risk_score }[]
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // 7-day behavioral feature summary
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async getFeatureSummary(userId) {
    const res = await apiClient.get(
      `/trends/${userId}/feature-summary`
    )
    return res.data
    // Returns: { user_id, period, num_windows, avg_risk_score, trend }
  },

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Fetch all trend data at once
  // Used by dashboard on initial load
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  async fetchAll(userId) {
    const [weeklyTrend, phqCorr, featureSummary] = await Promise.allSettled([
      this.getWeeklyTrend(userId, 8),
      this.getPhqCorrelation(userId),
      this.getFeatureSummary(userId),
    ])

    return {
      weeklyTrend:    weeklyTrend.status    === "fulfilled" ? weeklyTrend.value    : [],
      phqCorrelation: phqCorr.status        === "fulfilled" ? phqCorr.value        : [],
      featureSummary: featureSummary.status === "fulfilled" ? featureSummary.value : null,
    }
  },
}

export default trendsApi

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\background\BackgroundTask.js
============================================================
import * as BackgroundFetch from "expo-background-fetch";
import * as TaskManager     from "expo-task-manager";
import * as Location        from "expo-location";
import RiskScorePredictor   from "../ml/RiskScorePredictor";
import UserStore            from "../storage/UserStore";
import RiskScoreStore       from "../storage/RiskScoreStore";
import SensorStore          from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { scoresApi }        from "../api/scoresApi";
import { phqApi }           from "../api/phqApi";
import { sendHighRiskNotification, sendPhqReminderNotification }
  from "./NotificationHandler";
import { TASKS, BACKGROUND_TASK_INTERVAL } from "../constants/config";

/**
 * BackgroundTask.js
 *
 * Manages background task scheduling via
 * expo-background-fetch + expo-task-manager.
 *
 * Background tasks (Android ~15 min minimum):
 *   1. BACKGROUND_FETCH  — main task: collect + infer + sync
 *   2. LOCATION_TRACK    — continuous GPS tracking
 *
 * Tasks are registered at module level (required by Expo).
 * configure() is called once on app startup.
 */

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Task definitions (must be at module top level)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

TaskManager.defineTask(TASKS.BACKGROUND_FETCH, async () => {
  console.log("[BackgroundTask] Background fetch fired")
  try {
    await _runBackgroundWork()
    return BackgroundFetch.BackgroundFetchResult.NewData
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("[BackgroundTask] Background fetch error:", err)
    return BackgroundFetch.BackgroundFetchResult.Failed
  }
})

TaskManager.defineTask(TASKS.LOCATION_TRACK, async ({ data, error }) => {
  if (error) {
    console.error("[BackgroundTask] Location task error:", error)
    return
  }

  if (data?.locations) {
    const SensorStoreLocal = require("../storage/SensorStore").default
    for (const loc of data.locations) {
      const { latitude, longitude, accuracy, altitude } = loc.coords
      if (accuracy <= 150) {
        await SensorStoreLocal.append("gps", {
          latitude,
          longitude,
          accuracy,
          altitude: altitude || 0,
        })
      }
    }
  }
})

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Main background work
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

async function _runBackgroundWork() {
  const now = new Date()
  console.log("[BackgroundTask] Running background work at", now.toISOString())

  // 1. Run risk inference (every background fetch)
  const result = await RiskScorePredictor.runInference(now)
  if (result?.is_high_risk) {
    await sendHighRiskNotification(result.score)
  }

  // 2. Sync unsynced scores to backend
  await _syncPendingScores()

  // 3. Check if PHQ-9 reminder is due
  await _checkPhqReminder()

  // 4. Prune old sensor data
  await _pruneOldData()

  console.log("[BackgroundTask] Background work complete")
}

async function _syncPendingScores() {
  try {
    const pending = await UserStore.getPendingSync()
    if (!pending.length) return

    const profile = await UserStore.getProfile()
    if (!profile?.id) return

    const failed = []
    for (const item of pending) {
      try {
        if (item.type === "score") {
          await scoresApi.submit({
            user_id: profile.id,
            ...item.payload,
          })
        } else if (item.type === "phq") {
          await phqApi.submit({
            user_id: profile.id,
            ...item.payload,
          })
        }
      } catch {
        failed.push(item)
      }
    }

    if (failed.length) {
      await UserStore.saveSettings({ pending_sync: failed })
    } else {
      await UserStore.clearPendingSync()
    }

    console.log(`[BackgroundTask] Synced ${pending.length - failed.length} pending items`)
  } catch (err) {
    console.warn("[BackgroundTask] Sync error:", err.message)
  }
}

async function _checkPhqReminder() {
  try {
    const isDue = await UserStore.isDueForPhq()
    if (isDue) {
      await sendPhqReminderNotification()
      console.log("[BackgroundTask] PHQ-9 reminder sent")
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.warn("[BackgroundTask] PHQ reminder error:", err.message)
  }
}

async function _pruneOldData() {
  try {
    // SensorStore auto-prunes on init,
    // but we also call it periodically
    const hour = new Date().getHours()
    if (hour === 3) {
      // 3AM daily cleanup
      await SensorStore.init()
      console.log("[BackgroundTask] Nightly data prune complete")
    }
  } catch (err) {
    console.warn("[BackgroundTask] Prune error:", err.message)
  }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Public API
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

class BackgroundTask {

  async configure() {
    try {
      // Register background fetch
      await BackgroundFetch.registerTaskAsync(TASKS.BACKGROUND_FETCH, {
        minimumInterval:    BACKGROUND_TASK_INTERVAL,
        stopOnTerminate:    false,
        startOnBoot:        true,
      })

      // Start background location tracking
      const { status } = await Location.getBackgroundPermissionsAsync()
      if (status === "granted") {
        const isRegistered = await TaskManager.isTaskRegisteredAsync(
          TASKS.LOCATION_TRACK
        )
        if (!isRegistered) {
          await Location.startLocationUpdatesAsync(TASKS.LOCATION_TRACK, {
            accuracy:         Location.Accuracy.Balanced,
            timeInterval:     5 * 60 * 1000,
            distanceInterval: 50,
            showsBackgroundLocationIndicator: false,
            foregroundService: {
              notificationTitle:   "CareMind",
              notificationBody:    "Monitoring behavioral patterns in background",
              notificationColor:   "#4c51bf",
            },
          })
        }
      }

      console.log("[BackgroundTask] Configured successfully")
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[BackgroundTask] Configure error:", err)
    }
  }

  async stop() {
    try {
      await BackgroundFetch.unregisterTaskAsync(TASKS.BACKGROUND_FETCH)

      const isRegistered = await TaskManager.isTaskRegisteredAsync(
        TASKS.LOCATION_TRACK
      )
      if (isRegistered) {
        await Location.stopLocationUpdatesAsync(TASKS.LOCATION_TRACK)
      }

      console.log("[BackgroundTask] All tasks stopped")
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[BackgroundTask] Stop error:", err)
    }
  }

  async getStatus() {
    const fetchStatus = await BackgroundFetch.getStatusAsync()
    const locationRegistered = await TaskManager.isTaskRegisteredAsync(
      TASKS.LOCATION_TRACK
    )

    return {
      backgroundFetch: _fetchStatusLabel(fetchStatus),
      locationTracking: locationRegistered,
    }
  }
}

function _fetchStatusLabel(status) {
  switch (status) {
    case BackgroundFetch.BackgroundFetchStatus.Available:   return "available"
    case BackgroundFetch.BackgroundFetchStatus.Denied:      return "denied"
    case BackgroundFetch.BackgroundFetchStatus.Restricted:  return "restricted"
    default:                                                return "unknown"
  }
}

export default new BackgroundTask()

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\background\NotificationHandler.js
============================================================
import * as Notifications from "expo-notifications";
import * as Device        from "expo-device";
import { Platform }       from "react-native";

/**
 * NotificationHandler.js
 *
 * Manages all local push notifications for CareMind.
 *
 * Notification types:
 *   1. High risk alert     — score exceeded threshold
 *   2. PHQ-9 reminder      — weekly questionnaire due
 *   3. Daily check-in      — morning wellness nudge
 *   4. Monitoring reminder — sensors were stopped > 24h
 *
 * Uses expo-notifications for local scheduling.
 * No remote push server required for core functionality.
 * 
 * NOTE: Remote notifications not available in Expo Go with SDK 53+
 *       Use development build for full notification support.
 */

// Check if notifications are available (not in Expo Go with SDK 53+)
let NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE = true
try {
  // Try to call a simple notifications API to check availability
  if (typeof Notifications.setNotificationChannelAsync === "undefined") {
    NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE = false
  }
} catch (e) {
  NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE = false
  console.warn("[NotificationHandler] Notifications not available:", e.message)
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Channel setup (Android)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function setupNotificationChannels() {
  if (!NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE) {
    console.warn("[NotificationHandler] Notifications not available - skipping setup")
    return
  }

  if (Platform.OS !== "android") return

  try {
    await Notifications.setNotificationChannelAsync("high_risk", {
      name:               "High Risk Alerts",
      importance:         Notifications.AndroidImportance.MAX,
      vibrationPattern:   [0, 250, 250, 250],
      lightColor:         "#e53e3e",
      sound:              "default",
      enableVibrate:      true,
    })

    await Notifications.setNotificationChannelAsync("reminders", {
      name:               "Reminders",
      importance:         Notifications.AndroidImportance.DEFAULT,
      vibrationPattern:   [0, 150],
      lightColor:         "#4c51bf",
      sound:              "default",
    })

    await Notifications.setNotificationChannelAsync("daily", {
      name:               "Daily Check-ins",
      importance:         Notifications.AndroidImportance.LOW,
      vibrationPattern:   [0, 100],
      lightColor:         "#38a169",
    })

    console.log("[NotificationHandler] Channels configured")
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("[NotificationHandler] Failed to setup channels:", err.message)
  }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// High risk alert
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function sendHighRiskNotification(score) {
  if (!NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE) {
    console.log("[NotificationHandler] Notifications unavailable, skipping high risk alert")
    return
  }

  const pct = Math.round(score * 100)

  try {
    await Notifications.scheduleNotificationAsync({
      content: {
        title:    "⚠️ Depression Risk Alert",
        body:     `Your risk score is ${pct}%. Please check CareMind for support resources and consider reaching out to someone you trust.`,
        data:     { type: "high_risk", score },
        sound:    "default",
        priority: Notifications.AndroidNotificationPriority.MAX,
        categoryIdentifier: "high_risk",
      },
      trigger: null,   // immediate
    })

    console.log("[NotificationHandler] High risk notification sent:", pct + "%")
  } catch (err) {
    console.error("[NotificationHandler] Failed to send notification:", err.message)
  }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// PHQ-9 reminder
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function sendPhqReminderNotification() {
  if (!NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE) return;
  await Notifications.scheduleNotificationAsync({
    content: {
      title: "📋 Weekly Check-in Due",
      body:  "Your weekly PHQ-9 questionnaire is ready. It takes less than 2 minutes and helps track your mental health over time.",
      data:  { type: "phq_reminder" },
      sound: "default",
    },
    trigger: null,   // immediate
  })

  console.log("[NotificationHandler] PHQ reminder sent")
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Schedule daily morning check-in
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function scheduleDailyCheckIn(hour = 9, minute = 0) {
  // Cancel existing daily notifications first
  if (!NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE) return;
  await cancelDailyCheckIn()

  await Notifications.scheduleNotificationAsync({
    content: {
      title: "🌅 Good Morning",
      body:  "CareMind has updated your daily risk score. Tap to view your behavioral insights.",
      data:  { type: "daily_checkin" },
    },
    trigger: {
      hour,
      minute,
      repeats: true,
    },
  })

  console.log(`[NotificationHandler] Daily check-in scheduled at ${hour}:${minute < 10 ? "0" + minute : minute}`)
}

export async function cancelDailyCheckIn() {
  if (!NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE) return;
  const scheduled = await Notifications.getAllScheduledNotificationsAsync()
  const daily     = scheduled.filter(
    (n) => n.content.data?.type === "daily_checkin"
  )
  for (const n of daily) {
    await Notifications.cancelScheduledNotificationAsync(n.identifier)
  }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Monitoring stopped reminder
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function scheduleMonitoringReminder(delayHours = 24) {
  if (!NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE) return;
  await Notifications.scheduleNotificationAsync({
    content: {
      title: "📱 Monitoring Paused",
      body:  "CareMind hasn't collected data in a while. Tap to resume monitoring for accurate risk assessment.",
      data:  { type: "monitoring_reminder" },
    },
    trigger: {
      seconds: delayHours * 3600,
    },
  })
}

export async function cancelMonitoringReminder() {
  if (!NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE) return;
  const scheduled = await Notifications.getAllScheduledNotificationsAsync()
  const reminders = scheduled.filter(
    (n) => n.content.data?.type === "monitoring_reminder"
  )
  for (const n of reminders) {
    await Notifications.cancelScheduledNotificationAsync(n.identifier)
  }
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Notification response handler
// Navigates to correct screen when tapped
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export function setupNotificationResponseHandler(navigation) {
  if (!NOTIFICATIONS_AVAILABLE) return;
  const subscription = Notifications.addNotificationResponseReceivedListener(
    (response) => {
      const data = response.notification.request.content.data

      switch (data?.type) {
        case "high_risk":
          navigation?.navigate("Home")
          break
        case "phq_reminder":
          navigation?.navigate("PHQ")
          break
        case "daily_checkin":
          navigation?.navigate("Home")
          break
        case "monitoring_reminder":
          navigation?.navigate("Home")
          break
        default:
          break
      }
    }
  )

  return subscription
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Get all pending notifications (for settings)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export async function getPendingNotifications() {
  return Notifications.getAllScheduledNotificationsAsync()
}

export async function cancelAllNotifications() {
  await Notifications.cancelAllScheduledNotificationsAsync()
  console.log("[NotificationHandler] All notifications cancelled")
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\components\AlertItem.js
============================================================
import React from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, TouchableOpacity,
} from "react-native";
import { formatRelative } from "../utils/dateUtils";

/**
 * AlertItem.js
 *
 * Single alert row component.
 * Reusable across AlertsScreen and HomeScreen alert feed.
 *
 * Props:
 *   alert         — Alert object from backend
 *   onMarkRead    — (alertId: string) => void
 *   getSeverityStyle — (severity) => { bg, text, border, dot }
 *   compact       — show minimal view (default false)
 */

export default function AlertItem({
  alert,
  onMarkRead,
  getSeverityStyle,
  compact = false,
}) {
  if (!alert) return null

  const style    = getSeverityStyle(alert.severity)
  const isUnread = !alert.is_read

  if (compact) {
    return (
      <View style={[styles.compact, {
        backgroundColor: isUnread ? style.bg : "#f7fafc",
        borderLeftColor: isUnread ? style.border : "#e2e8f0",
        opacity:         isUnread ? 1 : 0.65,
      }]}>
        <View style={[styles.compactDot, { backgroundColor: style.dot }]} />
        <Text style={styles.compactMsg} numberOfLines={2}>
          {alert.message}
        </Text>
        <Text style={styles.compactTime}>
          {formatRelative(alert.created_at)}
        </Text>
      </View>
    )
  }

  return (
    <TouchableOpacity
      style       = {[
        styles.card,
        {
          backgroundColor: isUnread ? style.bg : "#f7fafc",
          borderLeftColor: isUnread ? style.border : "#e2e8f0",
          opacity:         isUnread ? 1 : 0.68,
        }
      ]}
      onPress     = {() => isUnread && onMarkRead?.(alert.id)}
      activeOpacity = {0.8}
      disabled    = {!isUnread}
    >
      {/* Top row */}
      <View style={styles.topRow}>
        <View style={styles.topLeft}>
          {isUnread && (
            <View style={[styles.unreadDot, { backgroundColor: style.dot }]} />
          )}
          <View style={[styles.badge, {
            backgroundColor: style.bg,
            borderColor:     style.border,
            borderWidth:     1,
          }]}>
            <Text style={[styles.badgeText, { color: style.text }]}>
              {alert.severity?.toUpperCase()}
            </Text>
          </View>
        </View>
        <Text style={styles.timeText}>
          {formatRelative(alert.created_at)}
        </Text>
      </View>

      {/* Message */}
      <Text style={[
        styles.message,
        { color: isUnread ? "#2d3748" : "#718096" }
      ]}>
        {alert.message}
      </Text>

      {/* Mark read */}
      {isUnread && (
        <TouchableOpacity
          onPress = {() => onMarkRead?.(alert.id)}
          style   = {styles.markReadBtn}
        >
          <Text style={styles.markReadText}>✓ Mark as read</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>
      )}
    </TouchableOpacity>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  card: {
    borderRadius:    12,
    padding:         14,
    borderLeftWidth: 4,
    gap:             8,
  },
  compact: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    alignItems:      "flex-start",
    padding:         10,
    borderRadius:    8,
    borderLeftWidth: 3,
    gap:             8,
  },
  compactDot: {
    width:           6,
    height:          6,
    borderRadius:    3,
    marginTop:       4,
    flexShrink:      0,
  },
  compactMsg:      { flex: 1, fontSize: 12, color: "#4a5568", lineHeight: 18 },
  compactTime:     { fontSize: 10, color: "#a0aec0" },
  topRow: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    justifyContent:  "space-between",
    alignItems:      "center",
  },
  topLeft: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    alignItems:      "center",
    gap:             8,
  },
  unreadDot: {
    width:           8,
    height:          8,
    borderRadius:    4,
  },
  badge: {
    paddingHorizontal: 8,
    paddingVertical:  3,
    borderRadius:    8,
  },
  badgeText:       { fontSize: 10, fontWeight: "700", letterSpacing: 0.3 },
  timeText:        { fontSize: 11, color: "#a0aec0" },
  message: {
    fontSize:        13,
    lineHeight:      20,
  },
  markReadBtn:     { alignSelf: "flex-start" },
  markReadText: {
    fontSize:        11,
    color:           "#718096",
    textDecorationLine: "underline",
  },
})

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\components\FeatureSummaryCard.js
============================================================
import React from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, TouchableOpacity,
} from "react-native";
import {
  FEATURE_LABELS,
  FEATURE_IMPORTANCE,
  getFeatureStatus,
  STATUS_COLORS,
  normalizeForDisplay,
} from "../ml/modelUtils";
import { FEATURE_UNITS } from "../features/FeatureAggregator";
import { HEALTHY_RANGES } from "../ml/modelUtils";

/**
 * FeatureSummaryCard.js
 *
 * Compact card showing a subset of behavioral features
 * with status indicators and mini progress bars.
 *
 * Used in HomeScreen quick insights section
 * and InsightsScreen tab panels.
 *
 * Props:
 *   namedFeatures — { feature_name: value }
 *   maxFeatures   — how many to show (default 5)
 *   onPress       — () => void — navigate to full insights
 *   title         — card title (default "Behavioral Features")
 */

export default function FeatureSummaryCard({
  namedFeatures = null,
  maxFeatures   = 5,
  onPress       = null,
  title         = "Behavioral Features",
}) {
  if (!namedFeatures) {
    return (
      <View style={styles.emptyCard}>
        <Text style={styles.emptyText}>
          📊 No feature data — run inference to see your behavioral breakdown
        </Text>
      </View>
    )
  }

  // Sort by importance, take top N
  const topFeatures = Object.entries(namedFeatures)
    .map(([name, value]) => ({
      name,
      value,
      label:      FEATURE_LABELS[name]      || name,
      unit:       FEATURE_UNITS[name]       || "",
      importance: FEATURE_IMPORTANCE[name]  || 0,
      status:     getFeatureStatus(name, value),
      barWidth:   normalizeForDisplay(name, value),
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.importance - a.importance)
    .slice(0, maxFeatures)

  const concerns  = topFeatures.filter((f) => f.status === "concern").length
  const warnings  = topFeatures.filter((f) => f.status === "warning").length
  const normals   = topFeatures.filter((f) => f.status === "normal").length

  return (
    <TouchableOpacity
      style         = {styles.card}
      onPress       = {onPress}
      disabled      = {!onPress}
      activeOpacity = {0.8}
    >
      {/* Header */}
      <View style={styles.cardHeader}>
        <Text style={styles.cardTitle}>{title}</Text>
        {onPress && (
          <Text style={styles.viewAll}>View all →</Text>
        )}
      </View>

      {/* Status summary pills */}
      <View style={styles.statusSummary}>
        {normals > 0 && (
          <StatusPill count={normals} status="normal" />
        )}
        {warnings > 0 && (
          <StatusPill count={warnings} status="warning" />
        )}
        {concerns > 0 && (
          <StatusPill count={concerns} status="concern" />
        )}
      </View>

      {/* Feature rows */}
      {topFeatures.map((feat) => {
        const color  = STATUS_COLORS[feat.status]
        const range  = HEALTHY_RANGES[feat.name]

        return (
          <View key={feat.name} style={styles.featureRow}>
            {/* Name + value */}
            <View style={styles.featureLeft}>
              <View style={[
                styles.statusIndicator,
                { backgroundColor: color }
              ]} />
              <Text style={styles.featureName} numberOfLines={1}>
                {feat.label}
              </Text>
            </View>

            {/* Mini bar */}
            <View style={styles.miniBarWrap}>
              {range && (
                <View style={[styles.healthyZone, {
                  left:  `${normalizeForDisplay(feat.name, range.min) * 100}%`,
                  right: `${(1 - normalizeForDisplay(feat.name, range.max)) * 100}%`,
                }]} />
              )}
              <View style={[
                styles.miniBar,
                {
                  width:           `${Math.min(feat.barWidth * 100, 100)}%`,
                  backgroundColor: color,
                }
              ]} />
            </View>

            {/* Value */}
            <Text style={[styles.featureValue, { color }]}>
              {typeof feat.value === "number"
                ? feat.value % 1 === 0
                  ? feat.value
                  : feat.value.toFixed(1)
                : "—"}
            </Text>
          </View>
        )
      })}

      {/* Importance note */}
      <Text style={styles.importanceNote}>
        Sorted by feature importance from trained ML model
      </Text>
    </TouchableOpacity>
  )
}

function StatusPill({ count, status }) {
  const color = STATUS_COLORS[status]
  const labels = { normal: "Normal", warning: "Watch", concern: "Concern" }

  return (
    <View style={[styles.pill, { backgroundColor: color + "20" }]}>
      <View style={[styles.pillDot, { backgroundColor: color }]} />
      <Text style={[styles.pillText, { color }]}>
        {count} {labels[status]}
      </Text>
    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  card: {
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderRadius:    12,
    padding:         14,
    shadowColor:     "#000",
    shadowOpacity:   0.04,
    elevation:       1,
    gap:             10,
  },
  emptyCard: {
    backgroundColor: "#f7fafc",
    borderRadius:    12,
    padding:         16,
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     "#e2e8f0",
    alignItems:      "center",
  },
  emptyText:       { fontSize: 13, color: "#a0aec0", textAlign: "center" },
  cardHeader: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    justifyContent:  "space-between",
    alignItems:      "center",
  },
  cardTitle:       { fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "600", color: "#2d3748" },
  viewAll:         { fontSize: 12, color: "#4c51bf", fontWeight: "500" },
  statusSummary: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    gap:             6,
    flexWrap:        "wrap",
  },
  pill: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    alignItems:      "center",
    gap:             5,
    paddingHorizontal: 10,
    paddingVertical:  4,
    borderRadius:    12,
  },
  pillDot: {
    width:           6,
    height:          6,
    borderRadius:    3,
  },
  pillText:        { fontSize: 11, fontWeight: "600" },
  featureRow: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    alignItems:      "center",
    gap:             8,
  },
  featureLeft: {
    flexDirection:   "row",
    alignItems:      "center",
    gap:             6,
    width:           110,
  },
  statusIndicator: {
    width:           6,
    height:          6,
    borderRadius:    3,
    flexShrink:      0,
  },
  featureName:     { fontSize: 12, color: "#4a5568", flex: 1 },
  miniBarWrap: {
    flex:            1,
    height:          6,
    backgroundColor: "#f0f0f0",
    borderRadius:    3,
    overflow:        "hidden",
    position:        "relative",
  },
  healthyZone: {
    position:        "absolute",
    top:             0,
    bottom:          0,
    backgroundColor: "#38a16925",
  },
  miniBar: {
    position:        "absolute",
    top:             0,
    left:            0,
    height:          "100%",
    borderRadius:    3,
    minWidth:        2,
  },
  featureValue:    { fontSize: 12, fontWeight: "600", width: 40, textAlign: "right" },
  importanceNote:  { fontSize: 10, color: "#a0aec0", textAlign: "center" },
})

import React from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet,
  TouchableOpacity, Platform,
} from "react-native";
import { useNavigation, useRoute } from "@react-navigation/native";
import { useAuth }    from "../context/AuthContext";
import useAlerts      from "../hooks/useAlerts";
import { useMonitoring as useMonitoringCtx }
  from "../context/MonitoringContext";

/**
 * Navbar.js
 *
 * Optional top navigation bar for screens that need
 * a custom header (instead of React Navigation's default).
 *
 * Shows: app name, monitoring status dot, alert count, settings button.
 *
 * Props:
 *   title       — screen title (default "CareMind")
 *   showBack    — show back button (default false)
 *   rightAction — { label, onPress } optional right button
 */

export default function Navbar({
  title       = "CareMind",
  showBack    = false,
  rightAction = null,
}) {
  const navigation     = useNavigation()
  const { user }       = useAuth()
  const { unreadCount} = useAlerts()
  const { isMonitoring, sensorStatus } = useMonitoringCtx()

  const activeCount = Object.values(sensorStatus).filter(
    (s) => s === "active"
  ).length
  const totalCount  = Object.values(sensorStatus).length

  return (
    <View style={styles.navbar}>

      {/* Left side */}
      <View style={styles.left}>
        {showBack ? (
          <TouchableOpacity
            onPress       = {() => navigation.goBack()}
            style         = {styles.backBtn}
            activeOpacity = {0.7}
          >
            <Text style={styles.backText}>← Back</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        ) : (
          <View style={styles.brandRow}>
            <Text style={styles.brandEmoji}>🧠</Text>
            <View>
              <Text style={styles.brandName}>{title}</Text>
              {user && (
                <Text style={styles.brandSub}>
                  {user.role === "clinician" ? "Clinician" : "Patient"}
                </Text>
              )}
            </View>
          </View>
        )}
      </View>

      {/* Right side */}
      <View style={styles.right}>

        {/* Monitoring status */}
        <View style={styles.monitorBadge}>
          <View style={[
            styles.monitorDot,
            { backgroundColor: isMonitoring ? "#38a169" : "#a0aec0" }
          ]} />
          <Text style={styles.monitorText}>
            {isMonitoring
              ? `${activeCount}/${totalCount}`
              : "Off"}
          </Text>
        </View>

        {/* Alert bell */}
        <TouchableOpacity
          onPress       = {() => navigation.navigate("Alerts")}
          style         = {styles.bellBtn}
          activeOpacity = {0.7}
        >
          <Text style={styles.bellEmoji}>🔔</Text>
          {unreadCount > 0 && (
            <View style={styles.bellBadge}>
              <Text style={styles.bellBadgeText}>
                {unreadCount > 99 ? "99+" : unreadCount}
              </Text>
            </View>
          )}
        </TouchableOpacity>

        {/* Right action or settings */}
        {rightAction ? (
          <TouchableOpacity
            onPress       = {rightAction.onPress}
            style         = {styles.actionBtn}
            activeOpacity = {0.7}
          >
            <Text style={styles.actionText}>{rightAction.label}</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        ) : (
          <TouchableOpacity
            onPress       = {() => navigation.navigate("Settings")}
            style         = {styles.settingsBtn}
            activeOpacity = {0.7}
          >
            <Text style={styles.settingsEmoji}>⚙️</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        )}
      </View>
    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({

    paddingBottom:    12,
    backgroundColor:  "#ffffff",
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "#e2e8f0",
    shadowColor:      "#000",
    shadowOpacity:    0.04,
    shadowRadius:     4,
    elevation:        2,
  },
  left:             { flex: 1 },
  backBtn:          { paddingVertical: 4 },
  backText:         { fontSize: 15, color: "#4c51bf", fontWeight: "500" },
  brandRow: {
    flexDirection:    "row",
    alignItems:       "center",
    gap:              8,
  },

  right: {

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\components\PHQ9Form.js
============================================================
import React, { useState, useRef } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet, TouchableOpacity,
  Animated, ActivityIndicator, ScrollView,
} from "react-native";
import {
  PHQ_QUESTIONS,
  PHQ_OPTIONS,
  PHQ_FOOTER_NOTE,
} from "../constants/phqQuestions";

/**
 * PHQ9Form.js
 *
 * Reusable PHQ-9 questionnaire form component.
 * One question at a time, with progress bar and navigation.
 *
 * Props:
 *   onSubmit    — async (totalScore: number) => void
 *   onCancel    — () => void
 *   submitting  — boolean
 */

export default function PHQ9Form({ onSubmit, onCancel, submitting = false }) {
  const [answers,   setAnswers]   = useState({})
  const [currentQ,  setCurrentQ]  = useState(0)
  const slideAnim = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current

  const question   = PHQ_QUESTIONS[currentQ]
  const isLast     = currentQ === PHQ_QUESTIONS.length - 1
  const allAnswered = PHQ_QUESTIONS.every((q) => answers[q.id] !== undefined)
  const currentScore = PHQ_QUESTIONS.reduce(
    (sum, q) => sum + (answers[q.id] || 0), 0
  )

  const _setAnswer = (id, value) => {
    setAnswers((prev) => ({ ...prev, [id]: value }))
  }

  const _animate = (direction, callback) => {
    Animated.sequence([
      Animated.timing(slideAnim, {
        toValue:         direction * -20,
        duration:        120,
        useNativeDriver: true,
      }),
      Animated.timing(slideAnim, {
        toValue:         direction * 20,
        duration:        0,
        useNativeDriver: true,
      }),
      Animated.timing(slideAnim, {
        toValue:         0,
        duration:        150,
        useNativeDriver: true,
      }),
    ]).start()
    setTimeout(callback, 120)
  }

  const _next = () => {
    if (currentQ < PHQ_QUESTIONS.length - 1) {
      _animate(1, () => setCurrentQ((q) => q + 1))
    }
  }

  const _prev = () => {
    if (currentQ > 0) {
      _animate(-1, () => setCurrentQ((q) => q - 1))
    }
  }

  const _submit = async () => {
    if (!allAnswered) return
    const total = PHQ_QUESTIONS.reduce(
      (sum, q) => sum + (answers[q.id] || 0), 0
    )
    await onSubmit(total)
  }

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>

      {/* Instruction */}
      <Text style={styles.instruction}>{PHQ_FOOTER_NOTE}</Text>

      {/* Progress */}
      <View style={styles.progressWrap}>
        <View style={styles.progressRow}>
          <Text style={styles.progressText}>
            {currentQ + 1} / {PHQ_QUESTIONS.length}
          </Text>
          <Text style={styles.progressScore}>
            Running score: <Text style={styles.progressScoreBold}>{currentScore}</Text>
          </Text>
        </View>
        <View style={styles.progressBar}>
          <View style={[styles.progressFill, {
            width: `${((currentQ + 1) / PHQ_QUESTIONS.length) * 100}%`
          }]} />
        </View>
      </View>

      {/* Question */}
      <Animated.View style={[
        styles.questionCard,
        { transform: [{ translateX: slideAnim }] }
      ]}>
        <Text style={styles.qNum}>Question {question.id}</Text>
        <Text style={styles.qText}>{question.text}</Text>
        {question.hint && (
          <Text style={styles.qHint}>{question.hint}</Text>
        )}
        {question.isSensitive && (
          <View style={styles.sensitiveNote}>
            <Text style={styles.sensitiveText}>
              🔒 Your response is private and handled with care
            </Text>
          </View>
        )}

        {/* Answer options */}
        <View style={styles.options}>
          {PHQ_OPTIONS.map((opt) => {
            const selected = answers[question.id] === opt.value
            return (
              <TouchableOpacity
                key       = {opt.value}
                style     = {[styles.option, selected && styles.optionSelected]}
                onPress   = {() => _setAnswer(question.id, opt.value)}
                activeOpacity = {0.7}
              >
                <View style={[
                  styles.radio,
                  selected && styles.radioSelected,
                ]}>
                  {selected && <View style={styles.radioDot} />}
                </View>
                <View style={styles.optionContent}>
                  <Text style={[
                    styles.optionLabel,
                    selected && styles.optionLabelSelected,
                  ]}>
                    {opt.label}
                  </Text>
                  <Text style={styles.optionPts}>{opt.value} pts</Text>
                </View>
              </TouchableOpacity>
            )
          })}
        </View>
      </Animated.View>

      {/* Navigation */}
      <View style={styles.navRow}>
        <TouchableOpacity
          style     = {[styles.navBtn, currentQ === 0 && styles.navBtnDisabled]}
          onPress   = {_prev}
          disabled  = {currentQ === 0}
        >
          <Text style={styles.navBtnText}>← Back</Text>
        </TouchableOpacity>

        {!isLast ? (
          <TouchableOpacity
            style     = {[
              styles.navBtnPrimary,
              answers[question.id] === undefined && styles.navBtnDisabled,
            ]}
            onPress   = {_next}
            disabled  = {answers[question.id] === undefined}
          >
            <Text style={styles.navBtnPrimaryText}>Next →</Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>
        ) : (
          <TouchableOpacity
            style     = {[
              styles.submitBtn,
              (!allAnswered || submitting) && styles.navBtnDisabled,
            ]}
            onPress   = {_submit}
            disabled  = {!allAnswered || submitting}
          >
            {submitting ? (
              <ActivityIndicator color="#fff" size="small" />
            ) : (
              <Text style={styles.submitBtnText}>Submit ✓</Text>
            )}
          </TouchableOpacity>
        )}
      </View>

      {/* Cancel */}
      <TouchableOpacity onPress={onCancel} style={styles.cancelBtn}>
        <Text style={styles.cancelText}>Cancel questionnaire</Text>
      </TouchableOpacity>

    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:       { gap: 14 },
  instruction:     { fontSize: 13, color: "#718096", fontStyle: "italic", lineHeight: 18 },
  progressWrap:    { gap: 6 },
  progressRow: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    justifyContent: "space-between",
    alignItems:     "center",
  },
  progressText:    { fontSize: 12, color: "#718096" },

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\components\RemedyCard.js
============================================================
import React, { useState } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet,
  TouchableOpacity, Animated, Linking,
} from "react-native";
import { REMEDIES }        from "../constants/remedies";
import { RISK_COLORS, RISK_BG_COLORS, RISK_BORDER_COLORS }
  from "../constants/thresholds";

/**
 * RemedyCard.js
 *
 * Reusable remedy + preventive measures card.
 * Can be embedded in HomeScreen or any other screen.
 *
 * Props:
 *   riskLevel — "low" | "moderate" | "high"
 *   compact   — show only first 2 sections (default false)
 */

export default function RemedyCard({ riskLevel = "low", compact = false }) {
  const [expandedIdx, setExpandedIdx] = useState(compact ? -1 : 0)

  const remedy = REMEDIES[riskLevel]
  if (!remedy) return null

  const color      = RISK_COLORS[riskLevel]
  const bgColor    = RISK_BG_COLORS[riskLevel]
  const borderColor= RISK_BORDER_COLORS[riskLevel]

  const sections = compact
    ? remedy.sections.slice(0, 2)
    : remedy.sections

  const _callNumber = (number) => {
    const url = `tel:${number.replace(/-/g, "")}`
    Linking.canOpenURL(url).then((can) => {
      if (can) Linking.openURL(url)
    })
  }

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>

      {/* Header */}
      <View style={[styles.header, { backgroundColor: bgColor, borderColor }]}>
        <Text style={[styles.title, { color }]}>{remedy.title}</Text>
        <Text style={[styles.subtitle, { color }]}>{remedy.subtitle}</Text>
      </View>

      {/* Sections */}
      {sections.map((section, idx) => (
        <View key={idx} style={styles.section}>
          <TouchableOpacity
            style       = {[styles.sectionHeader, { borderLeftColor: color }]}
            onPress     = {() => setExpandedIdx(expandedIdx === idx ? -1 : idx)}
            activeOpacity = {0.7}
          >
            <Text style={styles.sectionHeading}>{section.heading}</Text>
            <Text style={[styles.chevron, { color }]}>
              {expandedIdx === idx ? "▲" : "▼"}
            </Text>
          </TouchableOpacity>

          {expandedIdx === idx && (
            <View style={styles.itemsWrap}>
              {section.items.map((item, i) => (
                <View key={i} style={styles.item}>
                  <View style={[styles.dot, { backgroundColor: color }]} />
                  <Text style={styles.itemText}>{item}</Text>
                </View>
              ))}
            </View>
          )}
        </View>
      ))}

      {/* Crisis numbers */}
      {remedy.crisisVisible && remedy.crisisNumbers && !compact && (
        <View style={styles.crisisBanner}>
          <Text style={styles.crisisTitle}>🆘 Crisis Helplines</Text>
          {remedy.crisisNumbers.map((c) => (
            <TouchableOpacity
              key     = {c.number}
              onPress = {() => _callNumber(c.number)}
              style   = {styles.crisisRow}
              activeOpacity = {0.7}
            >
              <View style={styles.crisisInfo}>
                <Text style={styles.crisisName}>{c.name}</Text>
                <Text style={styles.crisisHours}>{c.hours}</Text>
              </View>
              <Text style={styles.crisisNumber}>{c.number}</Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          ))}
        </View>
      )}

      {/* Footer */}
      <Text style={[styles.footer, { color }]}>{remedy.footer}</Text>

    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:      { gap: 6 },
  header: {
    padding:        16,
    borderRadius:   12,
    borderWidth:    1,
    gap:            4,
  },
  title:          { fontSize: 17, fontWeight: "700" },
  subtitle:       { fontSize: 13, lineHeight: 18 },
  section: {
    backgroundColor: "#ffffff",
    borderRadius:   10,
    overflow:       "hidden",
    shadowColor:    "#000",
    shadowOpacity:  0.03,
    elevation:      1,
  },
  sectionHeader: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    justifyContent: "space-between",
    alignItems:     "center",
    padding:        14,
    borderLeftWidth: 3,
  },
  sectionHeading: { fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "600", color: "#2d3748", flex: 1 },
  chevron:        { fontSize: 11, marginLeft: 8 },
  itemsWrap:      { paddingHorizontal: 14, paddingBottom: 14 },
  item:           { flexDirection: "row", alignItems: "flex-start", marginTop: 10 },
  dot: {
    width:          7,
    height:         7,
    borderRadius:   4,
    marginTop:      5,
    marginRight:    10,
    flexShrink:     0,
  },
  itemText:       { flex: 1, fontSize: 13, color: "#4a5568", lineHeight: 20 },
  crisisBanner: {
    backgroundColor: "#fff5f5",
    borderWidth:     1,
    borderColor:     "#fc8181",
    borderRadius:    10,
    padding:         14,
    gap:             10,
  },
  crisisTitle:    { fontSize: 14, fontWeight: "700", color: "#c53030" },
  crisisRow: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    justifyContent: "space-between",
    alignItems:     "center",
    paddingVertical: 6,
    borderBottomWidth: 1,
    borderBottomColor: "#fee2e2",
  },
  crisisInfo:     { gap: 2 },
  crisisName:     { fontSize: 13, fontWeight: "600", color: "#c53030" },
  crisisHours:    { fontSize: 11, color: "#a0aec0" },
  crisisNumber:   { fontSize: 15, fontWeight: "700", color: "#e53e3e" },
  footer: {
    textAlign:      "center",
    fontSize:       12,
    fontStyle:      "italic",
    paddingHorizontal: 8,
  },
})

import React from 'react';
import { View, StyleSheet, Text } from 'react-native';

const RiskMeterBar = ({ score = 0.5 }) => {
  const getRiskColor = (value) => {
    if (value < 0.33) return '#34C759'; // Green
    if (value < 0.66) return '#FF9500'; // Orange
    return '#FF3B30'; // Red
  };

  const lowPercentage = 33;
  const moderatePercentage = 33;
  const highPercentage = 34;

  const indicatorPosition = Math.min(100, score * 100);

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>
      <View style={styles.barContainer}>
        <View style={[styles.section, styles.lowSection]} />
        <View style={[styles.section, styles.moderateSection]} />
        <View style={[styles.section, styles.highSection]} />

        <View
          style={[
            styles.indicator,
            {
              left: `${indicatorPosition}%`,
              backgroundColor: getRiskColor(score),
            },
          ]}
        />
      </View>

      <View style={styles.labelsContainer}>
        <Text style={styles.label}>Low</Text>
        <Text style={styles.label}>Moderate</Text>
        <Text style={styles.label}>High</Text>
      </View>
    </View>
  );
};

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container: {
    marginVertical: 20,
  },
  barContainer: {
    height: 30,
    borderRadius: 15,
    overflow: 'hidden',
    flexDirection: 'row',
    position: 'relative',
  },
  section: {
    flex: 1,
  },
  lowSection: {
    backgroundColor: '#34C759',
  },
  moderateSection: {
    backgroundColor: '#FF9500',
  },
  highSection: {
    backgroundColor: '#FF3B30',
  },
  indicator: {
    position: 'absolute',
    width: 8,
    height: 30,
    top: 0,
    borderRadius: 4,
  },
  labelsContainer: {
    flexDirection: 'row',
    justifyContent: 'space-around',
    marginTop: 10,
  },
  label: {
    fontSize: 12,
    fontWeight: '600',
  },
});

export default RiskMeterBar;

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\components\RiskScoreGauge.js
============================================================
import React, { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { View, Text, StyleSheet, Animated } from "react-native";
import { RISK_COLORS, RISK_LABELS, getRiskLevel } from "../constants/thresholds";

/**
 * RiskScoreGauge.js
 *
 * Animated circular gauge showing risk score.
 * Uses React Native Animated + SVG-like approach
 * with pure View transforms (no SVG library needed).
 *
 * Props:
 *   score     — 0.0 to 1.0
 *   size      — diameter in px (default 160)
 *   showLabel — show severity label below (default true)
 */

export default function RiskScoreGauge({
  score     = null,
  size      = 160,
  showLabel = true,
}) {
  const animatedScore = useRef(new Animated.Value(0)).current
  const pulseAnim     = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current

  const riskLevel = getRiskLevel(score)
  const color     = RISK_COLORS[riskLevel]
  const pct       = score != null ? Math.round(score * 100) : null

  useEffect(() => {
    if (score != null) {
      Animated.timing(animatedScore, {
        toValue:         score,
        duration:        800,
        useNativeDriver: false,
      }).start()
    }
  }, [score])

  // Pulse for high risk
  useEffect(() => {
    if (riskLevel === "high") {
      Animated.loop(
        Animated.sequence([
          Animated.timing(pulseAnim, {
            toValue:         1.05,
            duration:        800,
            useNativeDriver: true,
          }),
          Animated.timing(pulseAnim, {
            toValue:         1.0,
            duration:        800,
            useNativeDriver: true,
          }),
        ])
      ).start()
    } else {
      pulseAnim.setValue(1)
    }
  }, [riskLevel])

  const strokeWidth  = size * 0.08
  const radius       = (size - strokeWidth) / 2
  const cx           = size / 2
  const circumference = 2 * Math.PI * radius

  // Arc angle (270 degrees total, starting from bottom-left)
  const startAngle   = 135
  const totalAngle   = 270

  const getArcStyle = (pctValue) => {
    const angle   = (pctValue / 100) * totalAngle
    const rotation = startAngle + angle / 2
    return {
      transform: [{ rotate: `${rotation}deg` }],
    }
  }

  return (
    <Animated.View style={[
      styles.wrapper,
      { width: size, height: size },
      { transform: [{ scale: pulseAnim }] },
    ]}>

      {/* Background track */}
      <View style={[styles.track, {
        width:        size,
        height:       size,
        borderRadius: size / 2,
        borderWidth:  strokeWidth,
        borderColor:  "#f0f0f0",
      }]} />

      {/* Score arc — simulated with a colored border segment */}
      <View style={[styles.arcContainer, { width: size, height: size }]}>
        {pct != null && (
          <View style={[
            styles.arc,
            {
              width:         size,
              height:        size,
              borderRadius:  size / 2,
              borderWidth:   strokeWidth,
              borderColor:   "transparent",
              borderTopColor: color,
              borderRightColor: pct > 25 ? color : "transparent",
              borderBottomColor: pct > 50 ? color : "transparent",
              borderLeftColor: pct > 75 ? color : "transparent",
              transform: [{ rotate: `${135 + (pct / 100) * 135}deg` }],
            }
          ]} />
        )}
      </View>

      {/* Center content */}
      <View style={[styles.center, { width: size, height: size }]}>
        <Text style={[
          styles.scoreText,
          { fontSize: size * 0.22, color }
        ]}>
          {pct != null ? `${pct}%` : "—"}
        </Text>
        {showLabel && (
          <Text style={[styles.levelText, { color, fontSize: size * 0.07 }]}>
            {RISK_LABELS[riskLevel]}
          </Text>
        )}
      </View>

    </Animated.View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  wrapper: {
    position:       "relative",
    alignItems:     "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
  },
  track: {
    position: "absolute",
    top:      0,
    left:     0,
  },
  arcContainer: {
    position: "absolute",
    top:      0,
    left:     0,
  },
  arc: {
    position: "absolute",
    top:      0,
    left:     0,
  },
  center: {
    position:       "absolute",
    top:            0,
    left:           0,
    alignItems:     "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
    gap:            2,
  },
  scoreText:      { fontWeight: "800", letterSpacing: -1 },
  levelText:      { fontWeight: "700", letterSpacing: 0.5 },
})

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\components\ScoreTimelineChart.js
============================================================
import React, { useMemo } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet,
  ScrollView, TouchableOpacity,
} from "react-native";
import { RISK_COLORS, getRiskLevel } from "../constants/thresholds";
import { formatShortDate }           from "../utils/dateUtils";

/**
 * ScoreTimelineChart.js
 *
 * Custom bar chart for risk score timeline.
 * Built with pure React Native Views — no chart library needed.
 * This keeps the bundle small and avoids expo-incompatible deps.
 *
 * Props:
 *   scores      — RiskScore[] from RiskScoreStore
 *   height      — chart height (default 160)
 *   maxBars     — max number of bars to show (default 14)
 *   onBarPress  — (score) => void
 */

const THRESHOLD_HIGH = 0.65
const THRESHOLD_MOD  = 0.30

export default function ScoreTimelineChart({
  scores    = [],
  height    = 160,
  maxBars   = 14,
  onBarPress = null,
}) {
  const data = useMemo(() => {
    return scores
      .slice(0, maxBars)
      .reverse()
      .map((s) => ({
        ...s,
        pct:   s.score * 100,
        color: RISK_COLORS[getRiskLevel(s.score)],
        date:  formatShortDate(s.timestamp),
      }))
  }, [scores, maxBars])

  if (!data.length) {
    return (
      <View style={[styles.empty, { height }]}>
        <Text style={styles.emptyText}>No data yet</Text>
        <Text style={styles.emptyHint}>
          Start monitoring and run inference to see your timeline
        </Text>
      </View>
    )
  }

  const chartHeight = height - 32   // leave room for date labels

  return (
    <View style={styles.container}>

      {/* Y-axis reference lines */}
      <View style={[styles.chartArea, { height: chartHeight }]}>

        {/* Threshold lines */}
        <View style={[styles.thresholdLine, {
          bottom:      `${THRESHOLD_HIGH * 100}%`,
          borderColor: "#fc8181",
        }]}>
          <Text style={[styles.thresholdLabel, { color: "#e53e3e" }]}>
            65% High
          </Text>
        </View>
        <View style={[styles.thresholdLine, {
          bottom:      `${THRESHOLD_MOD * 100}%`,
          borderColor: "#f6ad55",
        }]}>
          <Text style={[styles.thresholdLabel, { color: "#dd6b20" }]}>
            30% Mod
          </Text>
        </View>

        {/* Bars */}
        <ScrollView
          horizontal
          showsHorizontalScrollIndicator = {false}
          contentContainerStyle          = {styles.barsContainer}
        >
          {data.map((item, idx) => (
            <TouchableOpacity
              key       = {idx}
              style     = {styles.barWrap}
              onPress   = {() => onBarPress?.(item)}
              disabled  = {!onBarPress}
              activeOpacity = {0.7}
            >
              {/* Score label on top */}
              <Text style={[styles.barLabel, { color: item.color }]}>
                {Math.round(item.pct)}%
              </Text>

              {/* Bar */}
              <View style={[styles.barTrack, { height: chartHeight - 24 }]}>
                <View style={[
                  styles.bar,
                  {
                    height:          `${item.pct}%`,
                    backgroundColor: item.color,
                  }
                ]} />
              </View>

              {/* Date label */}
              <Text style={styles.barDate} numberOfLines={1}>
                {item.date}
              </Text>
            </TouchableOpacity>
          ))}
        </ScrollView>
      </View>

      {/* Legend */}
      <View style={styles.legend}>
        {[
          { color: RISK_COLORS.low,      label: "Low (<30%)"   },
          { color: RISK_COLORS.moderate, label: "Mod (30–65%)" },
          { color: RISK_COLORS.high,     label: "High (>65%)"  },
        ].map((item) => (
          <View key={item.label} style={styles.legendItem}>
            <View style={[styles.legendDot, { backgroundColor: item.color }]} />
            <Text style={styles.legendText}>{item.label}</Text>
          </View>
        ))}
      </View>
    </View>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  container:      { gap: 8 },
  empty: {
    alignItems:     "center",
    justifyContent: "center",
    backgroundColor: "#f7fafc",
    borderRadius:   12,
    gap:            6,
  },
  emptyText:      { fontSize: 14, color: "#718096", fontWeight: "500" },
  emptyHint:      { fontSize: 12, color: "#a0aec0", textAlign: "center" },
  chartArea: {
    position:       "relative",
    overflow:       "hidden",
  },
  thresholdLine: {
    position:       "absolute",
    left:           0,
    right:          0,
    borderTopWidth: 1,
    borderStyle:    "dashed",
    zIndex:         1,
  },
  thresholdLabel: {
    fontSize:       9,
    fontWeight:     "600",
    position:       "absolute",
    right:          0,
    top:            -12,
  },
  barsContainer: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    alignItems:     "flex-end",
    gap:            6,
    paddingHorizontal: 4,
    paddingBottom:  4,
  },
  barWrap: {
    alignItems:     "center",
    width:          40,
    gap:            2,
  },
  barLabel:       { fontSize: 9, fontWeight: "600" },
  barTrack: {
    width:          28,
    backgroundColor: "#f0f0f0",
    borderRadius:   4,
    overflow:       "hidden",
    justifyContent: "flex-end",
  },
  bar: {
    width:          "100%",
    borderRadius:   4,
    minHeight:      2,
  },
  barDate: {
    fontSize:       9,
    color:          "#a0aec0",
    width:          40,
    textAlign:      "center",
  },
  legend: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    justifyContent: "center",
    gap:            16,
    flexWrap:       "wrap",
  },
  legendItem: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    alignItems:     "center",
    gap:            5,
  },
  legendDot: {
    width:          8,
    height:         8,
    borderRadius:   2,
  },
  legendText:     { fontSize: 11, color: "#718096" },
})

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import {
  View, Text, StyleSheet,
  Animated, TouchableOpacity,
} from "react-native";

/**
 * SensorStatusBadge.js
 *
 * Displays the active/idle/error status of each sensor.
 * Used in HomeScreen and SettingsScreen to give users
 * real-time feedback on which sensors are collecting data.
 *
 * Props:
 *   sensors   — object: { gps, accel, step, screen, battery }
 *               each value: "active" | "idle" | "error"
 *   compact   — show small horizontal strip (default false)
 */

const SENSOR_CONFIG = [
  { key: "gps",     label: "GPS",     emoji: "📍" },
  { key: "accel",   label: "Motion",  emoji: "📱" },
  { key: "step",    label: "Steps",   emoji: "👟" },
  { key: "screen",  label: "Screen",  emoji: "🖥️" },
  { key: "battery", label: "Battery", emoji: "🔋" },
]

const STATUS_CONFIG = {
  active:  { color: "#38a169", bg: "#f0fff4", border: "#9ae6b4", label: "Active"  },
  idle:    { color: "#a0aec0", bg: "#f7fafc", border: "#e2e8f0", label: "Idle"    },
  error:   { color: "#e53e3e", bg: "#fff5f5", border: "#fc8181", label: "Error"   },
  unknown: { color: "#718096", bg: "#f7fafc", border: "#e2e8f0", label: "Unknown" },
}

export default function SensorStatusBadge({
  sensors = {},
  compact = false,
  onPress = null,
}) {
  if (compact) {
    return (
      <CompactBadge sensors={sensors} onPress={onPress} />
    )
  }

  return (
    <View style={styles.grid}>
      {SENSOR_CONFIG.map((sensor) => {
        const status = sensors[sensor.key] || "unknown"
        const config = STATUS_CONFIG[status] || STATUS_CONFIG.unknown

        return (
          <SensorTile
            key    = {sensor.key}
            sensor = {sensor}
            config = {config}
            status = {status}
          />
        )
      })}
    </View>
  )
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Full tile view
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function SensorTile({ sensor, config, status }) {
  const pulseAnim = useRef(new Animated.Value(1)).current

  useEffect(() => {
    if (status === "active") {
      Animated.loop(
        Animated.sequence([
          Animated.timing(pulseAnim, {
            toValue:         0.4,
            duration:        1000,
            useNativeDriver: true,
          }),
          Animated.timing(pulseAnim, {
            toValue:         1,
            duration:        1000,
            useNativeDriver: true,
          }),
        ])
      ).start()
    } else {
      pulseAnim.setValue(1)
    }
  }, [status])

  return (
    <View style={[styles.tile, {
      backgroundColor: config.bg,
      borderColor:     config.border,
    }]}>
      <Text style={styles.tileEmoji}>{sensor.emoji}</Text>
      <Text style={styles.tileLabel}>{sensor.label}</Text>

      <View style={styles.statusRow}>
        <Animated.View style={[
          styles.statusDot,
          {
            backgroundColor: config.color,
            opacity:         status === "active" ? pulseAnim : 1,
          }
        ]} />
        <Text style={[styles.statusLabel, { color: config.color }]}>
          {config.label}
        </Text>
      </View>
    </View>
  )
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Compact horizontal strip
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function CompactBadge({ sensors, onPress }) {
  const activeCount = SENSOR_CONFIG.filter(
    (s) => sensors[s.key] === "active"
  ).length

  return (
    <TouchableOpacity
      onPress   = {onPress}
      style     = {styles.compact}
      activeOpacity = {0.7}
      disabled  = {!onPress}
    >
      <View style={styles.compactDots}>
        {SENSOR_CONFIG.map((sensor) => {
          const status = sensors[sensor.key] || "unknown"
          const config = STATUS_CONFIG[status] || STATUS_CONFIG.unknown
          return (
            <View
              key   = {sensor.key}
              style = {[styles.compactDot, { backgroundColor: config.color }]}
            />
          )
        })}
      </View>
      <Text style={styles.compactText}>
        {activeCount}/{SENSOR_CONFIG.length} sensors active
      </Text>
    </TouchableOpacity>
  )
}

const styles = StyleSheet.create({
  grid: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    flexWrap:       "wrap",
    gap:            8,
  },
  tile: {
    width:          "18%",
    minWidth:       60,
    borderRadius:   10,
    padding:        10,
    alignItems:     "center",
    borderWidth:    1,
    gap:            4,
    flex:           1,
  },
  tileEmoji:      { fontSize: 20 },
  tileLabel:      { fontSize: 10, color: "#4a5568", fontWeight: "500" },
  statusRow: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    alignItems:     "center",
    gap:            4,
  },
  statusDot: {
    width:          6,
    height:         6,
    borderRadius:   3,
  },
  statusLabel:    { fontSize: 9, fontWeight: "600" },
  compact: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    alignItems:     "center",
    gap:            8,
    paddingHorizontal: 12,
    paddingVertical: 6,
    backgroundColor: "#f7fafc",
    borderRadius:   20,
    borderWidth:    1,
    borderColor:    "#e2e8f0",
  },
  compactDots: {
    flexDirection:  "row",
    gap:            4,
    alignItems:     "center",
  },
  compactDot: {
    width:          7,
    height:         7,
    borderRadius:   4,
  },
  compactText:    { fontSize: 12, color: "#718096", fontWeight: "500" },
})

  __DEV__
    ? "http://192.168.1.50:5000/api"   // ← CHANGE THIS to your local IP:5000/api
    : "https://your-production-url.com/api";

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\constants\thresholds.js
