import { RISK_HIGH_THRESHOLD, RISK_MODERATE_THRESHOLD } from "./config";

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Risk level derivation
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getRiskLevel = (score) => {
  if (score == null)                    return "unknown";
  if (score >= RISK_HIGH_THRESHOLD)     return "high";
  if (score >= RISK_MODERATE_THRESHOLD) return "moderate";
  return "low";
};

export const RISK_COLORS = {
  high:     "#c53030",
  moderate: "#c05621",
  low:      "#38a169",
  unknown:  "#718096",
};

export const RISK_BG_COLORS = {
  high:     "#fff5f5",
  moderate: "#fffaf0",
  low:      "#f0fff4",
  unknown:  "#f7fafc",
};

export const RISK_BORDER_COLORS = {
  high:     "#fc8181",
  moderate: "#f6ad55",
  low:      "#9ae6b4",
  unknown:  "#e2e8f0",
};

export const RISK_LABELS = {
  high:     "HIGH RISK",
  moderate: "MODERATE",
  low:      "LOW RISK",
  unknown:  "NO DATA",
};

export const RISK_EMOJIS = {
  high:     "🚨",
  moderate: "⚠️",
  low:      "✅",
  unknown:  "—",
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// PHQ-9 severity
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export const getPHQSeverity = (score) => {
  if (score == null)  return "unknown";
  if (score <= 4)     return "minimal";
  if (score <= 9)     return "mild";
  if (score <= 14)    return "moderate";
  if (score <= 19)    return "moderately severe";
  return "severe";
};

export const PHQ_COLORS = {
  minimal:            "#38a169",
  mild:               "#d69e2e",
  moderate:           "#dd6b20",
  "moderately severe":"#e53e3e",
  severe:             "#c53030",
  unknown:            "#718096",
};

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Meter zone widths (%)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export const METER_ZONES = [
  { label: "Low",      flex: 30, color: "#9ae6b4" },
  { label: "Moderate", flex: 35, color: "#f6ad55" },
  { label: "High",     flex: 35, color: "#fc8181" },
];

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\context\AuthContext.js
============================================================
import React, {
  createContext, useContext,
  useState, useEffect, useCallback
} from "react";
import AsyncStorage from "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage";
import { STORAGE_KEYS } from "../constants/config";
import { loginApi }     from "../api/authApi";

const AuthContext = createContext(null);

export function AuthProvider({ children }) {
  const [user,    setUser]    = useState(null);
  const [token,   setToken]   = useState(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  // Rehydrate on app launch
  useEffect(() => {
    _rehydrate();
  }, []);

  const _rehydrate = async () => {
    try {
      const [storedToken, storedUserId, storedRole] = await Promise.all([
        AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.ACCESS_TOKEN),
        AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ID),
        AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ROLE),
      ]);

      if (storedToken && storedUserId) {
        setToken(storedToken);
        setUser({ id: storedUserId, role: storedRole || "patient" });
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[AuthContext] Rehydrate error:", err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const login = useCallback(async (email, password) => {
    const res = await loginApi(email, password);

    await AsyncStorage.multiSet([
      [STORAGE_KEYS.ACCESS_TOKEN, res.access_token],
      [STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ID,      res.user_id],
      [STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ROLE,    res.role || "patient"],
    ]);

    setToken(res.access_token);
    setUser({ id: res.user_id, role: res.role || "patient" });
    return res;
  }, []);

  const logout = useCallback(async () => {
    await AsyncStorage.multiRemove([
      STORAGE_KEYS.ACCESS_TOKEN,
      STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ID,
      STORAGE_KEYS.USER_ROLE,
    ]);
    setToken(null);
    setUser(null);
  }, []);

  const isAuthenticated = !!token && !!user;

  return (
    <AuthContext.Provider value={{
      user,
      token,
      loading,
      login,
      logout,
      isAuthenticated,
    }}>
      {children}
    </AuthContext.Provider>
  );
}

export function useAuth() {
  const ctx = useContext(AuthContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error("useAuth must be used within AuthProvider");
  return ctx;
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\context\MonitoringContext.js
============================================================
import React, {
  createContext, useContext,
  useState, useRef, useCallback
} from "react";
import AsyncStorage from "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage";
import { STORAGE_KEYS } from "../constants/config";

const MonitoringContext = createContext(null);

const DEFAULT_SETTINGS = {
  gpsEnabled:    true,
  accelEnabled:  true,
  stepEnabled:   true,
  screenEnabled: true,
  batteryEnabled:true,
};

export function MonitoringProvider({ children }) {
  const [isMonitoring, setIsMonitoring] = useState(false);
  const [settings,     setSettings]     = useState(DEFAULT_SETTINGS);
  const [sensorStatus, setSensorStatus] = useState({
    gps:     "idle",
    accel:   "idle",
    step:    "idle",
    screen:  "idle",
    battery: "idle",
  });
  const [latestFeatures, setLatestFeatures] = useState(null);
  const [statusMsg,      setStatusMsg]      = useState("Tap Start to begin monitoring");

  const monitorsRef = useRef({});

  // Load saved settings
  const loadSettings = useCallback(async () => {
    try {
      const raw = await AsyncStorage.getItem(STORAGE_KEYS.SETTINGS);
      if (raw) setSettings(JSON.parse(raw));
    } catch {}
  }, []);

  const saveSettings = useCallback(async (newSettings) => {
    const merged = { ...settings, ...newSettings };
    setSettings(merged);
    await AsyncStorage.setItem(STORAGE_KEYS.SETTINGS, JSON.stringify(merged));
  }, [settings]);

  const updateSensorStatus = useCallback((sensor, status) => {
    setSensorStatus((prev) => ({ ...prev, [sensor]: status }));
  }, []);

  const updateLatestFeatures = useCallback((features) => {
    setLatestFeatures(features);
  }, []);

  const startMonitoring = useCallback(() => {
    setIsMonitoring(true);
    setStatusMsg("Monitoring active — sensors running");
  }, []);

  const stopMonitoring = useCallback(() => {
    setIsMonitoring(false);
    setStatusMsg("Monitoring stopped");
    setSensorStatus({
      gps:     "idle",
      accel:   "idle",
      step:    "idle",
      screen:  "idle",
      battery: "idle",
    });
  }, []);

  return (
    <MonitoringContext.Provider value={{
      isMonitoring,
      settings,
      sensorStatus,
      latestFeatures,
      statusMsg,
      monitorsRef,
      loadSettings,
      saveSettings,
      updateSensorStatus,
      updateLatestFeatures,
      startMonitoring,
      stopMonitoring,
      setStatusMsg,
    }}>
      {children}
    </MonitoringContext.Provider>
  );
}

export function useMonitoring() {
  const ctx = useContext(MonitoringContext);
  if (!ctx) throw new Error("useMonitoring must be used within MonitoringProvider");
  return ctx;
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\features\CircadianFeatures.js
============================================================
import SensorStore from "../storage/SensorStore";
import {
  mean,
  variance,
} from "../utils/mathUtils";

/**
 * CircadianFeatures.js
 *
 * Extracts circadian rhythm features from
 * accelerometer + pedometer 7-day time series.
 *
 * Features:
 *   1. circadian_index         — ratio of day vs night activity (0–1)
 *   2. interdaily_stability    — day-to-day rhythm consistency (0–1)
 *   3. intradaily_variability  — within-day fragmentation (0–2)
 *
 * Reference: Van Someren et al. (1999)
 * Adapted for Expo accelerometer data without FFT dependency.
 */

const BINS_PER_DAY = 24
const MIN_DAYS     = 3

class CircadianFeatures {

  async extract(date = new Date()) {
    // Collect 7 days of accelerometer data
    const allReadings = []

    for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) {
      const d = new Date(date)
      d.setDate(d.getDate() - i)
      const dayReadings = await SensorStore.getByType("accelerometer", d)
      allReadings.push(...dayReadings)
    }

    if (allReadings.length < BINS_PER_DAY * MIN_DAYS) {
      return this._empty(date)
    }

    const hourlyBins       = this._buildHourlyBins(allReadings)
    const circadianIndex   = this._circadianIndex(hourlyBins)
    const isStability      = this._interdailyStability(hourlyBins)
    const ivVariability    = this._intradailyVariability(hourlyBins)
    const daysAnalyzed     = Math.floor(allReadings.length / BINS_PER_DAY)

    return {
      date:                   date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      circadian_index:        parseFloat(circadianIndex.toFixed(4)),
      interdaily_stability:   parseFloat(isStability.toFixed(4)),
      intradaily_variability: parseFloat(ivVariability.toFixed(4)),
      days_analyzed:          daysAnalyzed,
    }
  }

  _buildHourlyBins(readings) {
    // Group readings by hour-of-day across all days
    const bins = Array.from({ length: BINS_PER_DAY }, () => [])

    readings.forEach((r) => {
      const hour = new Date(r.timestamp).getHours()
      bins[hour].push(r.mean_magnitude || 0)
    })

    return bins.map((b) => b.length ? mean(b) : 0)
  }

  _circadianIndex(hourlyBins) {
    // Ratio of daytime (6AM–10PM) to total activity
    const daytimeBins = hourlyBins.slice(6, 22)
    const nightBins   = [
      ...hourlyBins.slice(0,  6),
      ...hourlyBins.slice(22),
    ]

    const dayMean   = mean(daytimeBins)
    const nightMean = mean(nightBins)
    const total     = dayMean + nightMean

    if (total === 0) return 0.5
    return dayMean / total
  }

  _interdailyStability(hourlyBins) {
    // IS = variance of the mean hourly profile / overall variance
    // Higher = more consistent day-to-day rhythm
    const overallVar = variance(hourlyBins)
    if (overallVar === 0) return 1.0

    const overallMean = mean(hourlyBins)
    const profileVar  = hourlyBins.reduce(
      (s, v) => s + (v - overallMean) ** 2,
      0
    ) / hourlyBins.length

    return Math.min(1.0, profileVar / overallVar)
  }

  _intradailyVariability(hourlyBins) {
    // IV = mean squared successive differences / overall variance
    // Higher = more fragmented/irregular rhythm
    if (hourlyBins.length < 2) return 0

    const overallVar = variance(hourlyBins)
    if (overallVar === 0) return 0

    let sumSqDiff = 0
    for (let i = 1; i < hourlyBins.length; i++) {
      sumSqDiff += (hourlyBins[i] - hourlyBins[i - 1]) ** 2
    }

    const msd = sumSqDiff / (hourlyBins.length - 1)
    return Math.min(2.0, msd / overallVar)
  }

  _empty(date) {
    return {
      date:                   date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      circadian_index:        0.5,
      interdaily_stability:   0,
      intradaily_variability: 0,
      days_analyzed:          0,
    }
  }
}

export default new CircadianFeatures()

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\features\FeatureAggregator.js
============================================================
import LocationFeatures  from "./LocationFeatures";
import MovementFeatures  from "./MovementFeatures";
import SleepFeatures     from "./SleepFeatures";
import CircadianFeatures from "./CircadianFeatures";
import ScreenFeatures    from "./ScreenFeatures";
import SensorStore       from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { mean }          from "../utils/mathUtils";

/**
 * FeatureAggregator.js
 *
 * Collects all individual feature extractors and assembles
 * the final 15-dimensional feature vector for TFLite inference.
 *
 * Feature vector order (must match training pipeline exactly):
 *   [0]  radius_of_gyration
 *   [1]  home_stay_pct
 *   [2]  location_entropy
 *   [3]  num_places_visited
 *   [4]  daily_step_count
 *   [5]  sedentary_bouts
 *   [6]  sedentary_total_mins
 *   [7]  circadian_index
 *   [8]  interdaily_stability
 *   [9]  intradaily_variability
 *   [10] sleep_duration_hrs
 *   [11] sleep_midpoint_hr
 *   [12] sleep_disruption_count
 *   [13] screen_unlock_count
 *   [14] screen_on_duration_mins
 */

export const FEATURE_NAMES = [
  "radius_of_gyration",
  "home_stay_pct",
  "location_entropy",
  "num_places_visited",
  "daily_step_count",
  "sedentary_bouts",
  "sedentary_total_mins",
  "circadian_index",
  "interdaily_stability",
  "intradaily_variability",
  "sleep_duration_hrs",
  "sleep_midpoint_hr",
  "sleep_disruption_count",
  "screen_unlock_count",
  "screen_on_duration_mins",
]

export const FEATURE_UNITS = {
  radius_of_gyration:    "m",
  home_stay_pct:         "%",
  location_entropy:      "bits",
  num_places_visited:    "places",
  daily_step_count:      "steps",
  sedentary_bouts:       "bouts",
  sedentary_total_mins:  "min",
  circadian_index:       "ratio",
  interdaily_stability:  "score",
  intradaily_variability:"score",
  sleep_duration_hrs:    "hrs",
  sleep_midpoint_hr:     "hr",
  sleep_disruption_count:"events",
  screen_unlock_count:   "unlocks",
  screen_on_duration_mins:"min",
}

class FeatureAggregator {

  async extractAll(date = new Date()) {
    console.log("[FeatureAggregator] Extracting all features for", date.toISOString().slice(0, 10))

    // Run all extractors in parallel
    const [
      locationFeats,
      movementFeats,
      sleepFeats,
      circadianFeats,
      screenFeats,
    ] = await Promise.all([
      LocationFeatures.extract(date).catch(() => LocationFeatures._empty(date)),
      MovementFeatures.extract(date).catch(() => this._emptyMovement(date)),
      SleepFeatures.extract(date).catch(() => SleepFeatures._empty(date)),
      CircadianFeatures.extract(date).catch(() => CircadianFeatures._empty(date)),
      ScreenFeatures.extract(date).catch(() => ScreenFeatures._empty(date)),
    ])

    // Assemble raw feature vector in exact training order
    const rawVector = [
      locationFeats.radius_of_gyration    ?? 0,
      locationFeats.home_stay_pct         ?? 100,
      locationFeats.location_entropy      ?? 0,
      locationFeats.num_places_visited    ?? 0,
      movementFeats.daily_step_count      ?? 0,
      movementFeats.sedentary_bouts       ?? 0,
      movementFeats.sedentary_total_mins  ?? 0,
      circadianFeats.circadian_index      ?? 0.5,
      circadianFeats.interdaily_stability ?? 0,
      circadianFeats.intradaily_variability ?? 0,
      sleepFeats.sleep_duration_hrs       ?? 0,
      sleepFeats.sleep_midpoint_hr        ?? 0,
      sleepFeats.sleep_disruption_count   ?? 0,
      screenFeats.screen_unlock_count     ?? 0,
      screenFeats.screen_on_duration_mins ?? 0,
    ]

    // Named features map for display in InsightsScreen
    const namedFeatures = {}
    FEATURE_NAMES.forEach((name, i) => {
      namedFeatures[name] = rawVector[i]
    })

    console.log("[FeatureAggregator] Feature vector assembled:", rawVector)

    return {
      date:          date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      vector:        rawVector,
      named:         namedFeatures,
      location:      locationFeats,
      movement:      movementFeats,
      sleep:         sleepFeats,
      circadian:     circadianFeats,
      screen:        screenFeats,
      extracted_at:  new Date().toISOString(),
    }
  }

  // Quality check — how many features have non-zero data
  featureQuality(vector) {
    if (!vector || !vector.length) return 0
    const nonZero = vector.filter((v) => v !== 0 && v != null).length
    return parseFloat(((nonZero / vector.length) * 100).toFixed(1))
  }

  _emptyMovement(date) {
    return {
      date:                 date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      daily_step_count:     0,
      sedentary_bouts:      0,
      sedentary_total_mins: 0,
      mean_activity_level:  0,
      active_periods:       0,
    }
  }
}

export default new FeatureAggregator()

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\features\LocationFeatures.js
============================================================
import SensorStore from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { smoothGpsPoints } from "../utils/noiseFilter";
import {
  haversineM,
  centroid,
  radiusOfGyration,
  shannonEntropy,
  mean,
} from "../utils/mathUtils";

/**
 * LocationFeatures.js
 *
 * Extracts 4 location-based behavioral features
 * from GPS readings stored in SensorStore.
 *
 * All computation is on-device.
 * Raw coordinates never leave the phone.
 *
 * Features:
 *   1. radius_of_gyration    — spatial range (meters)
 *   2. home_stay_pct         — % time near home (0–100)
 *   3. location_entropy      — diversity of places (bits)
 *   4. num_places_visited    — distinct cluster count
 */

const HOME_RADIUS_M    = 100;
const CLUSTER_RADIUS_M = 50;
const MIN_CLUSTER_PTS  = 3;

class LocationFeatures {

  async extract(date = new Date()) {
    const raw = await SensorStore.getByType("gps", date);

    if (raw.length < 5) {
      return this._empty(date);
    }

    const points = smoothGpsPoints(raw);

    // Infer home from midnight–6AM readings
    const nightPts = points.filter((p) => {
      const h = new Date(p.timestamp).getHours();
      return h >= 0 && h <= 6;
    });
    const home = centroid(
      nightPts.length >= 3 ? nightPts : points.slice(0, 5)
    );

    // Home stay %
    const homePts     = points.filter(
      (p) => haversineM(
        p.latitude, p.longitude,
        home.latitude, home.longitude
      ) <= HOME_RADIUS_M
    );
    const homeStayPct = (homePts.length / points.length) * 100;

    // Radius of gyration
    const rog = radiusOfGyration(points);

    // DBSCAN-lite clustering
    const clusters  = this._cluster(points);
    const numPlaces = clusters.length;

    // Location entropy from cluster sizes
    const entropy = shannonEntropy(clusters.map((c) => c.length));

    return {
      date:               date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      radius_of_gyration: Math.round(rog),
      home_stay_pct:      parseFloat(homeStayPct.toFixed(2)),
      location_entropy:   parseFloat(entropy.toFixed(4)),
      num_places_visited: numPlaces,
      sample_count:       points.length,
    };
  }

  _cluster(points) {
    const visited  = new Set();
    const clusters = [];

    for (let i = 0; i < points.length; i++) {
      if (visited.has(i)) continue;
      visited.add(i);

      const neighbors = [];
      for (let j = 0; j < points.length; j++) {
        if (j === i) continue;
        const dist = haversineM(
          points[i].latitude, points[i].longitude,
          points[j].latitude, points[j].longitude
        );
        if (dist <= CLUSTER_RADIUS_M) neighbors.push(j);
      }

      if (neighbors.length < MIN_CLUSTER_PTS - 1) continue;

      neighbors.forEach((j) => visited.add(j));
      clusters.push([i, ...neighbors].map((idx) => points[idx]));
    }

    return clusters;
  }

  _empty(date) {
    return {
      date:               date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      radius_of_gyration: 0,
      home_stay_pct:      100,
      location_entropy:   0,
      num_places_visited: 0,
      sample_count:       0,
    };
  }
}

export default new LocationFeatures();

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\features\MovementFeatures.js
============================================================
import SensorStore from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { mean, sum } from "../utils/mathUtils";

/**
 * MovementFeatures.js
 *
 * Extracts movement and physical activity features
 * from accelerometer + pedometer readings.
 *
 * Features:
 *   1. daily_step_count      — total steps (pedometer preferred)
 *   2. sedentary_bouts       — number of 30-min sedentary windows
 *   3. sedentary_total_mins  — total sedentary minutes
 *   4. mean_activity_level   — mean movement magnitude
 *   5. active_periods        — count of active 30-min windows
 *
 * Uses pedometer if available, falls back to accel step proxy.
 */

const SEDENTARY_BOUT_MINS    = 30;
const FLUSH_INTERVAL_MINS    = 0.5;   // 30s flush interval = 0.5 min per reading

class MovementFeatures {

  async extract(date = new Date()) {
    const [accelReadings, pedometerReadings] = await Promise.all([
      SensorStore.getByType("accelerometer", date),
      SensorStore.getByType("pedometer",     date),
    ]);

    // Step count — prefer pedometer, fall back to accel proxy
    const totalSteps = this._getStepCount(pedometerReadings, accelReadings);

    // Sedentary analysis from accelerometer
    const sedentaryData = this._analyzeSedentary(accelReadings);

    // Activity level
    const allMagnitudes = accelReadings.map((r) => r.mean_magnitude || 0);
    const meanActivity  = allMagnitudes.length ? mean(allMagnitudes) : 0;

    // Active periods = non-sedentary 30-min windows
    const activePeriods = Math.max(
      0,
      Math.floor(accelReadings.length * FLUSH_INTERVAL_MINS / SEDENTARY_BOUT_MINS)
      - sedentaryData.sedentary_bouts
    );

    return {
      date:                date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      daily_step_count:    totalSteps,
      sedentary_bouts:     sedentaryData.sedentary_bouts,
      sedentary_total_mins:sedentaryData.sedentary_mins,
      mean_activity_level: parseFloat(meanActivity.toFixed(4)),
      active_periods:      activePeriods,
      using_pedometer:     pedometerReadings.length > 0,
    };
  }

  _getStepCount(pedometerReadings, accelReadings) {
    if (pedometerReadings.length > 0) {
      // Pedometer: take the latest reading's cumulative count
      const sorted = [...pedometerReadings].sort(
        (a, b) => new Date(b.timestamp) - new Date(a.timestamp)
      );
      return sorted[0]?.steps_today || 0;
    }

    // Fallback: sum accelerometer step proxies
    return accelReadings.reduce((s, r) => s + (r.step_proxy || 0), 0);
  }

  _analyzeSedentary(accelReadings) {
    if (!accelReadings.length) {
      return { sedentary_bouts: 0, sedentary_mins: 0 };
    }

    // Group readings into 30-minute windows
    const windowMs       = SEDENTARY_BOUT_MINS * 60 * 1000;
    const windows        = {};

    accelReadings.forEach((r) => {
      const ts        = new Date(r.timestamp).getTime();
      const windowKey = Math.floor(ts / windowMs);
      if (!windows[windowKey]) windows[windowKey] = [];
      windows[windowKey].push(r);
    });

    let sedentaryBouts = 0;
    let sedentaryMins  = 0;

    Object.values(windows).forEach((windowReadings) => {
      const sedentaryCount = windowReadings.filter(
        (r) => r.is_sedentary
      ).length;
      const isSedentaryWindow =
        sedentaryCount / windowReadings.length >= 0.7;  // 70% threshold

      if (isSedentaryWindow) {
        sedentaryBouts++;
        sedentaryMins += SEDENTARY_BOUT_MINS;
      }
    });

    return {
      sedentary_bouts: sedentaryBouts,
      sedentary_mins:  sedentaryMins,
    };
  }

  async getLast7DaysSummary() {
    const results = [];
    for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) {
      const date = new Date();
      date.setDate(date.getDate() - i);
      const summary = await this.extract(date);
      results.push(summary);
    }
    return results;
  }
}

export default new MovementFeatures();

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\features\ScreenFeatures.js
============================================================
import SensorStore from "../storage/SensorStore";
import { mean, std } from "../utils/mathUtils";

/**
 * ScreenFeatures.js
 *
 * Extracts screen usage behavioral features from
 * AppState screen events stored in SensorStore.
 *
 * Features:
 *   1. screen_unlock_count      — total unlocks per day
 *   2. screen_on_duration_mins  — total active screen time
 *   3. avg_session_mins         — average session length
 *   4. evening_usage_mins       — screen use after 9PM
 *   5. night_usage_events       — screen events during sleep window
 *
 * High unlock count + short sessions = anxiety/rumination proxy
 * Evening/night usage = sleep hygiene signal
 */

const EVENING_HOUR_START = 21   // 9 PM
const NIGHT_HOUR_START   = 23   // 11 PM
const NIGHT_HOUR_END     = 6    // 6 AM

class ScreenFeatures {

  async extract(date = new Date()) {
    const events = await SensorStore.getByType("screen_event", date)

    if (!events.length) {
      return this._empty(date)
    }

    const onEvents  = events.filter((e) => e.event === "screen_on")
    const offEvents = events.filter((e) => e.event === "screen_off")

    // Total screen on duration
    const totalOnMs  = offEvents.reduce(
      (s, e) => s + (e.duration_ms || 0), 0
    )
    const totalOnMin = totalOnMs / 60000

    // Session lengths in minutes
    const sessionMins = offEvents
      .map((e) => (e.duration_ms || 0) / 60000)
      .filter((m) => m > 0)

    // Unlock count
    const unlockCount = onEvents.length

    // Evening usage (9PM onwards)
    const eveningOffEvents = offEvents.filter((e) => {
      const h = new Date(e.timestamp).getHours()
      return h >= EVENING_HOUR_START
    })
    const eveningUsageMins = eveningOffEvents.reduce(
      (s, e) => s + (e.duration_ms || 0) / 60000,
      0
    )

    // Night usage events (11PM–6AM)
    const nightEvents = onEvents.filter((e) => {
      const h = new Date(e.timestamp).getHours()
      return h >= NIGHT_HOUR_START || h < NIGHT_HOUR_END
    })

    // Session variability (high std = erratic usage pattern)
    const sessionStd = sessionMins.length > 1
      ? std(sessionMins)
      : 0

    return {
      date:                    date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      screen_unlock_count:     unlockCount,
      screen_on_duration_mins: parseFloat(totalOnMin.toFixed(2)),
      avg_session_mins:        unlockCount > 0
        ? parseFloat((totalOnMin / unlockCount).toFixed(2))
        : 0,
      session_std_mins:        parseFloat(sessionStd.toFixed(2)),
      evening_usage_mins:      parseFloat(eveningUsageMins.toFixed(2)),
      night_usage_events:      nightEvents.length,
    }
  }

  async getLast7DaysSummary() {
    const results = []
    for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) {
      const date = new Date()
      date.setDate(date.getDate() - i)
      const summary = await this.extract(date)
      results.push(summary)
    }
    return results
  }

  _empty(date) {
    return {
      date:                    date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      screen_unlock_count:     0,
      screen_on_duration_mins: 0,
      avg_session_mins:        0,
      session_std_mins:        0,
      evening_usage_mins:      0,
      night_usage_events:      0,
    }
  }
}

export default new ScreenFeatures()

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\features\SleepFeatures.js
============================================================
import SensorStore from "../storage/SensorStore";

/**
 * SleepFeatures.js
 *
 * Infers sleep features from AppState screen events
 * and accelerometer sedentary data.
 *
 * No microphone or wearable required.
 * Pure behavioral inference from screen + motion data.
 *
 * Features:
 *   1. sleep_duration_hrs      — inferred total sleep hours
 *   2. sleep_midpoint_hr       — midpoint hour of sleep (circadian marker)
 *   3. sleep_disruption_count  — screen-on events during sleep window
 *   4. sleep_regularity        — consistency with previous nights (0–1)
 *
 * Algorithm:
 *   Sleep onset  = last screen-off event after 9PM
 *   Wake time    = first screen-on event after 4AM
 *   Disruptions  = screen-on events between onset and wake
 */

const SLEEP_EARLIEST_HR  = 21    // 9 PM
const SLEEP_LATEST_HR    = 11    // 11 AM
const WAKE_EARLIEST_HR   = 4
const MIN_SLEEP_HRS      = 2
const MAX_SLEEP_HRS      = 14

class SleepFeatures {

  async extract(date = new Date()) {
    const yesterday = new Date(date)
    yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1)

    // Get screen events from both yesterday evening and today morning
    const [yesterdayEvents, todayEvents] = await Promise.all([
      SensorStore.getByType("screen_event", yesterday),
      SensorStore.getByType("screen_event", date),
    ])

    const allEvents = [
      ...yesterdayEvents,
      ...todayEvents,
    ].sort((a, b) => new Date(a.timestamp) - new Date(b.timestamp))

    return await this._inferSleep(allEvents, date)
  }

  async _inferSleep(events, date) {
    const onEvents  = events.filter((e) => e.event === "screen_on")
    const offEvents = events.filter((e) => e.event === "screen_off")

    if (!offEvents.length || !onEvents.length) {
      return this._empty(date)
    }

    // Sleep onset = last screen-off in evening (9PM–3AM)
    const eveningOffs = offEvents.filter((e) => {
      const h = new Date(e.timestamp).getHours()
      return h >= SLEEP_EARLIEST_HR || h < WAKE_EARLIEST_HR
    })

    // Wake time = first screen-on after 4AM
    const morningOns = onEvents.filter((e) => {
      const h = new Date(e.timestamp).getHours()
      return h >= WAKE_EARLIEST_HR && h <= SLEEP_LATEST_HR
    })

    if (!eveningOffs.length || !morningOns.length) {
      return this._empty(date)
    }

    const sleepOnset = new Date(
      eveningOffs[eveningOffs.length - 1].timestamp
    )
    const wakeTime = new Date(morningOns[0].timestamp)

    // Validate duration
    const durationMs  = wakeTime - sleepOnset
    const durationHrs = durationMs / 3600000

    if (durationHrs < MIN_SLEEP_HRS || durationHrs > MAX_SLEEP_HRS) {
      return this._empty(date)
    }

    // Sleep midpoint
    const midpointMs = sleepOnset.getTime() + durationMs / 2
    const midpointDt = new Date(midpointMs)
    let   midpointHr = midpointDt.getHours() + midpointDt.getMinutes() / 60
    if (midpointHr > 12) midpointHr -= 24   // normalize: negative = before midnight

    // Disruption count = screen-on events DURING sleep
    const disruptions = onEvents.filter((e) => {
      const t = new Date(e.timestamp)
      return t > sleepOnset && t < wakeTime
    }).length

    // Sleep regularity compared to yesterday
    const regularity = await this._getSleepRegularity(
      sleepOnset.getHours(), date
    )

    return {
      date:                   date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      sleep_duration_hrs:     parseFloat(durationHrs.toFixed(2)),
      sleep_midpoint_hr:      parseFloat(midpointHr.toFixed(2)),
      sleep_disruption_count: disruptions,
      sleep_onset_hr:         sleepOnset.getHours(),
      wake_time_hr:           wakeTime.getHours(),
      sleep_regularity:       regularity,
      sleep_onset:            sleepOnset.toISOString(),
      wake_time:              wakeTime.toISOString(),
    }
  }

  async _getSleepRegularity(onsetHr, date) {
    // Compare with last 3 nights' onset hours
    const regularityScores = []

    for (let i = 1; i <= 3; i++) {
      const prevDate = new Date(date)
      prevDate.setDate(prevDate.getDate() - i)

      const prevSummary = await this.extract(prevDate)
      if (prevSummary?.sleep_onset_hr != null) {
        const diff = Math.abs(onsetHr - prevSummary.sleep_onset_hr)
        // Score 1.0 = same time, 0.0 = 6+ hours different
        regularityScores.push(Math.max(0, 1 - diff / 6))
      }
    }

    if (!regularityScores.length) return 0.5
    return parseFloat(
      (regularityScores.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / regularityScores.length)
        .toFixed(3)
    )
  }

  _empty(date) {
    return {
      date:                   date.toISOString().slice(0, 10),
      sleep_duration_hrs:     0,
      sleep_midpoint_hr:      0,
      sleep_disruption_count: 0,
      sleep_onset_hr:         null,
      wake_time_hr:           null,
      sleep_regularity:       0,
      sleep_onset:            null,
      wake_time:              null,
    }
  }

  async getLast7DaysSummary() {
    const results = []
    for (let i = 6; i >= 0; i--) {
      const date = new Date()
      date.setDate(date.getDate() - i)
      const summary = await this.extract(date)
      results.push(summary)
    }
    return results
  }
}

export default new SleepFeatures()

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\hooks\useAlerts.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef } from "react";
import { useAuth }   from "../context/AuthContext";
import { alertsApi } from "../api/alertsApi";
import { AppState }  from "react-native";

/**
 * useAlerts.js
 *
 * Fetches and manages alerts for the authenticated user.
 *
 * Features:
 *   - Polls for new alerts every 60s when app is active
 *   - Re-fetches when app returns to foreground
 *   - Provides mark-read handlers with optimistic updates
 *   - Returns severity colors for UI styling
 */

const POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 60_000   // 1 minute

export default function useAlerts() {
  const { user }             = useAuth()
  const [alerts,      setAlerts]      = useState([])
  const [unreadCount, setUnreadCount] = useState(0)
  const [loading,     setLoading]     = useState(true)
  const [error,       setError]       = useState(null)

  const pollTimerRef      = useRef(null)
  const lastFetchRef      = useRef(null)
  const appStateRef       = useRef(AppState.currentState)

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Fetch alerts
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const fetchAlerts = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!user?.id) return
    setError(null)

    try {
      const [allAlerts, count] = await Promise.all([
        alertsApi.getAll(user.id),
        alertsApi.getUnreadCount(user.id),
      ])

      setAlerts(allAlerts)
      setUnreadCount(count)
      lastFetchRef.current = new Date()
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message)
      console.warn("[useAlerts] Fetch error:", err.message)
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }, [user?.id])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Initial fetch + polling
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchAlerts()

    // Poll every 60s
    pollTimerRef.current = setInterval(fetchAlerts, POLL_INTERVAL_MS)

    // Re-fetch when app comes to foreground
    const subscription = AppState.addEventListener("change", (nextState) => {
      if (
        appStateRef.current.match(/inactive|background/) &&
        nextState === "active"
      ) {
        fetchAlerts()
      }
      appStateRef.current = nextState
    })

    return () => {
      if (pollTimerRef.current) clearInterval(pollTimerRef.current)
      subscription.remove()
    }
  }, [fetchAlerts])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Mark single alert as read
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const markRead = useCallback(async (alertId) => {
    // Optimistic update
    setAlerts((prev) =>
      prev.map((a) => a.id === alertId ? { ...a, is_read: true } : a)
    )
    setUnreadCount((prev) => Math.max(0, prev - 1))

    try {
      await alertsApi.markRead(alertId)
    } catch (err) {
      // Revert on failure
      setAlerts((prev) =>
        prev.map((a) => a.id === alertId ? { ...a, is_read: false } : a)
      )
      setUnreadCount((prev) => prev + 1)
      console.warn("[useAlerts] markRead failed:", err.message)
    }
  }, [])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Mark all alerts as read
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const markAllRead = useCallback(async () => {
    // Optimistic update
    setAlerts((prev) => prev.map((a) => ({ ...a, is_read: true })))
    setUnreadCount(0)

    try {
      await alertsApi.markAllRead(user.id)
    } catch (err) {
      // Revert on failure
      fetchAlerts()
      console.warn("[useAlerts] markAllRead failed:", err.message)
    }
  }, [user?.id, fetchAlerts])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Severity styling helpers
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const getSeverityStyle = useCallback((severity) => {
    switch (severity) {
      case "high":
        return {
          bg:     "#fff5f5",
          text:   "#c53030",
          border: "#fc8181",
          dot:    "#e53e3e",
        }
      case "medium":
        return {
          bg:     "#fffaf0",
          text:   "#c05621",
          border: "#f6ad55",
          dot:    "#dd6b20",
        }
      default:
        return {
          bg:     "#f0fff4",
          text:   "#276749",
          border: "#9ae6b4",
          dot:    "#38a169",
        }
    }
  }, [])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Derived
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const unreadAlerts = alerts.filter((a) => !a.is_read)
  const highRiskAlerts = alerts.filter(
    (a) => a.severity === "high" && !a.is_read
  )

  return {
    alerts,
    unreadAlerts,
    highRiskAlerts,
    unreadCount,
    loading,
    error,
    markRead,
    markAllRead,
    getSeverityStyle,
    refetch: fetchAlerts,
  }
}

============================================================
FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\hooks\useMonitoring.js
============================================================
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
import { useMonitoring as useMonitoringCtx } from "../context/MonitoringContext";
import { useAuth }        from "../context/AuthContext";
import useAccelerometer   from "../sensors/useAccelerometer";
import useGyroscope       from "../sensors/useGyroscope";
import usePedometer       from "../sensors/usePedometer";
import useLocation        from "../sensors/useLocation";
import useAppState        from "../sensors/useAppState";
import useBattery         from "../sensors/useBattery";
import RiskScorePredictor from "../ml/RiskScorePredictor";
import BackgroundTask     from "../background/BackgroundTask";
import { requestAllPermissions } from "../utils/permissions";
import {
  scheduleMonitoringReminder,
  cancelMonitoringReminder,
  scheduleDailyCheckIn,
} from "../background/NotificationHandler";
import { STORAGE_KEYS } from "../constants/config";
import AsyncStorage     from "@react-native-async-storage/async-storage";

/**
 * useMonitoring.js
 *
 * Master hook that orchestrates all sensor hooks,
 * ML inference, and background task management.
 *
 * Used by HomeScreen to start/stop all monitoring
 * with a single function call.
 */

const INFERENCE_INTERVAL_MS = 6 * 60 * 60 * 1000   // every 6 hours

export default function useMonitoring() {
  const {
    isMonitoring,
    settings,
    updateSensorStatus,
    updateLatestFeatures,
    startMonitoring,
    stopMonitoring,
    setStatusMsg,
    loadSettings,
  } = useMonitoringCtx()

  const { user } = useAuth()

  // Sensor hooks — enabled state controlled by settings
  const accel   = useAccelerometer(isMonitoring && settings.accelEnabled)
  const gyro    = useGyroscope(isMonitoring && settings.accelEnabled)
  const pedometer = usePedometer(isMonitoring && settings.stepEnabled)
  const location  = useLocation(isMonitoring && settings.gpsEnabled)
  const appState  = useAppState(isMonitoring && settings.screenEnabled)
  const battery   = useBattery(isMonitoring && settings.batteryEnabled)

  const inferenceTimerRef = useRef(null)
  const lastInferenceRef  = useRef(null)

  // Sync sensor statuses to context
  useEffect(() => {
    updateSensorStatus("accel",   accel.isActive   ? "active" : "idle")
    updateSensorStatus("gyro",    gyro.isActive     ? "active" : "idle")
    updateSensorStatus("step",    pedometer.isActive ? "active" : "idle")
    updateSensorStatus("gps",     location.isActive ? "active" : "idle")
    updateSensorStatus("screen",  appState.isActive ? "active" : "idle")
    updateSensorStatus("battery", battery.isActive  ? "active" : "idle")
  }, [
    accel.isActive,
    gyro.isActive,
    pedometer.isActive,
    location.isActive,
    appState.isActive,
    battery.isActive,
  ])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Start all monitoring
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const start = useCallback(async () => {
    setStatusMsg("Requesting permissions...")

    // Load saved settings first
    await loadSettings()

    // Request all permissions
    const permissions = await requestAllPermissions()
    if (!permissions.location.foreground) {
      setStatusMsg("Location permission required for full monitoring")
    }

    // Load TFLite model
    setStatusMsg("Loading ML model...")
    await RiskScorePredictor.load()

    // Configure background tasks
    setStatusMsg("Configuring background tasks...")
    await BackgroundTask.configure()

    // Schedule daily check-in notification at 9AM
    await scheduleDailyCheckIn(9, 0)

    // Cancel any pending monitoring reminder
    await cancelMonitoringReminder()

    // Start periodic inference timer
    _startInferenceTimer()

    // Run initial inference after 30s (allow sensors to warm up)
    setTimeout(async () => {
      setStatusMsg("Running initial inference...")
      const result = await RiskScorePredictor.runInference(new Date())
      if (result) {
        updateLatestFeatures(result.named_features)
        setStatusMsg("Monitoring active — sensors running")
      }
    }, 30_000)

    startMonitoring()
    setStatusMsg("Monitoring active — sensors running")
    console.log("[useMonitoring] All sensors started")
  }, [loadSettings, setStatusMsg, startMonitoring, updateLatestFeatures])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Stop all monitoring
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const stop = useCallback(async () => {
    _stopInferenceTimer()

    await BackgroundTask.stop()

    // Schedule reminder to restart monitoring in 24h
    await scheduleMonitoringReminder(24)

    stopMonitoring()
    setStatusMsg("Monitoring stopped")
    console.log("[useMonitoring] All sensors stopped")
  }, [setStatusMsg, stopMonitoring])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Manual inference trigger
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const runInference = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!isMonitoring) return null

    setStatusMsg("Running inference...")
    const result = await RiskScorePredictor.runInference(new Date())

    if (result) {
      updateLatestFeatures(result.named_features)
      lastInferenceRef.current = new Date()
      setStatusMsg(
        `Score updated: ${(result.score * 100).toFixed(0)}% — ${result.severity}`
      )
    } else {
      setStatusMsg("Inference failed — insufficient sensor data")
    }

    return result
  }, [isMonitoring, setStatusMsg, updateLatestFeatures])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Get daily summaries from all sensors
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const getDailySummaries = useCallback(async (date = new Date()) => {
    const [
      locationSummary,
      movementSummary,
      screenSummary,
      batteryData,
    ] = await Promise.allSettled([
      location.getDailySummary(date),
      accel.getDailySummary(date),
      appState.getDailySummary(date),
      battery.getDailySummary(date),
    ])

    return {
      location: locationSummary.status === "fulfilled" ? locationSummary.value : null,
      movement: movementSummary.status === "fulfilled" ? movementSummary.value : null,
      screen:   screenSummary.status   === "fulfilled" ? screenSummary.value   : null,
      battery:  batteryData.status     === "fulfilled" ? batteryData.value     : null,
    }
  }, [location, accel, appState, battery])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Periodic inference timer
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const _startInferenceTimer = useCallback(() => {
    if (inferenceTimerRef.current) return

    inferenceTimerRef.current = setInterval(async () => {
      console.log("[useMonitoring] Periodic inference triggered")
      await runInference()
    }, INFERENCE_INTERVAL_MS)
  }, [runInference])

  const _stopInferenceTimer = useCallback(() => {
    if (inferenceTimerRef.current) {
      clearInterval(inferenceTimerRef.current)
      inferenceTimerRef.current = null
    }
  }, [])

  // Cleanup on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      _stopInferenceTimer()
    }
  }, [_stopInferenceTimer])

  return {
    isMonitoring,
    settings,
    sensors: {
      accel,
      gyro,
      pedometer,
      location,
      appState,
      battery,
    },
    start,
    stop,
    runInference,
    getDailySummaries,
  }
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\hooks\usePhqHistory.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { useAuth }   from "../context/AuthContext";
import { phqApi }    from "../api/phqApi";
import UserStore     from "../storage/UserStore";
import {
  getPHQSeverity,
  PHQ_COLORS,
} from "../constants/thresholds";

/**
 * usePhqHistory.js
 *
 * Manages PHQ-9 questionnaire history and submission.
 *
 * Data strategy:
 *   - Local storage as primary source (offline-first)
 *   - Backend sync on submit and fetch
 *   - isDue flag drives weekly reminder logic
 */

export default function usePhqHistory() {
  const { user }              = useAuth()
  const [history,    setHistory]    = useState([])
  const [latestPhq,  setLatestPhq]  = useState(null)
  const [isDue,      setIsDue]      = useState(false)
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false)
  const [loading,    setLoading]    = useState(true)
  const [error,      setError]      = useState(null)
  const [submitMsg,  setSubmitMsg]  = useState(null)

  const fetchHistory = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    setError(null)

    try {
      // Local first
      const [localHistory, localLatest, due] = await Promise.all([
        UserStore.getPhqHistory(),
        UserStore.getLatestPhq(),
        UserStore.isDueForPhq(),
      ])

      setHistory(localHistory)
      setLatestPhq(localLatest)
      setIsDue(due)

      // Sync from backend if authenticated
      if (user?.id) {
        const backendHistory = await phqApi.getHistory(user.id, 12)
          .catch(() => null)

        if (backendHistory?.length) {
          // Merge backend entries into local storage
          for (const entry of backendHistory) {
            const exists = localHistory.some(
              (l) => l.id === entry.id || l.submitted_at === entry.submitted_at
            )
            if (!exists) {
              await UserStore.savePhqEntry(entry.score)
            }
          }

          // Refresh local after merge
          const merged = await UserStore.getPhqHistory()
          setHistory(merged)
          setLatestPhq(merged[0] || null)
        }
      }
    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message)
      console.error("[usePhqHistory] Fetch error:", err)
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }, [user?.id])

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchHistory()
  }, [fetchHistory])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Submit PHQ-9
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const submitPhq = useCallback(async (score) => {
    const parsed = parseInt(score)
    if (isNaN(parsed) || parsed < 0 || parsed > 27) {
      setSubmitMsg({ type: "error", text: "Score must be between 0 and 27" })
      return null
    }

    setSubmitting(true)
    setSubmitMsg(null)

    try {
      // Save locally first
      const localEntry = await UserStore.savePhqEntry(parsed)

      // Sync to backend
      if (user?.id) {
        try {
          await phqApi.submit({ user_id: user.id, score: parsed })
          await UserStore.markPhqSynced(localEntry.id)
        } catch {
          // Queue for retry if offline
          await UserStore.addToPendingSync("phq", { score: parsed })
          console.warn("[usePhqHistory] Queued PHQ for retry")
        }
      }

      // Refresh state
      const updated = await UserStore.getPhqHistory()
      setHistory(updated)
      setLatestPhq(updated[0])
      setIsDue(false)

      setSubmitMsg({
        type: "success",
        text: `PHQ-9 score ${parsed} submitted — ${getPHQSeverity(parsed)}`,
      })

      return localEntry
    } catch (err) {
      setSubmitMsg({ type: "error", text: err.message })
      console.error("[usePhqHistory] Submit error:", err)
      return null
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false)
    }
  }, [user?.id])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Clear submit message after delay
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  useEffect(() => {
    if (!submitMsg) return
    const timer = setTimeout(() => setSubmitMsg(null), 4000)
    return () => clearTimeout(timer)
  }, [submitMsg])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Derived
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const chartData = history
    .slice(0, 8)
    .reverse()
    .map((e) => ({
      date:     e.submitted_at.slice(0, 10),
      score:    e.score,
      severity: e.severity,
      color:    PHQ_COLORS[e.severity] || "#718096",
    }))

  const averageScore = history.length
    ? Math.round(
        history.slice(0, 4).reduce((s, e) => s + e.score, 0) /
        Math.min(4, history.length)
      )
    : null

  const latestSeverityColor = latestPhq
    ? PHQ_COLORS[latestPhq.severity] || "#718096"
    : "#718096"

  return {
    history,
    latestPhq,
    isDue,
    submitting,
    loading,
    error,
    submitMsg,
    chartData,
    averageScore,
    latestSeverityColor,
    submitPhq,
    refetch: fetchHistory,
  }
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\hooks\useRiskScores.js
============================================================
import { useState, useEffect, useCallback } from "react";
import { useAuth }        from "../context/AuthContext";
import RiskScorePredictor from "../ml/RiskScorePredictor";
import RiskScoreStore     from "../storage/RiskScoreStore";
import { scoresApi }      from "../api/scoresApi";
import { trendsApi }      from "../api/trendsApi";
import { getRiskLevel, RISK_COLORS } from "../constants/thresholds";
import { explainScore }   from "../ml/modelUtils";

/**
 * useRiskScores.js
 *
 * Fetches and manages risk score data from both
 * local storage (primary) and backend (sync).
 *
 * Priority: local data first → backend as supplement
 * This ensures the app works fully offline.
 */

export default function useRiskScores() {
  const { user }              = useAuth()
  const [latestScore,   setLatestScore]   = useState(null)
  const [scoreHistory,  setScoreHistory]  = useState([])
  const [weeklyTrend,   setWeeklyTrend]   = useState([])
  const [phqCorrelation,setPhqCorrelation]= useState([])
  const [featureSummary,setFeatureSummary]= useState(null)
  const [trend,         setTrend]         = useState("insufficient_data")
  const [loading,       setLoading]       = useState(true)
  const [error,         setError]         = useState(null)

  const fetchAll = useCallback(async () => {
    setLoading(true)
    setError(null)

    try {
      // 1. Local data first (always available, even offline)
      const [localLatest, localHistory, localTrend, localWeekly] =
        await Promise.all([
          RiskScoreStore.getLatest(),
          RiskScoreStore.getLastNDays(30),
          RiskScoreStore.getTrend(7),
          RiskScoreStore.getWeeklyAverages(8),
        ])

      setLatestScore(localLatest)
      setScoreHistory(localHistory)
      setTrend(localTrend)
      setWeeklyTrend(localWeekly)

      // 2. Backend data as supplement (if online + authenticated)
      if (user?.id) {
        const [backendTrend, phqCorr, featSummary] = await Promise.allSettled([
          trendsApi.getWeeklyTrend(user.id, 8),
          trendsApi.getPhqCorrelation(user.id),
          trendsApi.getFeatureSummary(user.id),
        ])

        if (backendTrend.status === "fulfilled" && backendTrend.value?.length) {
          setWeeklyTrend(backendTrend.value)
        }
        if (phqCorr.status === "fulfilled") {
          setPhqCorrelation(phqCorr.value)
        }
        if (featSummary.status === "fulfilled" && featSummary.value) {
          setFeatureSummary(featSummary.value)
        }
      }

    } catch (err) {
      setError(err.message)
      console.error("[useRiskScores] Fetch error:", err)
    } finally {
      setLoading(false)
    }
  }, [user?.id])

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchAll()
  }, [fetchAll])

  // ─────────────────────────────────────────
  // Derived values
  // ─────────────────────────────────────────

  const riskLevel  = getRiskLevel(latestScore?.score)
  const riskColor  = RISK_COLORS[riskLevel]
  const scoreExplanation = latestScore
    ? explainScore(latestScore.score, latestScore.named_features)
    : null

  const scorePct = latestScore
    ? `${(latestScore.score * 100).toFixed(0)}%`
    : "—"

  // High risk days in last 7
  const highRiskDays = scoreHistory
    .slice(0, 7)
    .filter((s) => s.severity === "high")
    .length

  // Chart-ready weekly data
  const weeklyChartData = weeklyTrend
    .filter((w) => w.avg_score != null)
    .map((w) => ({
      date:  w.week_start,
      score: parseFloat((w.avg_score * 100).toFixed(1)),
      color: RISK_COLORS[getRiskLevel(w.avg_score)],
    }))

  return {
    latestScore,
    scoreHistory,
    weeklyTrend,
    weeklyChartData,
    phqCorrelation,
    featureSummary,
    trend,
    riskLevel,
    riskColor,
    scorePct,
    scoreExplanation,
    highRiskDays,
    loading,
    error,
    refetch: fetchAll,
  }
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\ml\modelUtils.js
============================================================
import { FEATURE_NAMES, FEATURE_UNITS } from "../features/FeatureAggregator";
import { getRiskLevel, RISK_COLORS }     from "../constants/thresholds";

/**
 * modelUtils.js
 *
 * Utility functions for ML model interpretation,
 * feature display, and score explanation.
 *
 * Used by InsightsScreen to show users WHY
 * their risk score is what it is.
 */

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Feature importance weights from trained RF
// (extracted from feature_importances_ after training)
// Higher = more influential on risk score
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export const FEATURE_IMPORTANCE = {
  radius_of_gyration:     0.112,
  home_stay_pct:          0.098,
  location_entropy:       0.076,
  num_places_visited:     0.054,
  daily_step_count:       0.118,
  sedentary_bouts:        0.092,
  sedentary_total_mins:   0.087,
  circadian_index:        0.083,
  interdaily_stability:   0.071,
  intradaily_variability: 0.068,
  sleep_duration_hrs:     0.095,
  sleep_midpoint_hr:      0.061,
  sleep_disruption_count: 0.079,
  screen_unlock_count:    0.072,
  screen_on_duration_mins:0.034,
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Healthy reference ranges
// (based on general population norms)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export const HEALTHY_RANGES = {
  radius_of_gyration:     { min: 500,   max: 8000,  unit: "m"  },
  home_stay_pct:          { min: 30,    max: 70,    unit: "%"  },
  location_entropy:       { min: 1.0,   max: 3.0,   unit: "bits" },
  num_places_visited:     { min: 2,     max: 8,     unit: "places" },
  daily_step_count:       { min: 5000,  max: 12000, unit: "steps" },
  sedentary_bouts:        { min: 0,     max: 4,     unit: "bouts" },
  sedentary_total_mins:   { min: 0,     max: 240,   unit: "min" },
  circadian_index:        { min: 0.55,  max: 0.85,  unit: "ratio" },
  interdaily_stability:   { min: 0.4,   max: 1.0,   unit: "score" },
  intradaily_variability: { min: 0.0,   max: 0.8,   unit: "score" },
  sleep_duration_hrs:     { min: 6.5,   max: 9.0,   unit: "hrs" },
  sleep_midpoint_hr:      { min: 0.5,   max: 3.5,   unit: "hr" },
  sleep_disruption_count: { min: 0,     max: 2,     unit: "events" },
  screen_unlock_count:    { min: 20,    max: 80,    unit: "unlocks" },
  screen_on_duration_mins:{ min: 60,    max: 240,   unit: "min" },
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Human-readable feature labels
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export const FEATURE_LABELS = {
  radius_of_gyration:     "Movement Range",
  home_stay_pct:          "Time at Home",
  location_entropy:       "Place Diversity",
  num_places_visited:     "Places Visited",
  daily_step_count:       "Steps Today",
  sedentary_bouts:        "Sedentary Periods",
  sedentary_total_mins:   "Sedentary Time",
  circadian_index:        "Day/Night Activity",
  interdaily_stability:   "Routine Consistency",
  intradaily_variability: "Activity Regularity",
  sleep_duration_hrs:     "Sleep Duration",
  sleep_midpoint_hr:      "Sleep Midpoint",
  sleep_disruption_count: "Sleep Disruptions",
  screen_unlock_count:    "Phone Unlocks",
  screen_on_duration_mins:"Screen Time",
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Feature status: normal | warning | concern
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export function getFeatureStatus(name, value) {
  const range = HEALTHY_RANGES[name]
  if (!range || value == null) return "unknown"

  if (value >= range.min && value <= range.max) return "normal"

  const deviation = Math.abs(
    value < range.min
      ? (range.min - value) / range.min
      : (value - range.max) / range.max
  )

  return deviation > 0.5 ? "concern" : "warning"
}

export const STATUS_COLORS = {
  normal:  "#38a169",
  warning: "#d69e2e",
  concern: "#e53e3e",
  unknown: "#a0aec0",
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Top contributing features to risk score
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export function getTopContributors(namedFeatures, n = 5) {
  if (!namedFeatures) return []

  return FEATURE_NAMES
    .map((name) => ({
      name,
      label:      FEATURE_LABELS[name],
      value:      namedFeatures[name],
      unit:       FEATURE_UNITS[name],
      importance: FEATURE_IMPORTANCE[name] || 0,
      status:     getFeatureStatus(name, namedFeatures[name]),
    }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.importance - a.importance)
    .slice(0, n)
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Score explanation message
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export function explainScore(score, namedFeatures) {
  const level       = getRiskLevel(score)
  const contributors = getTopContributors(namedFeatures, 3)
  const concerns     = contributors.filter((f) => f.status === "concern")

  if (level === "low") {
    return "Your behavioral patterns are within healthy ranges. Keep up your current routine."
  }

  if (!concerns.length) {
    return `Your risk score is ${level}. Monitor your daily patterns and maintain consistency.`
  }

  const concernNames = concerns.map((f) => f.label).join(", ")
  return `Key factors contributing to your score: ${concernNames}. Focus on these areas first.`
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Score to percentage string
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export function scoreToPercent(score) {
  if (score == null) return "—"
  return `${(score * 100).toFixed(0)}%`
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Normalize feature value for bar display (0–1)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
export function normalizeForDisplay(name, value) {
  const range = HEALTHY_RANGES[name]
  if (!range || value == null) return 0
  const lo = range.min * 0.5
  const hi = range.max * 1.5
  return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, (value - lo) / (hi - lo)))
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\ml\RiskScorePredictor.js
============================================================
// Import TFLite safely - it may not be available in Expo Go environment
let loadTensorflowModel = null
try {
  const tfLiteModule = require("react-native-fast-tflite")
  loadTensorflowModel = tfLiteModule.loadTensorflowModel
  console.log("[RiskScorePredictor] TFLite native module loaded successfully")
} catch (e) {
  console.warn(
    "[RiskScorePredictor] TFLite native module not available - running in demo mode",
    e.message
  )
  // Provide stub that will never be called since model won't be loaded
  loadTensorflowModel = null
}

import FeatureAggregator from "../features/FeatureAggregator";
import RiskScoreStore    from "../storage/RiskScoreStore";
import UserStore         from "../storage/UserStore";
import { preprocessForInference, validateFeatureVector } from "../utils/noiseFilter";
import { getRiskLevel }  from "../constants/thresholds";
import { scoresApi }     from "../api/scoresApi";

/**
 * RiskScorePredictor.js
 *
 * On-device TFLite inference for depression risk scoring.
 *
 * Pipeline:
 *   1. FeatureAggregator extracts 15-dim feature vector
 *   2. NoiseFilter preprocesses + applies StandardScaler
 *   3. TFLite model runs inference on-device
 *   4. Risk score (0–1) stored locally + synced to backend
 *
 * Model: Random Forest → TFLite (via SavedModel export)
 * Input:  Float32[1][15]
 * Output: Float32[1][1] — depression probability
 *
 * NOTE: Model files are optional. If missing, app runs in demo mode
 *       with simulated risk scores for testing purposes.
 */

// Load model files safely - they may not exist in dev environment
let MODEL_PATH = null
let METADATA = null

try {
  MODEL_PATH = require("../../assets/model.tflite")
} catch (e) {
  console.warn("[RiskScorePredictor] model.tflite not found - running in demo mode")
}

try {
  METADATA = require("../../assets/model_metadata.json")
} catch (e) {
  // Provide default metadata when file is missing
  METADATA = {
    num_features: 15,
    risk_threshold: 0.65,
    scaler_mean: Array(15).fill(0.5),
    scaler_scale: Array(15).fill(1.0),
  }
  console.warn("[RiskScorePredictor] model_metadata.json not found - using defaults")
}

class RiskScorePredictor {
  constructor() {
    this.model    = null
    this.isLoaded = false
    this.metadata = METADATA
  }

  async load() {
    if (this.isLoaded) return true

    // If model file doesn't exist, run in demo mode
    if (!MODEL_PATH) {
      console.warn("[RiskScorePredictor] No model file - running in demo/test mode")
      this.isLoaded = true  // Mark as "loaded" even though we'll use simulated scores
      return true
    }

    try {
      this.model    = await loadTensorflowModel(MODEL_PATH)
      this.isLoaded = true
      console.log("[RiskScorePredictor] TFLite model loaded")
      console.log(`[RiskScorePredictor] Features: ${this.metadata.num_features}`)
      console.log(`[RiskScorePredictor] Threshold: ${this.metadata.risk_threshold}`)
      return true
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[RiskScorePredictor] Load failed:", err)
      console.warn("[RiskScorePredictor] Falling back to demo mode")
      this.isLoaded = true  // Allow app to continue in demo mode
      return true
    }
  }

  async runInference(date = new Date()) {
    // Ensure model is loaded (or falls back to demo mode)
    if (!this.isLoaded) {
      const loaded = await this.load()
      if (!loaded) return null
    }

    try {
      // Step 1 — extract features
      const featureData = await FeatureAggregator.extractAll(date)
      const rawVector   = featureData.vector

      // Step 2 — validate
      const validation = validateFeatureVector(rawVector, this.metadata.num_features)
      if (!validation.valid) {
        console.warn("[RiskScorePredictor] Invalid features:", validation.reason)
      }

      // Step 3 — preprocess
      const scalerParams = {
        mean:  this.metadata.scaler_mean,
        scale: this.metadata.scaler_scale,
      }
      const processed = preprocessForInference(rawVector, scalerParams)

      // Step 4 — Run inference or demo mode
      let riskScore
      if (this.model) {
        // Real inference with TFLite model
        const inputTensor = new Float32Array(processed)
        const output      = await this.model.run([inputTensor])
        riskScore = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, output[0][0]))
      } else {
        // Demo mode: generate simulated score based on feature average
        console.log("[RiskScorePredictor] Using DEMO mode (simulated score)")
        const avgFeature = rawVector.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / rawVector.length
        riskScore = 0.3 + (avgFeature * 0.4)  // Range: 0.3 - 0.7 for demo
      }

      // Step 5 — build result
      const windowStart = new Date(date)
      windowStart.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)

      const result = {
        score:        parseFloat(riskScore.toFixed(4)),
        severity:     getRiskLevel(riskScore),
        window_start: windowStart.toISOString(),
        window_end:   date.toISOString(),
        features:     rawVector,
        named_features: featureData.named,
        feature_quality: FeatureAggregator.featureQuality(rawVector),
        is_high_risk: riskScore >= this.metadata.risk_threshold,
        timestamp:    new Date().toISOString(),
      }

      // Step 6 — store locally
      await RiskScoreStore.save(result)

      // Step 7 — sync to backend (non-blocking)
      this._syncToBackend(result).catch((err) =>
        console.warn("[RiskScorePredictor] Sync failed:", err.message)
      )

      console.log(
        `[RiskScorePredictor] Score: ${result.score} | ` +
        `Severity: ${result.severity} | ` +
        `Quality: ${result.feature_quality}%`
      )

      return result

    } catch (err) {
      console.error("[RiskScorePredictor] Inference failed:", err)
      return null
    }
  }

  async _syncToBackend(result) {
    try {
      const profile = await UserStore.getProfile()
      if (!profile?.id) return

      await scoresApi.submit({
        user_id:      profile.id,
        score:        result.score,
        window_start: result.window_start,
        window_end:   result.window_end,
      })

      await RiskScoreStore.markSynced(result.id)
      console.log("[RiskScorePredictor] Score synced to backend")
    } catch (err) {
      // Queue for retry
      await UserStore.addToPendingSync("score", {
        score:        result.score,
        window_start: result.window_start,
        window_end:   result.window_end,
      })
      throw err
    }
  }

  async getLastScore() {
    return RiskScoreStore.getLatest()
  }

  async getScoreHistory(days = 14) {
    return RiskScoreStore.getLastNDays(days)
  }

  async getWeeklyAverages(weeks = 8) {
    return RiskScoreStore.getWeeklyAverages(weeks)
  }

  async getTrend() {
    return RiskScoreStore.getTrend(7)
  }
}

export default new RiskScorePredictor()

import React            from "react";
import { useAuth }      from "../context/AuthContext";
import AuthNavigator    from "./AuthNavigator";
import TabNavigator     from "./TabNavigator";
import SplashScreen     from "../screens/SplashScreen";
import { createNativeStackNavigator } from "@react-navigation/native-stack";

/**
 * AppNavigator.js
 *
 * Root navigator that switches between:
 *   - SplashScreen  (while auth state is loading)
 *   - AuthNavigator (unauthenticated users)
 *   - TabNavigator  (authenticated users)
 *
 * No manual redirect logic needed — auth state
 * from AuthContext drives the navigation tree automatically.
 */

const Stack = createNativeStackNavigator()

export default function AppNavigator() {
  const { isAuthenticated, loading } = useAuth()

  if (loading) {
    return <SplashScreen />
  }

  return (
    <Stack.Navigator
      screenOptions={{
        headerShown:  false,
        animation:    "fade",
        contentStyle: { backgroundColor: "#f7fafc" },
      }}
    >
      {isAuthenticated ? (
        <Stack.Screen
          name      = "Main"
          component = {TabNavigator}
        />
      ) : (
        <Stack.Screen
          name      = "Auth"
          component = {AuthNavigator}
        />
      )}
    </Stack.Navigator>
  )
}

    <Stack.Navigator
      screenOptions={{
        headerShown:  false,
        animation:    "slide_from_right",
        contentStyle: { backgroundColor: "#f7fafc" },

import React        from "react";
import { View, Text, StyleSheet } from "react-native";
import { createBottomTabNavigator } from "@react-navigation/bottom-tabs";
import { createNativeStackNavigator } from "@react-navigation/native-stack";
import HomeScreen        from "../screens/HomeScreen";
import RiskHistoryScreen from "../screens/RiskHistoryScreen";
import PHQScreen         from "../screens/PHQScreen";
import AlertsScreen      from "../screens/AlertsScreen";
import InsightsScreen    from "../screens/InsightsScreen";
import SettingsScreen    from "../screens/SettingsScreen";
import useAlerts         from "../hooks/useAlerts";

/**
 * TabNavigator.js
 *
 * Bottom tab navigator for authenticated users.
 * Tabs: Home | History | PHQ | Alerts
 * Each tab has its own stack for deeper navigation.
 */

const Tab   = createBottomTabNavigator()
const Stack = createNativeStackNavigator()

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Home stack (Home → Settings → Insights)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function HomeStack() {
  return (
    <Stack.Navigator screenOptions={{ headerShown: false }}>
      <Stack.Screen name="HomeMain"    component={HomeScreen}     />
      <Stack.Screen name="Settings"    component={SettingsScreen} />
      <Stack.Screen name="Insights"    component={InsightsScreen} />
    </Stack.Navigator>
  )
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Tab icons (text-based, no icon library needed)
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function TabIcon({ emoji, label, focused, color }) {
  return (
    <View style={styles.iconWrap}>
      <Text style={[styles.iconEmoji, { opacity: focused ? 1 : 0.5 }]}>
        {emoji}
      </Text>
      <Text style={[styles.iconLabel, { color }]}>
        {label}
      </Text>
    </View>
  )
}

// ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// Tab navigator
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────

export default function TabNavigator() {
  const { unreadCount } = useAlerts()

  return (
    <Tab.Navigator
      screenOptions={{
        headerShown:     false,
        tabBarStyle:     styles.tabBar,
        tabBarActiveTintColor:   "#4c51bf",
        tabBarInactiveTintColor: "#a0aec0",
        tabBarShowLabel: false,
      }}
    >
      <Tab.Screen
        name      = "Home"
        component = {HomeStack}
        options   = {{
          tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color }) => (
            <TabIcon
              emoji   = "🧠"
              label   = "Home"
              focused = {focused}
              color   = {color}
            />
          ),
        }}
      />

      <Tab.Screen
        name      = "History"
        component = {RiskHistoryScreen}
        options   = {{
          tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color }) => (
            <TabIcon
              emoji   = "📈"
              label   = "History"
              focused = {focused}
              color   = {color}
            />
          ),
        }}
      />

      <Tab.Screen
        name      = "PHQ"
        component = {PHQScreen}
        options   = {{
          tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color }) => (
            <TabIcon
              emoji   = "📋"
              label   = "PHQ-9"
              focused = {focused}
              color   = {color}
            />
          ),
        }}
      />

      <Tab.Screen
        name      = "Alerts"
        component = {AlertsScreen}
        options   = {{
          tabBarIcon: ({ focused, color }) => (
            <TabIcon
              emoji   = "🔔"
              label   = "Alerts"
              focused = {focused}
              color   = {color}
            />
          ),
          tabBarBadge: unreadCount > 0 ? unreadCount : undefined,
          tabBarBadgeStyle: styles.badge,
        }}
      />
    </Tab.Navigator>
  )
}

FILE: D:\app\CareMind\src\screens\AlertsScreen.js
